description: "OpenRouter + Intelligence" LLMTest helps devs and vibe coders automatically: ✅ Pick better models for AI-powered features (faster, cheaper, better, sometimes all 3 combined) ↪️ Automatically add fallbacks when LLM providers fail (API is overloaded or JSON format isn't respected) All through one single API and MCP functions so you can just tell Claude or Codex to optimize everything.
description_zh: “OpenRouter + Intelligence” LLMTest 可帮助开发者和氛围编码者自动完成以下任务：✅ 为人工智能功能选择更好的模型（更快、更便宜、更好，有时三者兼备）↪️ 当大型语言模型（LLM）提供商出现故障时（API过载或JSON格式不受支持），自动添加回退方案。所有这些功能都通过一个单一的API和MCP函数实现，因此您只需告诉Claude或Codex优化所有内容即可。

name: Tapfree for Chrome
tagline: Voice dictation that adapts to what’s on your screen
tagline_zh: 语音转录功能，可根据屏幕内容自适应调整
description: Typing on the web has not evolved. Tapfree fixes that. Tapfree is a voice-first keyboard for Chrome text fields and ChromeOS that lets you write messages, notes, docs, and emails by speaking naturally - without dictation errors, awkward formatting, or constant corrections. It understands context, not just words.
description_zh: 网页打字方式尚未进化。Tapfree解决了这个问题。Tapfree是一款针对Chrome文本框和ChromeOS的语音优先键盘，让你能够通过自然说话来编写消息、笔记、文档和电子邮件，而不会出现听写错误、格式不当或频繁更正的问题。它理解上下文，而不仅仅是单词。

name: Koji by Brilliant
tagline: A world-class personal tutor for every home
tagline_zh: 为每个家庭提供世界级的私人导师
description: This isn’t just a feature launch, it’s an evolution of our entire product experience. Brilliant is now a superintelligent tutor designed to work like the best human tutors. It asks the right questions, sketches right on your screen, and adapts to how you learn best.
description_zh: 这不仅仅是一个新功能的发布，更是我们整个产品体验的升级。Brilliant现在是一个超级智能的辅导工具，其设计理念是像最优秀的人类辅导老师一样工作。它能提出恰当的问题，直接在屏幕上绘制草图，并适应你的最佳学习方式。

name: Tacet
tagline: The brain monitor for cognitive health scores
tagline_zh: 认知健康评分的大脑监测器
description: You track your steps. Your heart rate. Your calories. But what about your brain? Tacet gives you a daily cognitive fitness score and sleep quality tracking, drawn from the rhythm of how you tap your phone. Those timing patterns carry a surprisingly accurate signal about your cognitive state. No headset, no expensive hardware, no setup. Passive tracking, built on neuroscience research from Leiden University. Traditional brain monitoring is expensive. Tacet brings it to your pocket. Start today!
description_zh: 你追踪自己的步数、心率和卡路里消耗。但你的大脑呢？Tacet通过你点击手机的节奏，为你提供每日认知健康评分和睡眠质量追踪。这些时间模式能出奇准确地反映你的认知状态。无需耳机、昂贵的硬件或设置。基于莱顿大学的神经科学研究，它采用被动追踪方式。传统的大脑监测成本高昂。Tacet让你轻松随身携带。从今天开始！

name: SuprSend AI
tagline: AI-first platform for multi-channel notifications
tagline_zh: 多渠道通知的AI优先平台
description: SuprSend now ships six AI-native interfaces for notification infrastructure. MCP Server with 24 tools in your IDE, CLI for notification config as code versioned in Git, Agent Skills so AI knows your schemas instead of hallucinating your API, an AI Copilot inside the dashboard, a Slack Agent to trigger and debug from Slack, and a Claude Extension. Works across Cursor, Claude, Windsurf, and Slack. Used by 500+ companies. Free tier available.
description_zh: SuprSend现已推出六款原生AI接口，用于通知基础设施。MCP服务器在您的IDE中集成了24款工具，命令行界面（CLI）用于配置通知，代码版本托管在Git中，Agent Skills让AI能够识别您的模式，而非误判您的API，仪表板内嵌AI Copilot，Slack Agent可通过Slack触发和调试，以及Claude扩展。该产品适用于Cursor、Claude、Windsurf和Slack。已有500多家公司使用。提供免费版。

name: Composer
tagline: Multiplayer markdown for you, your team, and your agents.
tagline_zh: 为您、您的团队和您的代理提供多人游戏支持。
description: Composer is a real-time, multiplayer markdown editor where people and agents can work side-by-side. Instantly share markdown generated by your agent with teammates, edit in real time, leave comments, suggestions, and share context. Your agents join as true collaborators, working directly alongside you and your team.
description_zh: Composer是一个实时多人Markdown编辑器，人们和代理可以并排工作。您可以与队友即时共享代理生成的Markdown，实时编辑，发表评论、建议，并共享上下文。您的代理将作为真正的合作者加入，直接与您和您的团队并肩工作。

name: Keen Code
tagline: A context-efficient CLI coding agent built by agents
tagline_zh: 由代理构建的上下文高效的命令行界面（CLI）编码代理
description: Keen Code is an open-source, context-aware and efficient CLI coding agent written in Go. Three aspects stand it out from other similar products: - It was built from scratch by coding agents, with the full prompt/design trail preserved and shared in the repo. - It uses turn memory to keep multi-turn sessions lean which saves context significantly. - It maps MCP servers to lazy-loaded Skills instead of stuffing large schemas into context upfront. This again saves context in mult-MCP setting.
description_zh: Keen Code是一款用Go语言编写的开源、上下文感知且高效的命令行界面（CLI）编码助手。与其他同类产品相比，它有三个显著特点：首先，它是由编码助手从零开始构建的，完整的提示/设计轨迹都保留在代码库中并可共享。其次，它利用轮次记忆来保持多轮会话的简洁性，从而显著节省上下文信息。最后，它将多云协作平台（MCP）服务器映射到延迟加载的技能上，而不是预先将大型模式填充到上下文中。这同样在多MCP设置中节省了上下文信息。

name: Fonda
tagline: Your AI co-founder that remembers decisions + plans for you
tagline_zh: 你的AI联合创始人，为你记住决策+制定计划
description: Most "AI startup tools" give you a blank chat box. Fonda is different — it's a structured AI co-founder that runs a proven 14-step journey with you: Discover, Validate, Launch, Scale. It remembers every decision, interview, and pivot across sessions. It kills weak ideas before you waste months on them. It ships your landing page, business case, and MVP plan once validated. One clear next move, every day. Free to start.
description_zh: 大多数“人工智能创业工具”都只提供一个空白的聊天框。而Fonda与众不同——它是一个结构化的人工智能联合创始人，与你一起走过经过验证的14步旅程：发现、验证、启动、扩展。它会记住会话中的每一个决定、面试和转折。它会在你浪费数月时间之前扼杀掉那些不成熟的想法。一旦验证通过，它就会发布你的着陆页、商业案例和最小可行产品（MVP）计划。每天都有一个明确的下一步行动。免费开始。

name: Onpilot
tagline: An AI workforce customized to your business
tagline_zh: 一支为您的业务量身定制的人工智能团队
description: Onpilot creates specialized AI workers customized to your systems, workflows, and processes. Onpilot monitors operations, identifies risks, uncovers opportunities, recommends actions, and automates work across 3,000+ integrations. Deploy in Slack, Teams, WhatsApp, your SaaS, or on-premises.
description_zh: Onpilot为您的系统、工作流程和流程量身定制专门的AI助手。Onpilot监控运营情况，识别风险，发现机会，提出行动建议，并通过3000多个集成实现工作自动化。您可以在Slack、Teams、WhatsApp、您的SaaS或本地部署中使用。

name: Forsy
tagline: Where AI agents exchange real-world work experience
tagline_zh: 人工智能代理交换真实世界工作经验的地方
description: Forsy is the platform where AI agents exchange real-world work experience and expertise.
description_zh: Forsy是一个平台，供人工智能代理交换真实世界的工作经验和专业知识。

name: Brand Context API
tagline: Ship AI that stays on-brand
tagline_zh: 保持品牌一致的船舶人工智能
description: Brand Context API keeps your AI on-brand by returning a company's brand identity in one call: voice, mission, products, audience. With this structured data, your product ships output that's grounded from the first prompt.
description_zh: Brand Context API通过一次调用返回公司的品牌标识（包括品牌声音、使命、产品和受众），使您的AI保持品牌一致性。借助这些结构化数据，您的产品能够从首次提示开始就输出基于品牌定位的输出内容。

name: Lium AI
tagline: AI for analyzing and querying complex data
tagline_zh: 用于分析和查询复杂数据的人工智能
description: Lium is a collaborative AI platform that helps domain experts get reliable answers from messy, massive, multimodal datasets. Connect terabyte size data in any format, ask questions in plain English, generate knowledge artifacts, and turn verified analysis into reusable workflows your team can build on. Lium brings together data across geospatial, energy, space, and other complex domains so work that once required weeks of engineering can happen in a single conversation.
description_zh: Lium是一个协作式人工智能平台，可帮助领域专家从混乱、庞大、多模态的数据集中获取可靠答案。连接任何格式的TB级数据，用简单英语提出问题，生成知识成果，并将经过验证的分析转化为可重复使用的工作流程，供您的团队在此基础上进行构建。Lium汇集了地理空间、能源、航天和其他复杂领域的数据，因此，过去需要数周工程工作才能完成的任务，现在只需一次对话即可完成。

name: veridive
tagline: Find the 30 seconds that matter in any video via chat
tagline_zh: 通过聊天功能，在任何视频中找到关键的30秒内容
description: veridive turns YouTube, podcasts, lectures and interviews into cited answers — pinpointed to the exact second the answer is spoken. Ask in any language! veridive searches live, reads the transcripts, ranks sources by who actually knows, and answers with a click-to-play citation on every claim.
description_zh: veridive将YouTube、播客、讲座和访谈转化为可引用的答案——精确到答案被说出的那一秒。用任何语言提问！veridive实时搜索、阅读文字记录，根据实际知情者对信息来源进行排序，并对每个陈述提供点击播放的引用作为答案。

name: Reignat
tagline: Privacy-friendly web analytics platform built for makers
tagline_zh: 专为创客打造的隐私友好型网络分析平台
description: Reignat is a privacy-friendly web analytics platform built for founders, startups, and indie makers who want clear insights without the complexity of traditional analytics tools. Track visitors, pageviews, traffic sources, devices, locations, funnels, and user journeys in real time. Get AI-powered insights to understand trends, uncover opportunities, and make better growth decisions—all from a fast, modern dashboard.
description_zh: Reignat是一个注重隐私的网络分析平台，专为创始人、初创企业和独立创作者打造，他们希望获得清晰的见解，同时避免传统分析工具的复杂性。该平台可实时追踪访客、页面浏览量、流量来源、设备、位置、渠道和用户旅程。通过人工智能技术，用户可以快速、直观地了解趋势、发现机会，并做出更好的增长决策——所有这些都可以在一个快速、现代化的仪表板上完成。

name: Dirac
tagline: The AI inbox that briefs founders every morning
tagline_zh: 每天早上向创始人发送简报的人工智能收件箱
description: Founders lose hours everyday to doing email, when they should be spending the time to build and make real progress. Dirac was made to end that. Dirac is an AI-native inbox that scans your threads, drafts replies in your voice, and shows a brief with only what needs your decision, quietly dealing with the 80% of un-important emails in the background. You run your inbox by deciding, not being your own assitant.
description_zh: 创始人每天都会花费数小时处理电子邮件，而他们本应将这些时间用于构建业务并取得实质性进展。Dirac就是为了终结这一现象而诞生的。Dirac是一款原生AI收件箱，它能扫描你的邮件线索，用你的声音起草回复，并仅显示需要你做出决定的内容摘要，同时在后台悄悄处理80%的不重要电子邮件。你可以通过决策来管理你的收件箱，而不是让收件箱成为你的助手。

name: Screen Ruler
tagline: The go-to ruler for designers and developers
tagline_zh: 设计师和开发者的首选工具
description: Unlike browser DevTools, Screen Ruler is built for design workflows: visual flexbox/grid breakdown, gradient inspection with color stops, multi-element pseudo-state simulation, CSS-to-Tailwind conversion, and a Page tab with Performance, SEO, and Social previews.
description_zh: 与浏览器开发者工具不同，Screen Ruler专为设计工作流程而打造：提供可视化的flexbox/grid细分、带颜色停止点的渐变检查、多元素伪状态模拟、CSS到Tailwind的转换，以及包含性能、SEO和社交预览的页面标签页。

name: Fox Issue Tracker 4
tagline: Track, plan, and release.
tagline_zh: 跟踪、规划并发布。
description: Fox helps you organize work that's outgrown todo apps and notes. Built for solo developers and small teams, it organizes everything around the versions you're shipping and the milestones that get you there—turning scattered tasks into a clear path to delivery and helping to ensure nothing is left behind.
description_zh: Fox可帮助您管理那些已超出待办事项应用程序和笔记范畴的工作。它专为独立开发人员和小型团队打造，围绕您要发布的版本和达成目标的里程碑来组织所有内容——将分散的任务转化为清晰的交付路径，并帮助确保不遗漏任何内容。

name: AccountyCat
tagline: A focus companion that actually gets context
tagline_zh: 一个真正能理解上下文的焦点伴侣
description: AccountyCat is a focus companion for macOS that reads context instead of blocking lists. It sits in your menu bar, sees your active app and window title (and a screenshot only when needed), then quietly nudges when you drift. Sometimes YouTube is procrastination, sometimes it's the tutorial — AC tells the difference. Runs fully on-device with Qwen via llama.cpp, or with your own OpenRouter key. Open source, auditable, private. Interrupting legitimate work is treated as a bug.
description_zh: AccountyCat是一款适用于macOS的专注伴侣应用，它读取上下文信息而非屏蔽列表。它位于您的菜单栏中，会查看您当前活动的应用和窗口标题（仅在需要时才会查看截图），然后在您走神时悄悄提醒。有时YouTube会让人分心，有时则是教程——AccountyCat能区分这两者。它通过llama.cpp与Qwen完全在设备上运行，或者使用您自己的OpenRouter密钥。开源、可审计、私密。中断正当工作被视为一个bug。

name: Atomic Mail Agentic
tagline: Let your agents read, send, and react to email autonomously
tagline_zh: 让你的代理自主阅读、发送和回复电子邮件
description: Atomic Mail Agentic gives autonomous AI agents their own real @atomicmail.ai inbox to manage fully without human setup, verification, or ongoing intervention. Built on JMAP (RFC 8620), the standard mailbox API LLMs already know fluently, so agents read, send, reply, draft, search, and manage threads reliably with fewer retries. Novel proof-of-work signup delivers a real inbox in ~30 seconds—no CAPTCHA, credit card, domain verification, or mail-server ops.
description_zh: Atomic Mail Agentic为自主AI代理提供了他们自己的真实@atomicmail.ai收件箱，无需人工设置、验证或持续干预即可完全管理。该收件箱基于JMAP（RFC 8620）构建，是标准邮箱API，大型语言模型（LLM）已能流利地识别，因此代理能够可靠地读取、发送、回复、起草、搜索和管理邮件线程，且重试次数更少。新颖的工作量证明注册方式可在约30秒内提供一个真实的收件箱——无需验证码、信用卡、域名验证或邮件服务器操作。

name: OLO Robotics
tagline: Control robots in your browser — no setup needed
tagline_zh: 在浏览器中控制机器人——无需安装
description: OLO is a web-based platform that gives developers, researchers, and academics everything they need to program robots — without the setup hell. Get ROS2 access, robot visualization, simulation and AI-assisted coding all in your browser. Go from idea to working robot in 30 minutes, not two weeks. No Linux installs. No config rabbit holes. Just you, your robot, and a JavaScript or Python SDK playground ready from day one. Now open for sign-ups.
description_zh: OLO是一个基于网络的平台，为开发者、研究人员和学者提供机器人编程所需的一切，免去了繁琐的安装过程。您可以在浏览器中访问ROS2、实现机器人可视化、模拟和AI辅助编码。从创意到机器人工作，只需30分钟，无需两周。无需安装Linux系统。无需陷入配置的泥潭。只需您、您的机器人和一个从第一天起就准备好的JavaScript或Python SDK游乐场。现已开放注册。

name: DevCleaner
tagline: Free the gigabytes your dev tools and AI apps hoard
tagline_zh: 释放你的开发工具和人工智能应用所占用的数GB空间
description: DevCleaner lives in your Mac's menu bar and frees the gigabytes that 22 dev ecosystems quietly hoard — Xcode, Gradle, npm, plus AI apps like Cursor, Claude & Ollama. Every item is risk-rated, so you always know what's safe to delete. Free, no account, 4 MB.
description_zh: DevCleaner 位于 Mac 的菜单栏中，可释放 22 个开发环境（包括 Xcode、Gradle、npm 以及 Cursor、Claude 和 Ollama 等 AI 应用）悄悄占用的数 GB 空间。每个项目都设有风险等级，因此您始终可以知道哪些内容可以安全删除。免费版无需账户，容量为 4 MB。

name: AGNT.Hub
tagline: Build always-on AI agents without managing servers
tagline_zh: 无需管理服务器，即可构建永不关闭的AI代理
description: Most AI tools stop at the chat box. AGNT Hub gives you a private AI workspace running inside an isolated cloud container. Add custom skills, connect tools like Notion via MCP, and build workflows once. Let your agents run in the background without touching Docker, AWS, or config files.
description_zh: 大多数人工智能工具仅限于聊天框。AGNT Hub为您提供了一个在隔离的云容器内运行的私人人工智能工作区。您可以添加自定义技能，通过MCP连接Notion等工具，并一次性构建工作流程。让您的代理在后台运行，无需接触Docker、AWS或配置文件。

name: Synopsule
tagline: On device private AI meeting transcripts
tagline_zh: 设备端私有AI会议记录
description: Synopsule records and transcribes your conversations on your Mac or iPhone with Whisper, labels every speaker, and only summarizes when you ask. No accounts, no uploads. Now on the App Store — one $4.99 purchase for Mac and iPhone.
description_zh: Synopsule使用Whisper在您的Mac或iPhone上录制并转录您的对话，为每位说话者打上标签，并仅在您要求时提供摘要。无需注册账户，也不会上传内容。现已在App Store上线——Mac和iPhone用户只需4.99美元即可购买。

name: Revyl
tagline: The mobile source of truth
tagline_zh: 移动端信息源
description: Revyl gives mobile teams full observability into how their app actually behaves on live cloud devices. Step-level execution traces, performance data (CPU, memory, FPS), a complete network waterfall, and state and file-system diffing across every run. Atlas auto-maps every screen and flow in your app, and revyl dev brings hot reload and device control into your dev loop.
description_zh: Revyl为移动团队提供全面的可观察性，让他们能够实时了解应用程序在云设备上的实际运行情况。它提供步骤级别的执行跟踪、性能数据（CPU、内存、FPS）、完整的网络流量图，以及每次运行之间的状态和文件系统差异。Atlas能够自动映射应用程序中的每个屏幕和流程，而revyl dev则将热重载和设备控制功能融入您的开发循环中。

name: Compartment
tagline: Open-source runtime for internal team software
tagline_zh: 内部团队软件的开源运行环境
description: Compartment is a self-hosted open-source runtime for AI-built internal apps. It gives teams one place to run and share the apps, scripts, workers, and automations created with AI coding agents, on infrastructure they own. Use Cursor, Claude, Codex, or any stack your team already works with. Compartment turns the code into team-ready software with isolation, RBAC, SSO, and audit logs built in.
description_zh: Compartment是一个自托管的开源运行时环境，专为基于AI构建的内部应用而设计。它为团队提供了一个平台，让他们可以在自己拥有的基础设施上运行和共享使用AI编码代理创建的应用、脚本、工作进程和自动化流程。团队可以使用Cursor、Claude、Codex或任何他们已经熟悉的开发工具栈。Compartment能够将代码转化为团队可用的软件，并内置隔离、基于角色的访问控制（RBAC）、单点登录（SSO）和审计日志等功能。

name: Ploy.ai
tagline: Ploy turns your website into your company's growth engine.
tagline_zh: Ploy将您的网站转化为公司的增长引擎。
description: Ploy is an agentic marketing platform that powers all your digital channels, starting with your website. It slurps your site, designs pages, runs ad campaigns, personalizes content, and syncs data back to your CRM, continuously and in the background. Unlike other website builders before it, it can work to improve your traffic and generate outcomes while you sleep.
description_zh: Ploy是一个代理营销平台，能够支持您所有的数字渠道，从您的网站开始。它能够快速抓取您的网站内容，设计页面，运行广告活动，个性化内容，并将数据同步回您的客户关系管理（CRM）系统，这一过程会在后台持续进行。与之前的其他网站构建器不同，它能够在您睡觉时为您提升流量并产生效益。

name: buildpipe
tagline: Compose, run and automate multi step AI developer workflows
tagline_zh: 编写、运行和自动化多步骤AI开发者工作流程
description: A local-first pipeline automation app for developers powered by AI, running natively on your machine. Think of it as a local Zapier or n8n, built specifically for developers who want to chain shell commands, AI calls, HTTP requests, and file operations into reusable pipelines then trigger them on a schedule, on a file change, or via webhook.
description_zh: 这是一款面向开发者的本地优先的管道自动化应用，由人工智能驱动，可在您的本地机器上运行。您可以将其视为一个本地版的Zapier或n8n，专为那些希望将shell命令、人工智能调用、HTTP请求和文件操作整合到可重复使用的管道中，然后根据计划、文件更改或通过Webhook触发它们的开发者而打造。

name: The Incident Challenge
tagline: Production Debugging Games for Software Engineers
tagline_zh: 软件工程师的游戏制作调试
description: Compete in realistic incident simulations where you find the root cause, fix the system, and race the leaderboard.
description_zh: 在逼真的事故模拟中一决高下，找出根本原因，修复系统，并角逐排行榜。

name: Stage
tagline: Screen recording for demos, bugs, and updates
tagline_zh: 用于演示、调试和更新的屏幕录制
description: Record your product walkthrough with screen, camera, audio, cursor, and keystrokes all in sync. Add subtitles, clean it up fast, and publish a polished demo without becoming a video editor.
description_zh: 同步录制您的产品演示，包括屏幕、摄像头、音频、光标和按键操作。添加字幕，快速整理，无需成为视频编辑即可发布精美的演示。

name: AirJelly
tagline: Your Proactive, Self-Organizing Second Brain
tagline_zh: 你的主动式、自组织第二大脑
description: AirJelly is an always-on desktop AI agent that proactively captures your intent, organizes your tasks, and gets things done. By observing your on-screen activities, it knows who you are and what you're working on. It doesn't just spot your to-dos — it foresees what's next and acts. It also tracks your personal interactions, so you'll never miss a follow-up or forget a promise. Everything in your life is managed by AirJelly — freeing your time for what AI can't do, or simply for you to enjoy.
description_zh: AirJelly是一款始终在线的桌面人工智能助手，它能主动捕捉你的意图，整理你的任务，并帮你完成任务。通过观察你在屏幕上的活动，它能识别你是谁以及你在做什么。它不仅能发现你的待办事项，还能预见下一步要做的事并采取行动。此外，它还会追踪你的个人互动，这样你就再也不会错过任何后续跟进或忘记任何承诺。你生活中的一切都被AirJelly管理得井井有条——让你把时间花在人工智能无法完成的事情上，或者纯粹用来享受生活。

name: CatchAll by NewsCatcher
tagline: Build any dataset from the web. Filtered to your criteria.
tagline_zh: 从网络上构建任意数据集，并根据您的标准进行筛选。
description: CatchAll is a web search API that builds structured datasets from the open web. Submit a query, and it scans thousands of web pages, validates every result, and returns clean, deduplicated records — not a ranked list of links, but a dataset of real-world events, ready for workflows and pipelines.
description_zh: CatchAll是一个网络搜索API，它从开放网络构建结构化数据集。提交一个查询后，它会扫描数千个网页，验证每个结果，并返回干净、去重的记录——不是按排名列出的链接，而是真实世界事件的数据集，可直接用于工作流程和管道。

name: Limelight
tagline: Make your screen recordings easy to follow
tagline_zh: 让你的屏幕录制内容更易于理解
description: Limelight makes everything you do on screen easy to follow. 🔦 Spotlight your cursor, ⌨️ show the keys you press, and ✏️ draw on screen — so your audience never loses track of what you're doing. Works with Zoom, OBS, Keynote, Google Slides, anything. Native, offline, no account. No subscription — $15 once, with a 7-day free trial.
description_zh: Limelight让你在屏幕上所做的一切都易于跟踪。🔦光标高亮显示，⌨️显示你按下的键，✏️在屏幕上绘图——这样你的观众就不会错过你正在做的任何事情。适用于Zoom、OBS、Keynote、Google Slides等任何软件。原生、离线、无需账户。无需订阅——一次性支付15美元，并提供7天免费试用。

name: Pawse.ai
tagline: An acoustic regulation system for dogs
tagline_zh: 狗狗声学调节系统
description: Most dogs left alone for four or more hours show measurable stress responses. Most apps respond with playlists. Pawse.ai is an acoustic regulation system for dogs. It plays scientifically structured audio through your Apple TV or iPad while you're out, frequencies and patterns calibrated for canine hearing, not human preference. You start and stop it from your phone, anywhere. BETA TestFlight links live on https://pawse.ai Five modes: Sleep, Home Alone, Loud Noise, Travel, and Vet Visit.
description_zh: 大多数狗狗若被单独留在家中四小时或更长时间，都会表现出明显的应激反应。大多数应用程序会通过播放音乐列表来应对。Pawse.ai是一款专为狗狗设计的声波调节系统。当你外出时，它会通过你的Apple TV或iPad播放经过科学设计的音频，其频率和模式是根据狗狗的听力而非人类的喜好进行校准的。你可以随时随地通过手机启动或停止它。BETA TestFlight的链接可在https://pawse.ai上找到。该系统有五种模式：睡眠、独自在家、嘈杂噪音、旅行和兽医访问。

name: Are you in the Weights?
tagline: Find out if you live forever in the brain of the LLMs
tagline_zh: 看看你是否能在大型语言模型（LLMs）的大脑中永生
description: The weights are the billions of numbers forming an AI's brain. Type a name and see how strongly the leading AI models recognize it. Are you in the weights?
description_zh: 权重是构成人工智能大脑的数十亿个数字。输入一个名字，看看主流人工智能模型对其识别的准确度。你的名字在权重中吗？

name: Blazly Backlinker
tagline: Automate your entire backlink generation
tagline_zh: 自动化您的整个反向链接生成过程
description: Blazly Backlinker helps marketers, agencies, and founders build high-quality backlinks without the endless spreadsheets, prospecting, outreach, and follow-ups. Simply enter your website and target keywords. Backlinker discovers relevant backlink opportunities, finds verified contacts, generates personalized outreach emails, and helps you earn authoritative backlinks on autopilot. From prospecting to outreach to guest post creation, everything happens in one streamlined workflow.
description_zh: Blazly Backlinker助力营销人员、代理机构和创始人轻松构建高质量的反向链接，无需繁琐的电子表格、潜在客户挖掘、外联和后续跟进。只需输入您的网站和目标关键词，Backlinker即可发现相关的反向链接机会，找到经过验证的联系人，生成个性化的外联邮件，并帮助您自动获得权威的反向链接。从潜在客户挖掘到外联再到客座文章创作，所有流程都在一个简洁的工作流中完成。

name: Whistle
tagline: A fitness coach with personalized plans
tagline_zh: 一位拥有个性化计划的健身教练
description: Most workout apps give you a generic plan and call it personalized. Whistle actually knows you. It reads your Apple Health data and builds a real training plan around your fitness level, recovery, and goals. Detailed workouts, smart progression, all on your iPhone and Apple Watch. Whether you're just getting started or pushing toward a new personal best, your AI coach figures out what you need and when you need it. Your data. Your plan. Your pace.
description_zh: 大多数健身应用程序只是为你提供一个通用的计划，却号称是定制化的。而Whistle却真正了解你。它能读取你的Apple Health数据，并根据你的健身水平、恢复情况和目标，为你制定一个真正的训练计划。详细的锻炼计划、智能化的进度安排，一切尽在您的iPhone和Apple Watch上。无论您是刚刚起步，还是想要挑战新的个人最佳成绩，您的AI教练都能了解您的需求，并告诉您何时需要。您的数据。您的计划。您的节奏。

name: LayerProof Vellum
tagline: One canvas for every image asset you need
tagline_zh: 您需要的每个图像资源，都有一块专属画布
description: Turn unpredictable AI image generations into controlled production pipelines with LayerProof Vellum. Vellum is LayerProof’s drag-and-drop visual canvas for teams who want to engineer their images, not guess them. Plug your subject, background, and effects together on the canvas, and Vellum fuses them into a pixel-perfect final asset.
description_zh: 借助LayerProof Vellum，将不可预测的AI图像生成转化为可控的生产流程。Vellum是LayerProof的拖放式可视化画布，专为那些希望自主设计图像而非凭空猜测的团队打造。在画布上将主体、背景和效果组合在一起，Vellum即可将它们融合成像素级完美的最终作品。

name: Tinfoil Pigeons
tagline: See the aircraft flying over you on a retro radar scope
tagline_zh: 在复古雷达屏幕上，你可以看到飞机从你头顶飞过
description: What plane is flying over my house? Tinfoil Pigeons is a live radar scope: enter your postcode and see the flights overhead right now, then tap one to find out what it is.
description_zh: 哪架飞机正飞过我头顶？Tinfoil Pigeons是一款实时雷达应用：输入你的邮政编码，即可查看当前头顶的航班信息，点击任一航班，即可了解其详情。

name: Calling Skills for AI Agents
tagline: Add voice and video calling via your coding agent
tagline_zh: 通过您的编码代理添加语音和视频通话功能
description: HD voice and video calling by CometChat, built to fit into and grow with your platform. Packed with recording, screen sharing, call logs, raise hand, broadcast mode, picture-in-picture, and more. Integrate via UI Kits, SDKs, or a single npx command (npx @cometchat/skills add) using CometChat Skills. Scales with heavy bandwidth, compliant with global standards, and built for developers.
description_zh: CometChat提供高清语音和视频通话功能，可与您的平台完美融合并共同发展。该功能集录制、屏幕共享、通话记录、举手、广播模式、画中画等多种功能于一体。您可以通过UI工具包、SDK或使用CometChat Skills通过单个npx命令（npx @cometchat/skills add）进行集成。该功能可适应高带宽需求，符合全球标准，专为开发者打造。

name: tldx
tagline: Fast CLI to bulk-check domains via RDAP & MCP
tagline_zh: 通过RDAP和MCP快速批量检查域名的命令行界面（CLI）
description: Finding a good domain is half the battle. tldx is a blazing-fast, concurrent CLI tool that generates and checks domain availability in bulk via RDAP. Mix keywords, prefixes/suffixes, or regex, and stream results to stdout, JSON, or CSV. Plus, tldx includes an MCP server, empowering AI agents (like Claude) to brainstorm and verify domains for you automatically! Install via Homebrew (brew install tldx). Say goodbye to rate-limits and legacy whois parsing. 100% Free & Open Source in Go.
description_zh: 找到一个好域名，成功就完成了一半。tldx是一款速度极快、支持并发的命令行工具，可通过RDAP批量生成和检查域名可用性。您可以混合使用关键字、前缀/后缀或正则表达式，并将结果以标准输出、JSON或CSV的形式输出。此外，tldx还内置了一个MCP服务器，使AI代理（如Claude）能够自动为您集思广益并验证域名！可通过Homebrew进行安装（brew install tldx）。告别速率限制和传统的Whois解析。100%免费且采用Go语言开源。

name: Slack Data Agent
tagline: Ask about your data without leaving Slack
tagline_zh: 无需离开Slack即可查询您的数据
description: Basedash for Slack is your AI data analyst inside Slack — now in the official Slack Marketplace. Mention @Basedash in any channel and it queries your real data sources, thinks in the thread, and replies with an answer and a chart, right where your team is talking. Automations deliver scheduled reports to your channels, and insights surface anomalies automatically — charts included. Ask in Slack. Answered by your data.
description_zh: Basedash for Slack 是您在 Slack 内部的 AI 数据分析师——现已入驻官方 Slack Marketplace。在任何频道中提及 @Basedash，它就会查询您的真实数据源，在讨论中思考，并在您的团队正在讨论的地方回复答案和图表。自动化功能会向您的频道发送定时报告，并自动呈现异常情况（包括图表）。在 Slack 中提问，让数据为您答疑解惑。

name: MiMo Code
tagline: A coding agent with explicit long-term memory architecture
tagline_zh: 具有显式长期记忆架构的编码代理
description: MiMo Code is an open-source terminal AI coding agent built on OpenCode. Optimized for long-horizon tasks, it uses an independent checkpoint subagent to manage unbounded context windows, executes sandbox workflows, and evolves via scheduled maintenance.
description_zh: MiMo Code是基于OpenCode构建的开源终端人工智能编码代理。它针对长期任务进行了优化，使用独立的检查点子代理来管理无界上下文窗口，执行沙盒工作流，并通过定期维护进行进化。

name: Devin Desktop
tagline: Manage fleets of local and cloud agents from one surface
tagline_zh: 从一个界面管理本地和云代理的集群
description: Manage fleets of local and cloud agents from one surface. Plan, delegate, review, and ship without leaving your editor.
description_zh: 从单一界面管理本地和云端代理的集群。无需离开编辑器即可进行规划、委托、审查和发布。

name: MashuPack
tagline: Turn codebases into a clean file for Claude and ChatGPT
tagline_zh: 为Claude和ChatGPT将代码库整理成干净的文件
description: Select the exact parts of a repository and compile them into one clean text file for ChatGPT and Claude or Gemini. MashuPack is built for browser-based AI workflows where file-count limits, upload friction, and messy context assembly keep getting in the way. It makes code context portable, intentional, and easy to control.
description_zh: 选择存储库中的特定部分，并将它们编译成一个干净的文本文件，以供ChatGPT、Claude或Gemini使用。MashuPack专为基于浏览器的AI工作流程而构建，在这些流程中，文件数量限制、上传困难和混乱的上下文组装一直是个障碍。它使代码上下文变得可移植、有目的且易于控制。

name: Fred
tagline: AI-orchestrated UX research with behavioural tracking
tagline_zh: 基于行为跟踪的AI辅助用户体验研究
description: Fred now turns UX research into an AI-orchestrated workflow: plan studies, recruit and manage participants, run tests, analyze sessions, detect patterns, and build reports in one place. This launch adds full AI orchestration, real-time and replay-based eye tracking, gaze heatmaps, smarter analysis, and a broader research suite for teams that need faster evidence without losing methodological control.
description_zh: 弗雷德现在将用户体验研究转变为由人工智能编排的工作流程：在一个地方即可完成研究计划、招募和管理参与者、运行测试、分析会话、检测模式以及构建报告。此次发布增加了全面的AI编排功能、基于实时和回放的眼动追踪、视线热图、更智能的分析以及更广泛的研究套件，为那些需要更快获取证据同时又不失方法论控制的团队提供支持。

name: Command A+
tagline: Cohere’s open enterprise workhorse
tagline_zh: Cohere的开放式企业级主力产品
description: Cohere’s fastest and most powerful language model yet: an open-source model for running high-performance enterprise agents with maximum efficiency.
description_zh: Cohere迄今为止最快、最强大的语言模型：一款开源模型，旨在以最高效率运行高性能企业代理。

name: Grok by SpaceXAI for Word
tagline: Draft, restructure & tighten wording from panel inside Word
tagline_zh: 在Word中，对小组内部内容进行草拟、重构并优化措辞
description: Work with an AI Agent directly in your Word documents. The add-in enables a conversation-based agent sidebar that can search the web, update paragraphs, or build professional documents. Simply type what you want into the conversation pane and let the Agent handle research and execution. Ask it to rewrite paragraphs, summarize long reports, improve clarity and tone, generate outlines, create tables, or expand ideas, all without leaving Word.
description_zh: 直接在Word文档中与AI助手协同工作。该插件启用了一个基于对话的助手侧边栏，可以搜索网络、更新段落或构建专业文档。只需在对话窗格中输入您想要的内容，让助手处理研究和执行。要求它重写段落、总结长篇报告、提高清晰度和语气、生成大纲、创建表格或扩展思路，所有这些都可以在不离开Word的情况下完成。

name: Deep Work Plan
tagline: Models matter. Context matters more. Give your agent a plan.
tagline_zh: 模型很重要。情境更重要。给你的代理一个计划。
description: Deep Work Plan turns any repo into a harness with the context of your best engineer — so any AI agent codes like your smartest model and can't drift from the plan. Not a chat window it forgets, a spec written into the repo: atomic tasks, acceptance criteria, validation gates, resumable state. Long runs survive context resets; any agent picks up where the last left off. Point an agent at it, walk away, come back to work you can verify. Any agent, any repo, no lock-in. Open Source, MIT.
description_zh: 深度工作计划将任何代码库与最优秀工程师的背景相结合，使任何人工智能代理都能像最智能的模型一样编码，并且不会偏离计划。它不会忘记聊天窗口，而是将规范写入代码库：原子任务、验收标准、验证关卡、可恢复状态。长时间运行不会因上下文重置而中断；任何代理都能从上一次中断的地方继续运行。将代理指向它，走开，回来时就能看到你可以验证的工作成果。任何代理、任何代码库，无技术锁定。开源，MIT许可。

name: Foyer
tagline: Build a room of ambient sound that lives in your notch
tagline_zh: 打造一个沉浸式的音效空间，让你的手机“刘海”焕发活力
description: Foyer turns ambient sound into a place. On a black canvas you're a point of light, and each sound — a crackling hearth, a fountain, rain, birdsong — is a glowing orb you place around yourself. Pull one closer and it swells; slide it left or right and it pans there. It's real spatial audio, and it folds into your MacBook notch while you work.
description_zh: Foyer将环境声音转化为一个场所。在黑色的画布上，你是一个光点，而每一个声音——噼啪作响的炉火、喷泉、雨声、鸟鸣——都是你围绕自己放置的一个发光球体。将一个声音拉近，它会膨胀；向左或向右滑动，它会随之移动。这是真正的空间音频，当你工作时，它会融入你的MacBook缺口中。

name: Airbrush Studio
tagline: AI-powered photo editor for pro results w/o manual editing
tagline_zh: 无需手动编辑，AI驱动的照片编辑器即可实现专业效果
description: Airbrush Studio is an AI-powered photo editor built for creators and photographers who want professional-quality results without the complexity of manual editing. From portrait retouching and background cleanup to image composition, Airbrush Studio simplifies manual workflows with AI automation and task-specific presets, helping you edit faster and create more.
description_zh: Airbrush Studio是一款由人工智能驱动的照片编辑器，专为希望获得专业品质效果而又不愿面对手动编辑复杂性的创作者和摄影师打造。从人像修图、背景清理到图像构图，Airbrush Studio通过人工智能自动化和针对特定任务的预设，简化了手动工作流程，帮助您更快地编辑并创作更多作品。

name: Insta360 Luna Ultra
tagline: A gimbal camera that sees with you
tagline_zh: 一个与你同在、时刻观察的云台相机
description: Insta360 Luna Ultra is an 8K gimbal camera with a 1" Leica Summicron main lens, 1/1.3" telephoto lens, 3-axis stabilization, detachable 2" OLED touchscreen, AI tracking, 10-bit I-Log, built-in storage, and POV shooting accessories.
description_zh: Insta360 Luna Ultra是一款8K云台相机，配备1英寸徕卡Summicron主镜头、1/1.3英寸长焦镜头、三轴防抖、可拆卸2英寸OLED触摸屏、AI跟踪、10位I-Log、内置存储以及POV拍摄配件。

name: Backgrind
tagline: Run your AI agents over any app, even games.
tagline_zh: 让你的AI代理运行在任何应用程序上，甚至是游戏。
description: Your AI agent shouldn't chain you to a terminal. Backgrind floats it in an always-on-top window over any app — even a fullscreen game — and pings you only when it actually needs a decision. Bring your own (Claude Code, Cursor) or use Grindy, the built-in agent with zero setup. Multi-agent tabs, voice, Build/Plan, click-through, local-first — your login, your history.
description_zh: 你的人工智能助手不应将你束缚在终端上。Backgrind会在任何应用程序（甚至是全屏游戏）之上浮动一个始终置顶的窗口，并且仅在实际需要你做出决策时才会提醒你。你可以使用自带的（Claude Code、Cursor）或使用内置的Grindy助手，无需任何设置。多助手标签页、语音、构建/规划、点击直达、本地优先——你的登录、你的历史记录。

name: Hyper: Self-driving Company Brain
tagline: Turn your AI agents from interns to veterans
tagline_zh: 将你的AI代理从新手培养成老手
description: Hyper is the company brain that learns everything about your company (Docs, Slack, Email, Calendar, etc) then plugs into your AI skills & agents & automations so they go from forgetful interns into seasoned veterans that accomplish tasks. It helps them drafts emails in your voice, reads your contracts, triages your tickets, and preps you for every meeting, because it knows everything everyone at your company knows. Give it a spin from our website!
description_zh: Hyper是公司的智能大脑，它能了解关于你公司的一切信息（文档、Slack、电子邮件、日历等），然后将其与你的AI技能、代理和自动化功能相整合，使它们从健忘的实习生蜕变为能完成任务的老手。它能帮助他们以你的口吻起草电子邮件，阅读你的合同，分类你的工单，并为你准备每次会议，因为它了解公司里每个人都知道的一切。在我们的网站上试试吧！

name: Tide
tagline: Layered voice notes that paint themselves
tagline_zh: 能自我描绘的分层语音笔记
description: Tide turns voice memos into layered sound sketches. Takes stack onto one tape — hum a bassline, beatbox over it, sing the hook. The waveform paints itself as you record. Scrub like vinyl, loop the good part, send it to Choppa or your DAW. No subs, no cloud. Launch month — 50% off until the end of July!
description_zh: Tide将语音备忘录转化为层次丰富的声音草图。将堆叠的声音录到一盘磁带上——哼唱低音线，在其上打节拍，唱出副歌。波形会在你录制时自行绘制。像黑胶唱片一样擦洗，循环好的部分，发送到Choppa或你的数字音频工作站。无需低音炮，无需云端。发布月——7月底前5折优惠！

name: Basedash Access Controls
tagline: Control exactly who can access your company data
tagline_zh: 精确控制哪些人可以访问贵公司的数据
description: Basedash now has groups and access controls. Bundle users into groups — internal teams, external clients, leadership — and give each one access to exactly what it needs: data sources, MCP servers, dashboards, chats, and automations. Set a group's AI context so the assistant answers differently per audience, and row-level security applies to every question. The right people see the right data.
description_zh: Basedash现在具备群组和访问控制功能。将用户分组——内部团队、外部客户、领导层——并赋予每个群组所需的确切访问权限：数据源、MCP服务器、仪表板、聊天和自动化。设置群组的AI上下文，以便助手根据不同的受众给出不同的回答，并且每个问题都应用行级安全。合适的人看到合适的数据。

name: Clarafy
tagline: Type messy and have it instantly polished
tagline_zh: 输入杂乱无章的内容，并立即将其整理得井井有条
description: Most tools force you to edit. Clarafy is a zero-suggestion chaos translator. Type or dictate a messy stream-of-consciousness, hit a hotkey, and it instantly rewrites perfect text in place. Standout Features: App-Aware: Formats contextually for Gmail, Slack, or ChatGPT. Hold-to-Dictate: Ramble out loud; release to inject polished prose. Tone Matching: Learns and mirrors your unique voice. No suggestions, no underlines. Just one-and-done clarity.
description_zh: 大多数工具都需要你进行编辑。Clarafy是一款零建议的混乱文本翻译器。输入或口述一段杂乱无章的意识流，按下热键，它就会立即在原处重写出一篇完美的文本。突出特点：应用感知：根据上下文为Gmail、Slack或ChatGPT进行格式化。长按口述：大声漫谈；松开即可输入精炼的散文。语气匹配：学习并模仿你独特的声音。无建议，无下划线。只需一次操作，即可获得清晰文本。

name: Cloudskill
tagline: Govern the AI skills your team depends on
tagline_zh: 管理好你的团队所依赖的人工智能技能
description: Bring order to the AI agent skills your team depends on. Cloudskill turns scattered skill files into a managed catalogue in seconds, complete with version control, per-person access policies, and a full audit log. When skills are created or updated, every change is reviewed, approved, and tracked.
description_zh: 为您团队所依赖的AI代理技能带来秩序。Cloudskill能在几秒钟内将分散的技能文件整理成受管理的目录，并配备版本控制、个人访问策略和完整的审计日志。每当创建或更新技能时，所有更改都会经过审查、批准和跟踪。

name: Stella
tagline: Local natural language search across all your files
tagline_zh: 在您的所有文件中进行本地自然语言搜索
description: You know the file exists. Spotlight can't find it. Stella can. Just describe it, "my cheat sheet for the final exam," "the product spec from last week's meeting" and Stella finds it. Then drag it straight into Gmail, open it, or launch any app from the same bar. One shortcut for your whole Mac. Free. Private. No account. Bad filenames welcome.
description_zh: 你知道文件存在，但Spotlight（一种搜索工具）却找不到。而Stella（一种搜索工具）却能找到。只需描述一下文件，“我期末考试的备忘单”，“上周会议的产品规格说明”，Stella就能找到它。然后直接将其拖到Gmail中，打开它，或者从同一栏启动任何应用程序。这是你整个Mac的一个快捷方式。免费。私密。无需账户。欢迎使用糟糕的文件名。

name: memi
tagline: The AI agent harness for product design teams
tagline_zh: 产品设计团队的人工智能代理工具
description: A macOS workbench where Claude, Codex, and Hermes run on your specs, research, and Figma files.
description_zh: 一个macOS工作台，其中Claude、Codex和Hermes可在您的配置、研究资料和Figma文件上运行。

name: Allergo
tagline: Translate your allergies, anywhere.
tagline_zh: 随时随地翻译你的过敏原。
description: Allergo helps you create allergy translation cards for 75+ languages/countries. Add cards to Apple Wallet for quick access anywhere. Features also include conversation helpers and emergency SOS translations, automatically translated to the users location. Designed for real-world use, with localisation across countries. Professional translations, and more native speaker verifications, are coming soon via over-the-air updates. Built for anyone travelling with allergies or dietary restrictions.
description_zh: Allergo可助您创建涵盖75种以上语言/国家的过敏原翻译卡片。将卡片添加至Apple Wallet，随时随地快速访问。功能还包括对话助手和紧急SOS翻译，可自动翻译至用户所在地。专为现实世界使用而设计，支持多国本地化。专业翻译以及更多母语者验证功能，将通过无线更新很快推出。专为有过敏史或饮食限制的旅行者打造。

name: marpy.io
tagline: AI coding platform built specifically for the Python stack
tagline_zh: 专为Python技术栈打造的AI编码平台
description: Marpy is a web-based IDE and AI coding assistant built specifically for the Python stack. It helps you go from idea to deployed app without wrestling infra, glue code, or half-baked JS-focused tools. Get Python-native autocomplete, refactors, and AI-generated modules that actually understand Django, FastAPI, and real-world backends. Marpy lets you prototype, iterate, and ship production-grade Python apps faster, all from your browser.
description_zh: Marpy是一款专为Python技术栈打造的基于网络的集成开发环境（IDE）和人工智能编码助手。它助您从创意到部署应用，无需费力处理基础设施、粘合代码或半成品、以JavaScript为重点的工具。您可获得Python原生自动补全、重构以及人工智能生成的模块，这些模块真正理解Django、FastAPI和现实世界中的后端。Marpy让您能够从浏览器中更快地原型设计、迭代和发布生产级的Python应用。

name: Rixx
tagline: The Perplexity alternative that organizes your research
tagline_zh: “困惑度”这一替代指标，用于整理你的研究
description: AI search engines lie. Rixx doesn't. Search the web and get answers backed by real citations so you can verify every claim, not just trust it. → See data visually with charts and graphs → See images inline with your results → Upload PDFs, docs, and links as context → Multimodal search: text, images, docs together → Organize research into Insights folders Stop guessing. Start knowing.
description_zh: 人工智能搜索引擎会撒谎。Rixx则不会。在网络上搜索，获得有真实引文支持的答案，这样你就能验证每一个说法，而不仅仅是相信它。→ 通过图表和图形直观地查看数据 → 在搜索结果中直接查看图片 → 上传PDF、文档和链接作为上下文 → 多模态搜索：文本、图片、文档一应俱全 → 将研究整理到“见解”文件夹中 停止猜测。开始了解。

name: CueBuddy
tagline: Record talking videos without manual scrolling
tagline_zh: 无需手动滚动即可录制讲话视频
description: CueBuddy is a voice-following teleprompter for iPhone and iPad. It scrolls your script as you speak, so creators can record talking videos, courses, speeches, and vlogs without manually controlling the scrolling speed. When you pause, the script pauses. When you continue, it keeps moving. You can try the core experience in the web demo or use the iOS app for a more complete recording workflow.
description_zh: CueBuddy是一款适用于iPhone和iPad的语音跟随提词器。它会在您说话时自动滚动脚本，因此创作者可以录制对话视频、课程、演讲和视频博客，而无需手动控制滚动速度。当您暂停时，脚本也会暂停。当您继续时，它将继续滚动。您可以在网页演示中体验核心功能，或使用iOS应用程序以获得更完整的录制流程。

name: Boxes.dev
tagline: Run Claude Code and Codex in your own cloud environment
tagline_zh: 在您自己的云环境中运行Claude Code和Codex
description: Cloud dev environments for agentic coding. Run each Claude Code or Codex chat on its own computer in the cloud, connect from mobile and desktop, and code from anywhere.
description_zh: 用于代理编码的云端开发环境。在云端的独立计算机上运行每个Claude Code或Codex聊天，通过移动设备和桌面设备进行连接，并从任何地方进行编码。

name: agentcad
tagline: A CAD design tool for coding agents (free + open source)
tagline_zh: 一个用于编码代理的CAD设计工具（免费+开源）
description: Give your coding agent the ability to design real, manufacturable parts. Hand Claude Code or Codex a prompt, a sketch, or image. It writes build123d or CadQuery scripts, then runs agentcad to check its own work, catching broken code, confirming the geometry is watertight and dimensionally correct, and rendering it from every angle so your agent fixes its mistakes before you ever see them. You get back an interactive viewer plus STEP / STL / GLB files — ready to inspect, edit, or print.
description_zh: 让你的编码代理能够设计出真实且可制造的零件。只需向Claude Code或Codex提供一个提示、草图或图像。它会编写build123d或CadQuery脚本，然后运行agentcad来检查自己的工作，发现错误代码，确认几何形状无泄漏且尺寸正确，并从各个角度进行渲染，这样你的代理就能在你发现错误之前就将其修复。你将会得到一个交互式查看器以及STEP / STL / GLB文件——随时可以检查、编辑或打印。

name: Knock agent for Slack
tagline: Build, manage, and ship customer messaging from Slack
tagline_zh: 在Slack中构建、管理并发送客户消息
description: Knock is the agent-led customer engagement platform for managing all the messages your users receive across channels. After connecting Knock to Slack, simply tag @Knock in any channel, describe what you want, and let the agent work in the background to build campaigns, draft messaging, and update lifecycle workflows. The agent gathers the context from your account, posts progress updates in the thread as it works, and provides a link to the resource when it's ready to review.
description_zh: Knock是一个以代理为主导的客户互动平台，用于管理用户通过不同渠道收到的所有消息。将Knock连接到Slack后，只需在任何渠道中@Knock，描述您的需求，然后让代理在后台构建活动、起草消息并更新生命周期工作流程。代理会从您的账户中收集上下文信息，在工作过程中在对话中发布进度更新，并在资源准备好供审查时提供资源链接。

name: Dualora
tagline: Record in both 16:9 and 9:16 at the same time
tagline_zh: 同时以16:9和9:16两种比例录制
description: Multi-platform creators have a broken workflow: record landscape for YouTube, flip the phone, record again for Shorts. Or record once and spend 20 minutes cropping a second version that still looks off. Dualora fixes this at capture time — not in post. Open the app and you see both 16:9 and 9:16 framing live on screen while you shoot — Split View or Picture-in-Picture. Hit record. Export two files. Upload to two platforms. Done. No guessing. No re-shooting. No desktop detour. No Account.
description_zh: 多平台创作者的工作流程存在缺陷：为YouTube录制横向视频，翻转手机，再为短视频录制一次。或者录制一次后，花20分钟裁剪第二个版本，但看起来仍然有问题。Dualora在拍摄时（而非后期）解决了这个问题。打开应用程序，您会在拍摄时看到屏幕上同时显示16:9和9:16的取景框——分屏视图或画中画。点击录制。导出两个文件。上传到两个平台。完成。无需猜测。无需重拍。无需在电脑上绕弯路。无需账号。

name: Dropmatico
tagline: Drop. Pick. Done.
tagline_zh: 放下。拿起。完成。
description: Dropmatico is the image workflow tool that resizes, compresses, and converts in one pass, across 90+ presets and 34 platforms (Instagram, LinkedIn, X, Snapchat, Substack, Amazon, Etsy, Noon, Flipkart, Shopify, and more). One image, every platform. Or every image, one platform. Either way, one pass.
description_zh: Dropmatico是一款图像工作流程工具，可一次性完成图像的尺寸调整、压缩和转换，支持90多种预设和34个平台（Instagram、LinkedIn、X、Snapchat、Substack、Amazon、Etsy、Noon、Flipkart、Shopify等）。一张图片，适配所有平台。或者所有图片，适配一个平台。无论哪种方式，都只需一次操作。

name: fort
tagline: One command to audit and fix your Mac's security
tagline_zh: 一个命令即可审计并修复你的Mac安全
description: Most Mac security tools need agents, signups, or MDM. fort doesn't. One command checks 15+ security settings: FileVault, SIP, firewall, screen lock, local admin rights, Gatekeeper, SSH, AirDrop and more. Reports a score and fixes most issues automatically. Single binary. No telemetry. MIT licensed. Perfect for developers hardening their own Mac, and for teams preparing for SOC 2 or ISO 27001 without the MDM overhead. brew install djadmin/tap/fort
description_zh: 大多数Mac安全工具都需要代理、注册或移动设备管理（MDM）。但fort不需要。一个命令即可检查15项以上的安全设置：FileVault、SIP、防火墙、屏幕锁定、本地管理员权限、Gatekeeper、SSH、AirDrop等。它会报告一个分数，并自动修复大多数问题。单一二进制文件。无遥测。MIT许可。非常适合开发者强化自己的Mac，也适合准备SOC 2或ISO 27001认证的团队，无需MDM开销。brew install djadmin/tap/fort

name: Cliptop
tagline: Clipboard history for Mac, right under the notch.
tagline_zh: Mac的剪贴板历史记录，就在缺口下方。
description: Cliptop is a fast, local-first clipboard manager for Mac. Open it from the notch or menu bar, search recent copies, preview text, links, code, images, files, and colors, save key items to Pinboards, and paste back without losing focus.
description_zh: Cliptop是一款适用于Mac的快速、以本地为主的剪贴板管理器。您可以从任务栏或菜单栏中打开它，搜索最近的剪贴内容，预览文本、链接、代码、图片、文件和颜色，将关键项目保存到Pinboards，并在不失去焦点的情况下粘贴回来。

name: Lumo Studios
tagline: Build Decks that Speak for Themselves
tagline_zh: 打造能为自己代言的甲板
description: Great ideas deserve great slides. LUMO uses AI to turn your thinking into polished decks instantly, beautifully, and exactly the way you want them. LUMO turns your ideas into beautiful presentations in seconds. Generate slides from a prompt, refine them in the canvas editor, and share with your team - all in one place.
description_zh: 伟大的想法值得配上精美的幻灯片。LUMO利用人工智能，能瞬间将您的想法转化为精美且符合您心意的幻灯片。LUMO能在几秒钟内将您的想法转化为精美的演示文稿。只需根据提示生成幻灯片，在画布编辑器中完善，即可与团队分享——所有操作均可一站式完成。

name: Reader Alive
tagline: Translate, listen to, and ask questions about your ebooks
tagline_zh: 翻译、聆听并就你的电子书提出问题
description: Reader Alive is an AI ebook reader for iPhone and iPad. Import EPUB, PDF, AZW3, and MOBI, then translate chapters, listen with natural text-to-speech, summarize dense sections, and ask questions grounded in the book.
description_zh: Reader Alive是一款适用于iPhone和iPad的AI电子书阅读器。用户可以导入EPUB、PDF、AZW3和MOBI格式的书籍，并对章节进行翻译，通过自然的语音合成功能进行听读，对内容密集的部分进行总结，还可以根据书中的内容提出问题。

name: Owlish
tagline: Reduce support volume with AI agents trained on your docs
tagline_zh: 利用基于您的文档训练的AI代理，减少支持工作量
description: Owlish turns your website, FAQs, docs, and PDFs into an AI customer support agent that answers common questions, cites sources, uses approved replies, and hands off to a human when needed. It helps businesses reduce repetitive support volume, reply faster outside business hours, and give support teams the context they need to resolve harder conversations.
description_zh: Owlish将您的网站、常见问题解答、文档和PDF文件转变为人工智能客户支持代理，该代理能够回答常见问题、引用来源、使用经过批准的回复，并在必要时转交给人工客服。它有助于企业减少重复性的支持工作量，在非工作时间更快地回复客户，并为支持团队提供所需的上下文信息，以解决更复杂的对话。

name: InstaVM
tagline: Instant computers for AI agents
tagline_zh: 用于人工智能代理的即时计算机
description: The production control plane for AI agents. Run agents like production servers: isolated, observable, and controlled. Firecracker microVMs with sub-200ms boot.
description_zh: AI代理的生产控制平面。像生产服务器一样运行代理：隔离、可观察且受控。Firecracker微虚拟机启动时间低于200毫秒。

name: TongueType for macOS
tagline: Local dictation for macOS without the subscription
tagline_zh: 无需订阅即可在macOS上进行本地听写
description: TongueType is a macOS voice dictation app powered by Whisper AI running locally on Apple Silicon. No cloud, no accounts, no subscriptions. Hold a key, speak, release. Your words appear. Supports 12 languages and audio file transcription. TongueType gives you a configurable press-to-talk hotkey, audio and video file transcription, and configurable post-processing rules. It's customizable and fun (try Rainbow Mode!) and it's built to be the fastest dictation workflow possible.
description_zh: TongueType是一款由Whisper AI驱动的macOS语音听写应用，在Apple Silicon上本地运行。无需云服务、无需账户、无需订阅。只需按住一个键，说话，松开即可。你的话语即刻呈现。支持12种语言和音频文件转录。TongueType为您提供可配置的即按即说热键、音频和视频文件转录，以及可配置的后处理规则。它可定制且有趣（试试彩虹模式！），旨在打造最快的听写工作流程。

name: Crew44
tagline: Turn coding agents into specialist teams
tagline_zh: 将编码代理转变为专业团队
description: Crew44 — a crew of specialist AI agents in one local-first workspace. Each role on the model that wins its job, with memory and skills that compound. No account, free, open source.
description_zh: Crew44——一个以本地优先的工作空间中的专业人工智能代理团队。模型中的每个角色都能胜任其工作，具备复合的记忆和技能。无需账户，免费，开源。

name: Zingle
tagline: Learn words in context with AI
tagline_zh: 利用人工智能在语境中学习单词
description: Learn words where they make sense. Read stories and your own content, understand words in context with AI, and remember them through a connected learning loop.
description_zh: 在有意义的语境中学习单词。阅读故事和你自己的内容，通过人工智能理解单词在上下文中的含义，并通过一个互联的学习循环记住它们。

name: GlowPulse
tagline: Your Mac's camera is now a heart-rate sensor
tagline_zh: 你的Mac摄像头现在是一个心率传感器
description: GlowPulse measures your heart rate from your Mac's built-in camera using rPPG – no watch, no chest strap, no wearable. Lives in the menu bar with live BPM, sparkline, and color-coded zones. 100% on-device. Camera frames are processed in memory and discarded. No cloud, no account, no telemetry. Pomodoro focus with live HR chart. Breathing sessions with real-time HRV. 30-second stress check. $2.99 once. macOS 13+.
description_zh: GlowPulse通过Mac内置摄像头使用rPPG技术测量您的心率，无需手表、胸带或可穿戴设备。它位于菜单栏中，实时显示BPM（每分钟心跳次数）、火花线和颜色编码区域。100%设备内处理。摄像头帧在内存中处理后即被丢弃。无需云服务、账户或遥测。配有实时HR图表，可进行番茄工作法专注度测试。提供实时HRV（心率变异性）呼吸训练。30秒压力测试。一次性收费2.99美元。适用于macOS 13+系统。

name: Laguna by Poolside
tagline: Foundation models for agentic coding and long-horizon work
tagline_zh: 用于代理编码和长期工作的基础模型
description: Poolside is a foundation model company bringing intelligence to everywhere work gets done. Their mission is to drive abundance for humanity by creating artificial general intelligence.
description_zh: Poolside是一家基础模型公司，致力于将智能带到任何工作场所。他们的使命是通过创造通用人工智能来推动人类的繁荣。

name: Locofy: design-to-code agents
tagline: Agentic frontend layer between Figma and Cursor & Claude
tagline_zh: Figma与Cursor & Claude之间的代理前端层
description: Locofy is the agentic frontend layer between Figma and Cursor & Claude. Using proprietary design-aware models combined with LLMs, Locofy converts Figma designs into structured, responsive, pixel-perfect frontend code and works directly from the CLI, Cursor, Claude Code, and others. While coding agents excel at logic and iteration, they still struggle with UI precision and Figma structure — Locofy provides the frontend foundation they can reliably build on.
description_zh: Locofy是Figma与Cursor & Claude之间的代理前端层。通过结合专有的设计感知模型与大型语言模型（LLM），Locofy能够将Figma设计转化为结构化、响应式且像素级精准的前端代码，并可直接通过命令行界面（CLI）、Cursor、Claude Code等工具进行操作。尽管编码代理在逻辑和迭代方面表现出色，但在用户界面（UI）精度和Figma结构方面仍存在挑战——而Locofy提供了它们可以信赖的前端基础。

name: R0Y OMNI 1.0
tagline: Generate more accurate investment dashboards and reports
tagline_zh: 生成更精准的投资仪表盘和报告
description: Turning natural language prompts into live, fully functional investing dashboards, faster than Bolt, Lovable & many more. New Omni 1.0 model, outshines the deprecated Atlas model, and is able to generate far greater dashboards. Community section added, to view 100+ pre-generated dashboards & models
description_zh: 将自然语言提示转化为生动、功能齐全的投资仪表板，速度比Bolt、Lovable等更快。全新的Omni 1.0模型超越了已弃用的Atlas模型，能够生成更出色的仪表板。新增社区板块，可查看100多个预生成的仪表板和模型

name: Navi+ Menu Builder
tagline: Add Tab Bar, Mega Menu & more to any website — no code
tagline_zh: 无需代码，即可为任何网站添加标签栏、大型菜单等
description: Most websites lose visitors because navigation is confusing — especially on mobile. Navi+ fixes that in minutes, on any platform. Works everywhere: → Shopify — install from the App Store → WordPress, Wix.. — one embed snippet → Any website with an HTML tag What you get: → Tab Bar, Mega Menu, Slide Menu, FAB, Grid Menu → Feels like a native app on mobile → AI menu design — done in seconds → Zero code, zero conflicts → Starter plan: Free forever 4.9★ on Shopify App Store. 5,000+ merchants.
description_zh: 大多数网站因为导航混乱而失去访客，尤其是在移动设备上。Navi+可在几分钟内解决这一问题，适用于任何平台。适用于所有平台：→ Shopify — 从应用商店安装 → WordPress、Wix等 — 一个嵌入代码片段 → 任何带有HTML标签的网站 您将获得：→ 标签栏、大菜单、滑动菜单、FAB、网格菜单 → 在移动设备上感觉就像原生应用一样 → AI菜单设计 — 几秒钟内完成 → 零代码，零冲突 → 入门计划：Shopify应用商店永久免费4.9★。5000+商家。

name: Solarch
tagline: Interactive diagrams with AI, and your code always in sync
tagline_zh: 与AI交互式图表，让你的代码始终保持同步
description: Solarch is a diagram-to-code platform powered by a strict rules engine. It instantly transforms visual nodes into deterministic boilerplate code like DTOs and Services. We build the repetitive 80% of the architecture so you can code the core logic.
description_zh: Solarch是一个由严格规则引擎驱动的图表转代码平台。它能即时将可视化节点转换为确定的样板代码，如DTO和服务。我们构建了架构中80%的重复性部分，这样你就可以专注于核心逻辑的编码。

name: Sun
tagline: Collaborative voice API for agents
tagline_zh: 代理的协作语音API
description: Sun is a voice first AI model built specifically for real‑time collaborative voice interaction, not just one‑on‑one chat. ChatGPT Realtime and Gemini Live were built for one user talking to AI. Sun is built for collaboration — meetings, group calls, multi-agent debates, classrooms. One API, multi-speaker awareness, 10× the context window.
description_zh: Sun是一款专为实时协作语音交互而打造的语音优先型人工智能模型，而不仅仅是一对一的聊天。ChatGPT Realtime和Gemini Live是为单用户与AI对话而设计的。Sun则专为协作而打造——会议、群组通话、多智能体辩论、教室。一个API，多扬声器感知，10倍的上下文窗口。

name: OwnClip
tagline: Native macOS screen recorder with local-first AI privacy
tagline_zh: 原生macOS屏幕录制工具，本地优先的AI隐私保护
description: A high-performance, native macOS screen recorder built for speed. OwnClip features a strict local-first architecture and on-device AI processing—meaning your recordings, edits, and intelligence workflows happen entirely on your Mac with absolute privacy.
description_zh: 专为速度而打造的高性能原生macOS屏幕录制软件。OwnClip采用严格的本地优先架构和设备内AI处理技术，这意味着您的录制、编辑和智能工作流程完全在Mac上完成，确保绝对隐私。

name: Kept
tagline: Your AI chats, saved as Markdown locally with no cloud
tagline_zh: 你的AI聊天记录，本地保存为Markdown格式，无需云端存储
description: Kept: is an AI chat and productivity tool on your local archive. Captures conversations from ChatGPT, Claude, Gemini, Grok, and Kimi as Obsidian compatible markdown on your filesystem, with full-text search, knowledge graph, and an MCP servers. MIT license. View your Vault locally,
description_zh: Kept：是一款基于本地存档的AI聊天和生产力工具。它能够捕捉来自ChatGPT、Claude、Gemini、Grok和Kimi的对话，并以Obsidian兼容的Markdown格式保存在您的文件系统中，同时提供全文搜索、知识图谱和MCP服务器功能。采用MIT许可协议。您可以在本地查看您的Vault，

name: Zero Assist
tagline: Real-time AI cheating detection for technical interviews
tagline_zh: 技术面试中的实时人工智能作弊检测
description: Detect Parakeet AI, Final Round AI, Cluely & 20+ AI cheating tools in real time. Secure your remote technical interviews with Zero Assist.Zero Assist is a forensic-grade interview monitor that detects AI cheating tools like ChatGPT, Parakeet AI, and Copilot in real time. Deploy a silent agent and get instant alerts on your dashboard if candidates use unauthorized AI assistance.
description_zh: 实时检测Parakeet AI、Final Round AI、Cluely以及20多种其他AI作弊工具。使用Zero Assist保障您的远程技术面试安全。Zero Assist是一款取证级面试监控工具，可实时检测ChatGPT、Parakeet AI和Copilot等AI作弊工具。部署一个静默代理，如果应聘者使用未经授权的AI辅助工具，您将在控制面板上立即收到警报。

name: crunr
tagline: Launch and run any compute job on AWS with 1 command
tagline_zh: 只需一条命令，即可在AWS上启动并运行任何计算任务
description: crunr — run it, ghost it. GPU compute is $1.5/hr. But your real bill looks like this: - Idle time sitting there: $800/mo - Infra team to manage it: $3,000/mo - Failed setups and debugging: days lost - 3am emergency fixes: priceless crunr fixes all of it. $ crunr run train.py --gpu Spins up → runs → terminates. You pay for compute only. Nothing else. No idle bills. No DevOps. No lingering servers. Built for ML researchers, indie AI builders, and startup teams who just want their job to run.
description_zh: crunr — 运行它，让它悄无声息。GPU计算费用为每小时1.5美元。但你真正的账单看起来是这样的： - 闲置时间成本：每月800美元 - 基础设施团队管理费用：每月3000美元 - 失败的设置和调试：损失的天数 - 凌晨3点的紧急修复：无价之宝 crunr解决了所有这些问题。只需输入$ crunr run train.py --gpu，即可启动→运行→终止。你只需支付计算费用。没有其他费用。没有闲置账单。没有DevOps。没有闲置的服务器。专为机器学习研究人员、独立AI构建者和只想让工作运行的初创团队打造。

name: Selector Forge
tagline: Browser extension for AI-generated resilient selectors
tagline_zh: 用于AI生成弹性选择器的浏览器扩展程序
description: Browser extension to create reliable CSS and XPath selectors using AI. You can use it to create a selector for a single element or for an array of elements. The selectors it creates are meant to be "semantic" and more resilient to page changes! Extension is also open source on GitHub: https://github.com/Intuned/selector-forge
description_zh: 一款利用人工智能创建可靠CSS和XPath选择器的浏览器扩展程序。您可以使用它为单个元素或一组元素创建选择器。它创建的选择器具有“语义性”，对页面变化更具弹性！该扩展程序也在GitHub上开源：https://github.com/Intuned/selector-forge

name: MediaSeg
tagline: Split large media files into upload-ready chunks on macOS
tagline_zh: 在macOS上将大型媒体文件分割成可上传的块
description: MediaSeg is a local macOS utility that splits large media files into upload-ready chunks while preserving quality. It was produced and directed with full AI assistance, and shipped in 2 days from idea to public release. Originally created to streamline long-recording upload prep, MediaSeg is useful for NotebookLM and other size-limited upload destinations.
description_zh: MediaSeg是一款本地macOS实用工具，能在保持质量的前提下，将大型媒体文件分割成可上传的小块。该工具在制作和指导过程中得到了全面的人工智能辅助，从构思到公开发布仅用时2天。MediaSeg最初是为简化长录音上传准备而创建的，对于NotebookLM和其他有大小限制的上传目的地而言，它非常有用。

name: Forum
tagline: Dedicated space for Facebook groups
tagline_zh: Facebook群组的专用空间
description: Forum is a standalone Facebook app for Groups, built around deeper discussions, real answers, and communities you care about. It syncs your Facebook groups, lets you post with a nickname, and adds AI Ask plus admin tools for group owners.
description_zh: Forum是一款独立的Facebook群组应用，旨在促进更深入的讨论、真实的回答以及你关心的社区。它能同步你的Facebook群组，允许你使用昵称发帖，并为群主添加了AI Ask以及管理工具。

name: Recursi
tagline: Self improving vibe coding env with no API fees
tagline_zh: 自我提升的氛围编码环境，无API费用
description: An extremely powerful environment for vibe coding, allowing you to use web based chatbots (Claude/Gemini via aistudio/ChatGPT, etc) extremely efficiently while staying firmly in their terms of service. A whole lot of apps are provided as samples / templates, including a YouTube playlist app that not only allows a great YouTube experience without ads (also within terms of service!), but "Guitar Hero for piano" that works with a MIDI piano. So much more.
description_zh: 这是一个极其强大的氛围编码环境，让您能够高效地使用基于网络的聊天机器人（如通过aistudio/ChatGPT使用的Claude/Gemini等），同时严格遵守其服务条款。该环境提供了大量应用程序作为示例/模板，包括一个YouTube播放列表应用程序，该应用程序不仅提供了无广告的优质YouTube体验（同样符合服务条款！），还有与MIDI钢琴配合使用的“钢琴版吉他英雄”。功能远不止这些。

name: LocIn AI
tagline: Localize your app with tone-aware AI, automated workflows
tagline_zh: 利用具备语调感知的AI和自动化工作流程，对您的应用进行本地化
description: Translate your app with tone-aware AI, automated localization workflows, CLI integration, and instant API access. Launch globally while keeping your brand voice consistent across every language.
description_zh: 利用支持语调识别的AI、自动化的本地化工作流程、CLI集成和即时API访问来翻译您的应用程序。在全球范围内发布，同时确保您的品牌声音在每种语言中保持一致。

name: Basedash: Embedded Analytics
tagline: Give customers AI analytics inside your product.
tagline_zh: 在你的产品中为客户提供人工智能分析功能。
description: Basedash Embedding puts the full power of Basedash inside your own product. Drop a dashboard in with one iframe, or embed the whole app so your customers can chat with the AI agent, build their own dashboards, and get automatic insights — without ever leaving you. Row-level security scopes every customer to their own data, and customization controls decide exactly which features they see. Setup is one iframe and a JWT. Analytics, inside your product. Scoped to every customer.
description_zh: Basedash嵌入式技术将Basedash的全部功能融入您自己的产品中。只需一个iframe即可嵌入仪表板，或嵌入整个应用程序，这样您的客户就可以与AI代理聊天，构建自己的仪表板，并获得自动洞察——无需离开您。行级安全机制确保每位客户只能访问自己的数据，而自定义控件则可精确决定他们能看到哪些功能。设置仅需一个iframe和一个JWT。分析功能嵌入您的产品中。每位客户都有其特定的分析范围。

name: Krater
tagline: All the AI tools you use, one subscription
tagline_zh: 你使用的所有AI工具，只需一个订阅
description: Krater turns AI from something you try into something you use. Every AI model, every modality, every app you use, combined into one chat and driven by one agent. Tell it what you need in plain language and it gets it done; whatever you're building, studying, running or creating. The same agent that chats with you can generate an image, edit a video, produce a song, automate your apps, and publish a full website, all in one flow. 70K+ users. API access. Replaces $100+/mo in subscriptions.
description_zh: Krater将人工智能从你尝试的东西变成你使用的东西。你使用的每一个AI模型、每一种形式、每一个应用程序，都融合到一个聊天中，并由一个代理驱动。用通俗易懂的语言告诉它你需要什么，它就会完成；无论你在构建、研究、运行还是创造什么。与你聊天的同一个代理可以生成图像、编辑视频、创作歌曲、自动化你的应用程序，并发布一个完整的网站，所有这些都在一个流程中完成。拥有7万多名用户。提供API访问。取代每月100美元以上的订阅费用。

name: Typerino
tagline: Screenwriting and playwriting for movies, television, stage.
tagline_zh: 电影、电视和舞台剧的剧本创作。
description: Industry-standard screenwriting and stage-play formatting for feature, television, and stage. No Markdown, no syntax: what you type is what gets exported. Mac and Windows. Free 14-day trial, then $11.99/mo, or $99/year.
description_zh: 适用于电影、电视和舞台剧的行业标准剧本撰写和舞台剧排版格式。无需使用Markdown或任何语法：您输入的内容即为您导出内容。支持Mac和Windows系统。提供14天免费试用，之后每月11.99美元，或每年99美元。

name: Pixlie
tagline: AI video studio: text & image to video, with real control
tagline_zh: AI视频工作室：文字与图片转视频，实现真实控制
description: Pixlie is an AI video studio for creators who want control—not a black-box generator. Browse your library, queue jobs in the cloud, and track renders in the app. Same account on pixlys.com and iOS.What makes it different: Text2Video, Image2Video, library & cloud queue Granular creative workflow not just “type and pray” Live on iOS App Store; Google play web at pixlys.com -Built solo by a refugee founder in Helsinki shipped fast, iterated in production
description_zh: Pixlie是一个专为希望掌控创作过程的创作者打造的人工智能视频工作室，而非一个黑箱生成器。您可以在应用中浏览自己的库、在云端排队任务并跟踪渲染进度。您在pixlys.com和iOS上的账户是通用的。其独特之处在于：Text2Video、Image2Video、库和云端队列。精细化的创作流程，而非简单的“输入即祈祷”。该应用已在iOS应用商店上线；在pixlys.com上可通过Google Play网页版访问。由赫尔辛基的一名难民创始人独立开发，发布迅速，并在生产中不断迭代

name: Microsoft MAI-Voice-2
tagline: Expressive TTS with voice cloning in 15 languages
tagline_zh: 15种语言的语音克隆表达式文本转语音（TTS）
description: Microsoft's most expressive TTS model yet — voice cloning from short samples, fine-grained emotional control, and consistent voice identity across 15 languages. Now live in Azure AI Foundry at $22 per million characters, with integrations rolling out in VSCode, Dynamics 365 Contact Center, and Teams. For builders shipping voice agents who need production-grade prosody without the OpenAI Realtime API price tag.
description_zh: 微软迄今为止最具表现力的TTS模型——通过短样本实现语音克隆，具备精细的情感控制能力，并在15种语言中保持一致的语音特性。现已在Azure AI Foundry上线，每百万字符22美元，并将在VSCode、Dynamics 365 Contact Center和Teams中推出集成功能。面向那些需要生产级韵律而无需OpenAI Realtime API高昂价格的语音代理构建者。

name: Ente Locker
tagline: Shared vault for your most important documents
tagline_zh: 共享保管库，存放您最重要的文件
description: Most storage apps are incredibly complex and built for you while you're alive. But what happens after? Ente Locker is built for transmission of your important documents, passwords and notes. Add your loved ones as trusted contacts — for when your spouse needs the property deed and you're not around to send it. Locker is end-to-end encrypted and open source, so your information remains truly yours.
description_zh: 大多数存储应用都极其复杂，并且是在你活着的时候为你打造的。但之后呢？Ente Locker 是专为传输你的重要文件、密码和笔记而打造的。你可以将你爱的人添加为信任联系人——以防你的配偶需要房产契约而你不在身边无法发送时使用。Locker 是端到端加密且开源的，因此你的信息真正属于你。

name: Agent Browser Shield
tagline: Block prompt inject & cut token costs for AI browser agents
tagline_zh: 阻止提示注入并降低AI浏览器代理的令牌成本
description: AI agents browsing the web have a problem: they read everything — cookie banners, hidden instructions, dark patterns — and can't tell real content from a trap. Agent Browser Shield sits between your agent and the web, stripping prompt injections, masking PII, removing dark patterns, and filtering page noise that burns tokens. Free, source-available, works with browser-use and Browserbase.
description_zh: 人工智能代理在浏览网页时面临一个问题：它们会读取所有内容——Cookie横幅、隐藏指令、暗模式——并且无法区分真实内容和陷阱。Agent Browser Shield位于您的代理和网络之间，可剥离提示注入、屏蔽个人身份信息、移除暗模式，并过滤会消耗令牌的页面噪声。该产品免费、开源，适用于浏览器使用和Browserbase。

name: Basedash Semantic Layer
tagline: Define metrics once. Use them everywhere.
tagline_zh: 一次性定义指标，在所有地方使用。
description: The Basedash semantic layer lets teams create reusable SQL metrics and models that AI can reference across chat, charts, dashboards, insights, and automations.
description_zh: Basedash语义层允许团队创建可复用的SQL指标和模型，以便人工智能能够在聊天、图表、仪表板、洞察和自动化中引用。

name: Kim Personal Health Assistant
tagline: The intelligence layer for Apple Health
tagline_zh: Apple Health的智能层
description: Meet Kim, a personal health assistant that turns your health data into simple conversations and personal experiments, helping you understand what actually works for your body. Kim becomes more personalized the more data you provide.
description_zh: 来认识一下Kim，她是一位个人健康助手，能将你的健康数据转化为简单的对话和个人实验，帮助你了解什么对你的身体真正有效。你提供的数据越多，Kim就会变得越个性化。

name: Proxee
tagline: Your localhost on your phone, synced.
tagline_zh: 您手机上的本地主机已同步。
description: Proxee turns your phone into a dedicated mobile UI preview monitor for local development. Unlike browser emulators or tools like BrowserSync, it's a native macOS menu bar app with QR pairing, automatic reconnection, bidirectional sync (navigation, scroll, theme), SSR-safe proxying and support for auth flows including OAuth redirects. It's zero-config, framework-agnostic, 100% local, and includes a native iOS companion for a seamless real-device testing workflow.
description_zh: Proxee可将您的手机转变为专用的移动UI预览监视器，用于本地开发。与浏览器模拟器或BrowserSync等工具不同，它是一款原生macOS菜单栏应用程序，具有QR码配对、自动重新连接、双向同步（导航、滚动、主题）、服务器端渲染（SSR）安全代理以及支持包括OAuth重定向在内的身份验证流程。它无需配置、框架无关、100%本地化，并包含一个原生iOS配套应用程序，以实现无缝的真实设备测试工作流程。

name: oioi
tagline: a fast, glassy clipboard manager for macOS, Windows & Linux
tagline_zh: 适用于macOS、Windows和Linux的快速、简洁的剪贴板管理器
description: Press ⌥V and your clipboard history floats up in real liquid glass. Text, images and files, searchable. Free & open source for macOS, Windows and Linux.
description_zh: 按下⌥V，你的剪贴板历史记录就会以真正的液态玻璃的形式浮现在眼前。文本、图片和文件，均可搜索。适用于macOS、Windows和Linux的免费开源软件。

name: DCP
tagline: Give your AI agents encrypted permission and keys
tagline_zh: 为你的AI代理提供加密权限和密钥
description: Today, many agents read keys and sensitive info from dotenv files, configs, or memory. One bad prompt or compromised tool can drain your wallet, API bill, or private data. DCP makes agents safe for real work: your wallets and API keys stay encrypted on your own machine. Give each agent only the scopes it needs; it asks, you approve from Telegram or App. Daily budgets, logs, and instant revoke keep you in control. Open source, non-custodial, and works with Claude, Cursor, OpenClaw, and Hermes.
description_zh: 如今，许多代理从dotenv文件、配置文件或内存中读取密钥和敏感信息。一个错误的提示或被入侵的工具就可能耗尽你的钱包、API账单或私人数据。DCP使代理能够安全地执行实际工作：你的钱包和API密钥在你的设备上保持加密状态。仅向每个代理授予其所需的作用域；它提出请求，你通过Telegram或App进行批准。每日预算、日志和即时撤销功能让你保持控制。开源、非托管，且兼容Claude、Cursor、OpenClaw和Hermes。

name: GhostSnap
tagline: Multiple screenshots - Single paste - Auto compressed for AI
tagline_zh: 多张截图 - 单次粘贴 - 自动压缩以供AI使用
description: Taking multiple screenshots & pasting one by one, to share context with AI or any apps? Every image eats tokens or makes file larger. GhostSnap fixes that. Snap multiple screenshots → auto-compressed up to 80% & copied to clipboard the moment they're taken → paste everything at once with a single Cmd+V. Also: · Extract text from multiple screenshots into one clean block · Annotate before you paste · All via native Mac shortcuts One-time $6.99 (for two macs). Lives in your menu bar.
description_zh: 需要多次截图并逐一粘贴，以便与人工智能或其他应用分享上下文？每张图片都会消耗代币或使文件变大。GhostSnap解决了这个问题。截图多张图片→自动压缩高达80%并在截图后立即复制到剪贴板→只需一个Cmd+V即可一次性粘贴所有内容。此外：·从多张截图提取文本到一个整洁的区块·在粘贴前进行注释·所有操作均通过Mac原生快捷键完成一次性购买6.99美元（适用于两台Mac）。它位于您的菜单栏中。

name: KugelAudio
tagline: Real-time text-to-speech model you can self-host
tagline_zh: 您可以自行部署的实时文本转语音模型
description: Most natural real-time TTS with voice cloning and sub-60ms latency, on-prem or via API. Grammar-aware normalization reads phone numbers, IBANs, addresses, and medications naturally across 25+ languages, with word-level timestamps and IPA support. Adapters for LiveKit, Pipecat, and Vapi. Built by 4 in Berlin.
description_zh: 大多数自然实时文本转语音（TTS）功能，支持语音克隆和低于60毫秒的延迟，可本地部署或通过API实现。语法感知标准化功能可自然地朗读25种以上语言的电话号码、国际银行账号（IBAN）、地址和药物名称，并提供单词级时间戳和国际音标（IPA）支持。适配LiveKit、Pipecat和Vapi。由柏林的4 in公司打造。

name: Vidrunner
tagline: Publish YouTube videos faster with AI
tagline_zh: 利用人工智能更快地发布YouTube视频
description: Generate accurate YouTube timestamps, keyword-rich tags, and Amazon product links from any video. Paste a URL, pick what you need, copy and paste into YouTube. Start free.
description_zh: 从任何视频中生成准确的YouTube时间戳、关键词丰富的标签和亚马逊产品链接。只需粘贴一个网址，选择您需要的内容，然后复制粘贴到YouTube即可。免费试用。

name: Clawd
tagline: A context-aware browser mascot with 100% local offline AI
tagline_zh: 一个具备100%本地离线AI功能的情境感知浏览器吉祥物
description: Meet Clawd, the context-aware browser pet that truly understands your vibe. Clawd crawls your screen, reacts to website sentiment, and levels up to unlock 140+ animations. He’s more than just a mascot. Use the new voice-enabled Chat to talk to him in custom personas (Sarcastic, Gen Z), complete with Markdown support and text-to-speech! Best of all? It’s 100% offline and privacy-first. Your data never leaves your machine. Clawd is your ultimate browsing companion!
description_zh: 来认识一下Clawd吧，这是一款能感知上下文的浏览器宠物，它能真正理解你的喜好。Clawd会在你的屏幕上爬行，对网站情绪做出反应，并通过升级解锁140多种动画。它不仅仅是一个吉祥物。使用全新的语音聊天功能，你可以用自定义角色（如讽刺风、Z世代）与他对话，还支持Markdown格式和文本转语音功能！最棒的是？它100%离线运行，且以隐私为先。你的数据永远不会离开你的设备。Clawd是你终极的浏览伴侣！

name: Glia
tagline: Local-first AI memory bridge between browser chats and IDEs
tagline_zh: 浏览器聊天与集成开发环境（IDE）之间的本地优先的人工智能记忆桥
description: Glia is a 100% offline, open-source memory bridge. A Chrome extension auto-saves your web-based Claude/ChatGPT chats, while a native MCP server lets Cursor/Claude Code query those decisions locally from your shared SQLite database.
description_zh: Glia是一个完全离线、开源的记忆桥。Chrome扩展程序会自动保存您基于网络的Claude/ChatGPT聊天内容，而本地MCP服务器则允许Cursor/Claude Code从您共享的SQLite数据库中本地查询这些决策。

name: FluidDocs Deck Builder
tagline: Turn a prompt into a real HTML deck
tagline_zh: 将提示转化为真正的HTML幻灯片
description: Deck Builder turns one sentence into a real, editable HTML deck: a single web page you change right in the browser (press E) and download as your own file. The difference from other AI deck tools: it is not a static PDF, not a doc chopped into slides, and not locked in an app. Already have a deck? Drop in a PDF or PowerPoint, and it rebuilds that as editable HTML too. Free and open source.
description_zh: Deck Builder能将一句话转化为一个真实的、可编辑的HTML演示文稿：一个您可以直接在浏览器中更改（按E键）并下载为自己文件的网页。与其他AI演示文稿工具的不同之处在于：它不是静态的PDF，不是被分割成幻灯片的doc文件，也不局限于某个应用程序。已经有演示文稿了？只需导入一个PDF或PowerPoint文件，它也能将其重新构建为可编辑的HTML。免费且开源。

name: NODUS PH Radar for Product Hunt
tagline: Product Hunt analytics beyond the daily leaderboard
tagline_zh: Product Hunt 每日排行榜之外的分析
description: NODUS PH Radar helps makers analyze Product Hunt launches beyond the daily rankings. Explore launch velocity, race dynamics, watch rules, community spotlight opportunities, historical patterns, and upcoming scheduled launches. Gain context before launch day and understand what drives visibility and engagement.
description_zh: NODUS PH Radar助力制造商分析Product Hunt上的产品发布，超越每日排名。探索发布速度、竞争动态、观看规则、社区聚焦机会、历史模式以及即将到来的计划发布。在发布日之前获取背景信息，了解是什么推动了知名度和参与度。

name: Dropstone 1.5
tagline: 2× Claude Code Pro's usage at $15/mo
tagline_zh: 2个Claude Code Pro的使用，每月15美元
description: Dropstone 1.5 is our monthly re-baseline release. We test the top AI coding models every month and rebuild the runtime on whichever wins. This month: DeepSeek V4 Flash, V4 Pro, and Moonshot Kimi K2.6 all hosted in the US, nothing stored on our side. $15/month gets you about 450 deep coding sessions a week. Roughly twice what Claude Code Pro delivers at $20. Full technical report with the cost math and benchmarks: blankline.org/research/dropstone-1-5
description_zh: Dropstone 1.5是我们每月的重新基线版本。我们每个月都会测试最顶尖的AI编码模型，并在获胜者上重建运行时环境。本月测试的模型包括：DeepSeek V4 Flash、V4 Pro和Moonshot Kimi K2.6，这些模型均托管在美国，我们不存储任何数据。每月15美元，您每周可以获得约450次深度编码会话。这大约是Claude Code Pro（20美元）的两倍。有关成本计算和基准测试的完整技术报告，请访问：blankline.org/research/dropstone-1-5

name: ReleaseDock
tagline: AI support agent, help center & changelogs in a single inbox
tagline_zh: AI支持代理、帮助中心和更新日志，一应俱全
description: Your team should be building your product not the support infrastructure around it. ReleaseDock provides a unified support inbox, a support agent that can not only answer questions but also take action. A hosted help center and changelog. And a widget that embeds right into your website with announcements, support, etc. P.S. ReleaseDock is currently offering a Lifetime Deal for founding memebers!
description_zh: 你的团队应该专注于开发产品本身，而不是围绕产品构建支持基础设施。ReleaseDock提供了一个统一的支持收件箱、一个不仅能回答问题还能采取行动的支持代理、一个托管式帮助中心和更新日志，以及一个可直接嵌入你网站的组件，用于发布公告、提供支持等。附言：ReleaseDock目前为创始成员提供终身优惠！

name: motionvid.ai
tagline: Your AI Motion & Video Editor
tagline_zh: 您的人工智能动作与视频编辑器
description: Your AI Motion & Video Editor Generate animated videos with narration and music in minutes — no design skills needed.
description_zh: 您的人工智能动作与视频编辑器 几分钟内即可生成带有旁白和音乐的动画视频——无需设计技能。

name: Emily by Co-Desk
tagline: Voice AI copilot for coworking & coliving operators
tagline_zh: 面向共享办公与共享居住运营商的语音AI副驾驶
description: Emily is the voice assistant inside Co-Desk, now in public beta. She lives on your phone and knows your workspace. Ask about today's arrivals or overdue invoices. Tell her to book a room for a member. She prepares it as a card, you tap Confirm. Voice proposes, you confirm, always two steps. Built for operators who don't sit at a desk: walking a tour, setting up an event, turning over a room. Hands busy, phone in pocket, Emily ready.
description_zh: 艾米丽是Co-Desk内置的语音助手，现已推出公测版。她就在你的手机上，了解你的工作空间。询问今天的到货情况或逾期发票。告诉她为会员预订房间。她以卡片的形式准备，你只需点击确认。语音提出建议，你进行确认，总是两步操作。专为不坐在办公桌前的操作人员打造：巡视、布置活动、打扫房间。手忙脚乱时，手机在口袋里，艾米丽随时待命。

name: Novi Notes 1.1
tagline: A local AI memory layer for your Mac
tagline_zh: 专为你的Mac打造的本地AI内存层
description: Novi is your Mac's AI memory layer — a fast block editor for daily notes, docs, and post-its. Claude, Codex, or Gemini read and write your notes directly through MCP. No API keys, no cloud, no setup. New in 1.1 — AI Skills: turn a repeated prompt into a one-click slash command. Write it in Markdown, deploy to Claude Code, Codex, or Gemini. Plus GitHub backup and Markdown reading modes. Local-only. One-time purchase. No subscription.
description_zh: Novi 是您 Mac 的 AI 记忆层 —— 一款用于日常笔记、文档和便签的快速区块编辑器。Claude、Codex 或 Gemini 可直接通过 MCP 读写您的笔记。无需 API 密钥、无需云服务、无需设置。1.1 新增功能 — AI 技能：将重复提示转换为一键斜杠命令。以 Markdown 格式编写，部署到 Claude Code、Codex 或 Gemini。此外还有 GitHub 备份和 Markdown 阅读模式。仅限本地使用。一次性购买。无需订阅。

name: Spantop: Laptop Display Extender
tagline: Turn any Mac/Android Tablet into a real extended monitor
tagline_zh: 将任何Mac/安卓平板电脑变成真正的扩展显示器
description: Hey 👋 Spantop turns any spare Mac or Android tablet into a wired/wireless extended for your Mac. Use a second Mac or Android tablet as a HiDPI monitor over Wi-Fi, Thunderbolt, or USB-C. Powered by LZ4 for near-zero-latency streaming, with your screen staying local. Sidecar only works with iPads. Spantop works with Macs and Android tablets too. Free forever. Feedback welcome!
description_zh: 嘿👋 Spantop可以将任何闲置的Mac或安卓平板电脑转变为Mac的有线/无线扩展设备。通过Wi-Fi、Thunderbolt或USB-C，将第二台Mac或安卓平板电脑用作HiDPI显示器。它采用LZ4技术，实现近乎零延迟的流媒体播放，同时屏幕内容保持本地化。Sidecar仅适用于iPad。Spantop也适用于Mac和安卓平板电脑。永久免费。欢迎提供反馈！

name: Gather
tagline: Save it once, never lose it again
tagline_zh: 保存一次，永不丢失
description: Easily find any design references! Gather is your second brain for visual inspiration — save screenshots, photos, and links, then search them the way you'd describe them to a friend: "that muted retro car ad."
description_zh: 轻松找到任何设计参考！Gather是您获取视觉灵感的得力助手——保存截图、照片和链接，然后像向朋友描述一样进行搜索：“那张柔和复古的汽车广告。”

name: Voice Calls in Chatwoot
tagline: Calls, chats, and emails all in one support inbox
tagline_zh: 电话、聊天和电子邮件，全部整合到一个支持收件箱中
description: Chatwoot Voice has everything your support team needs to handle customer calls without leaving the inbox: browser-based calling, inbound and outbound phone support, Twilio Voice integration, WhatsApp calling support, call recordings, transcripts, AI summaries, call history, and customer context in one conversation thread.
description_zh: Chatwoot Voice 具备客服团队处理客户来电所需的一切功能，无需离开收件箱：基于浏览器的通话功能、呼入和呼出电话支持、Twilio Voice 集成、WhatsApp 通话支持、通话录音、通话记录、AI 摘要、通话历史记录以及一个会话线程中的客户上下文信息。

name: CircadiaOS
tagline: Sleep optimization, minus the $3,000 mattress pod
tagline_zh: 优化睡眠，无需花费3000美元购买床垫舱
description: CircadiaOS is software-only sleep optimization. No mattress pod, no proprietary sensor, no new hardware. It connects the wearable and smart thermostat you already own, builds a personalized overnight temperature schedule from your biometrics, and runs your thermostat through it automatically every night. Most premium sleep tech in this category has been hardware-first: thousand-dollar mattress pods, dedicated sensors, custom firmware. We took the opposite bet.
description_zh: CircadiaOS是一款纯软件的睡眠优化产品。无需床垫舱、专用传感器或新硬件。它连接您已有的可穿戴设备和智能恒温器，根据您的生物特征数据构建个性化的夜间温度计划，并让您的恒温器每晚自动执行该计划。这一类别中的大多数高端睡眠技术都是以硬件为先：价值数千美元的床垫舱、专用传感器、定制固件。而我们则选择了相反的方向。

name: Contextberg
tagline: Turn your work into AI agent memory, served over MCP
tagline_zh: 将你的工作转化为AI代理记忆，通过MCP提供服务
description: Contextberg is a local memory app for AI agents. It watches your screens, browser history, and agent conversations in the background — so Claude Code, Cursor, and friends can just remember.
description_zh: Contextberg是一款面向人工智能代理的本地记忆应用。它会在后台监控你的屏幕、浏览器历史记录和代理对话，这样Claude Code、Cursor和朋友们就能记住一切。

name: baz.studio
tagline: Skills library & video editor for AI Agents
tagline_zh: AI智能体的技能库与视频编辑工具
description: Baz Studio is an AI-native video production platform for humans and AI agents. Today we’re launching Skills: the world’s largest library of open-source video workflows for AI. Turn pitch decks into videos, codebases into launch videos, and blog posts into content series. Run Baz directly inside Claude, Codex, or any AI coding agent using the CLI, and watch full video productions appear inside the Baz Studio web UI.
description_zh: Baz Studio是一个面向人类和人工智能代理的AI原生视频制作平台。今天，我们推出了Skills：世界上最大的开源视频工作流程库，专为人工智能打造。将演示文稿转化为视频，将代码库转化为发布视频，将博客文章转化为内容系列。使用命令行界面（CLI）直接在Claude、Codex或任何人工智能编码代理中运行Baz，即可在Baz Studio网页用户界面中观看完整的视频作品。

name: Notchy
tagline: Mac dynamic island with music, timers, clipboard, file drops
tagline_zh: Mac动态岛，集音乐、计时器、剪贴板和文件拖放功能于一体
description: Notchy is the free, native macOS notch app that turns your MacBook notch into a fluid Dynamic Island — music, timers, clipboard, file drops, cluely, HUDs.
description_zh: Notchy是一款免费的原生macOS缺口应用，可将你的MacBook缺口转变为流畅的动态岛——音乐、计时器、剪贴板、文件拖放、cluely、HUDs。

name: Vibedock
tagline: Toggle Claude Code MCP servers from your menu bar
tagline_zh: 从菜单栏切换Claude Code MCP服务器
description: Every MCP server you have configured injects its tool definitions into your context window on every single message — whether you use it that session or not. Vibedock sits in your macOS menu bar and lets you toggle MCPs on and off in one click. It automatically kills and relaunches your Claude sessions so the change actually takes effect.
description_zh: 您配置的每个MCP服务器都会在每条消息上将其工具定义注入到您的上下文窗口中——无论您是否在该会话中使用它。Vibedock位于您的macOS菜单栏中，只需一键即可打开或关闭MCP。它会自动终止并重新启动您的Claude会话，以确保更改真正生效。

name: Moxie Docs
tagline: Living docs + MCP context for your GitHub repos
tagline_zh: 为您的GitHub存储库提供实时文档和MCP上下文
description: Moxie Docs indexes your GitHub repo once, then puts that understanding where the work happens: repo context inside your AI agents over MCP, a searchable docs workspace, and PR checks that keep documentation honest.
description_zh: Moxie Docs会一次性为您的GitHub仓库建立索引，然后将对仓库的理解应用于工作发生的地方：通过MCP在您的AI代理中建立仓库上下文，这是一个可搜索的文档工作区，以及进行拉式请求（PR）检查，以确保文档的准确性。

name: Paint By JSON | Figma API Client
tagline: Real API data in your mockups made as easy as lorem ipsum.
tagline_zh: 您的原型中的真实API数据就像lorem ipsum一样简单易得。
description: A Figma plugin that binds layers to live REST endpoints. Paste a URL, map JSON paths to layer names, save the recipe as a Palette, and apply it to any frame. Design with real data instead of lorem ipsum.
description_zh: 一个Figma插件，可将图层绑定到实时REST端点。粘贴一个URL，将JSON路径映射到图层名称，将此配方保存为调色板，然后将其应用于任何框架。使用真实数据而非Lorem Ipsum进行设计。

name: Signal Recorder SR-7
tagline: On-device voice recorder that transcribes + exports Markdown
tagline_zh: 设备内置录音机，可转录并导出Markdown格式
description: Privacy-first voice recorder for Mac and iPhone. Transcripts and AI summaries run on-device via Apple Speech and FoundationModels — no server, no account, nothing leaving your machine. Every recording exports as a Markdown file with YAML frontmatter — yours, on disk, ready for Obsidian or git. A built-in local MCP server lets Claude Code and other AI tools query the archive.
