Designed experience-first, to keep you in the moment. $7.99, buy once — Mac and iPhone, no subscription.
description_zh: 适用于Mac和iPhone的隐私优先录音机。通过Apple Speech和FoundationModels在设备上运行转录文本和AI摘要——无需服务器、无需账户，所有内容都不会离开您的设备。每段录音都会导出为带有YAML frontmatter的Markdown文件——属于您，保存在磁盘上，随时可用于Obsidian或git。内置的本地MCP服务器允许Claude Code和其他AI工具查询存档。以体验为先的设计，让您沉浸在当下。7.99美元，购买一次——适用于Mac和iPhone，无需订阅。

name: Genie Mentions
tagline: AI that gets you *and* the people in your life, together
tagline_zh: 能让你和你生活中的人紧密相连的人工智能
description: Genie was built on the belief that to truly "get" you, a meaningful social product must also "get" the people in your life. introducing Genie Mentions: the first AI that treats your circle as part of who you are. your taste. your friends' taste. what you're all into. Genie keeps you updated on big moves your friends are making, trips they’re taking, dreams they’re conjuring. if you want AI for work, ChatGPT awaits you. if you want to know what's going on in your world, tag Genie in.
description_zh: Genie的创立基于这样一个信念：要想真正“了解”你，一个有意义的社交产品也必须“了解”你生活中的人。Genie介绍：第一个将你的社交圈视为你自身、你的品味、你朋友的品味以及你们共同兴趣所在的人工智能。Genie会让你了解朋友们的重大举措、他们的旅行经历以及他们心中的梦想。如果你需要工作上的人工智能助手，ChatGPT随时待命。如果你想知道世界上正在发生什么，请@Genie。

name: TrackNotch
tagline: LLM usage tracking that lives in your Mac's notch
tagline_zh: Mac 屏幕顶部显示 LLM 使用情况跟踪
description: TrackNotch is a native macOS app that shows Claude, OpenAI, Cursor, and Codex usage right in your notch. Context arc, budget tracking, rate limits and all local. No proxies, no telemetry, nothing leaves your machine. Free and open-source.
description_zh: TrackNotch是一款原生macOS应用，它能在你的Notch中直接显示Claude、OpenAI、Cursor和Codex的使用情况。上下文弧度、预算跟踪、速率限制以及所有本地信息，一应俱全。无代理、无遥测，不会在您的设备上留下任何痕迹。免费且开源。

name: Medicyn
tagline: Your complete medical history privately on your device
tagline_zh: 您完整的病历，私密地保存在您的设备上
description: The only health app that keeps your medical history completely private—on your device, offline, with no accounts or tracking. Store your complete health record: conditions, medications, prescriptions, allergies, lab reports, surgeries, and more. Scan documents with AI, track symptoms, set reminders, and manage up to 6 family members. 7-day free trial. Then pay once, use forever—no subscriptions, no ads. Your health. Your data. Your control.
description_zh: 唯一一款让您的医疗历史完全保密的健康应用——在您的设备上，离线使用，无需账户或追踪。存储您的完整健康记录：病情、用药、处方、过敏史、化验报告、手术史等。使用人工智能扫描文档，追踪症状，设置提醒，并管理多达6名家庭成员的信息。7天免费试用。之后只需支付一次费用，即可永久使用——无订阅，无广告。您的健康，您的数据，由您掌控。

name: Trovelo
tagline: Plan and track your trips privately
tagline_zh: 私密地规划并追踪您的行程
description: Trovelo is a private trip planner for iPhone and Mac — no accounts, no servers, no subscription. Built by a solo traveler with 40+ countries of experience frustrated with every existing app. Plan day by day with smart cards, type naturally and the app figures it out, track expenses in dual currency, optimize your route, and sync privately via iCloud. One-time $6.99 Pro. Yours forever.
description_zh: Trovelo是一款适用于iPhone和Mac的私人旅行规划应用——无需账号、无需服务器、无需订阅。该应用由一位拥有40多个国家旅行经验的独行旅行者打造，他对市面上现有的所有应用都感到失望。您可以使用智能卡片逐日规划行程，自然输入后应用即可自动识别，以双币种追踪费用，优化路线，并通过iCloud进行私人同步。一次性付费6.99美元即可获得专业版，永久使用。

name: Treadmill Pro
tagline: Control your treadmill from your iPhone, wirelessly
tagline_zh: 通过iPhone无线控制你的跑步机
description: Connect your treadmill via Bluetooth and control speed, incline, timer and stats right from your iPhone. Full Apple Health integration. Free on the App Store.
description_zh: 通过蓝牙连接您的跑步机，并直接从您的iPhone控制速度、坡度、计时器和统计数据。完全与Apple Health集成。App Store免费下载。

name: Coffee Piano
tagline: Browser music and piano studio with visual harmony tools
tagline_zh: 配备视觉和声工具的浏览器音乐与钢琴工作室
description: Most harmony tools are too theoretical or too simple. Coffee Piano combines a real piano studio, sampled Piano & Rhodes, MIDI, sustain pedal with a visual harmony engine. Orbit visuals show scales and chords as circular maps. A harmony map reveals voice leading and chord function. Reharmonize in one click per bar or full progression. Guitar diagrams sync to every chord. Works in the browser, no install, bilingual UI.
description_zh: 大多数和声工具要么过于理论化，要么过于简单。Coffee Piano则将真实的钢琴录音室、采样钢琴与罗德琴、MIDI、延音踏板与可视化和声引擎相结合。Orbit可视化界面以圆形地图的形式展示音阶和和弦。和声地图可揭示声部进行和和弦功能。每个小节或整个进行均可一键重新和声。吉他图表与每个和弦同步。该工具可在浏览器中使用，无需安装，且用户界面为双语。

name: Carbon Voice Speed Dial
tagline: Get your whole team (humans and agents!) on speed dial
tagline_zh: 让你的整个团队（包括人类和代理！）都能快速拨号
description: Talk to your whole team — people and AI agents — with one tap. Carbon Voice gives you a speed dial for your team. One keystroke on desktop, one tap on mobile, and you're talking to anyone — a teammate, a group, or an AI agent like OpenClaw, Hermes, n8n, Claude Code, or Tasklet. Teams see 60% less time in meetings. Now your agents are just as easy to reach.
description_zh: 一键即可与您的整个团队（包括人员和人工智能代理）进行沟通。Carbon Voice为您的团队提供了一个快速拨号功能。在桌面上只需敲击一下键盘，在移动设备上只需点击一下，您就可以与任何人交谈——无论是队友、团队成员，还是像OpenClaw、Hermes、n8n、Claude Code或Tasklet这样的人工智能代理。团队成员的会议时间减少了60%。现在，您的代理也同样容易联系。

name: MoDev
tagline: The AI dev environment built for your phone.
tagline_zh: 专为您的手机打造的人工智能开发环境。
description: The AI dev environment built for your phone. Connect GitHub, Vercel, Supabase, Gmail, Calendar, and more. Any AI. Any API. Then chat to ship. → Deploy from your phone → Read repos, commit, open PRs → Query your database with natural language → Manage email and calendar by chat → BYOK on dev plans · Claude included on Moonlight One message. Real execution. From anywhere. Built solo. Bootstrapped. Founding members lock in today's price forever — first 100 only.
description_zh: 专为您的手机打造的AI开发环境。连接GitHub、Vercel、Supabase、Gmail、日历等。任何AI。任何API。然后聊天即可发货。→ 从手机部署 → 阅读存储库、提交、打开PR → 用自然语言查询数据库 → 通过聊天管理电子邮件和日历 → BYOK（自带密钥）开发计划 · Claude已纳入Moonlight One消息。真正执行。随时随地。独立构建。自举。创始成员永久锁定今日价格 — 仅限前100名。

name: Tyto by ai-coustics
tagline: Audio insight that predicts voice AI performance
tagline_zh: 能够预测语音AI性能的音频洞察力
description: Tyto is a lightweight model that runs on your audio stream and predicts whether the audio reaching your agent will cause downstream failures. It outputs a single score plus a breakdown across six dimensions: noise, speaker reverb, speaker loudness, interfering speech, background media speech, packet loss. Try it here: https://ai-coustics-tyto-demo--ph.modal.run/
description_zh: Tyto是一个轻量级模型，它运行在您的音频流上，并预测到达您的代理的音频是否会导致下游故障。它输出一个单一分数，并附带六个维度的详细分析：噪音、说话人混响、说话人响度、干扰语音、背景媒体语音、数据包丢失。点击此处尝试：https://ai-coustics-tyto-demo--ph.modal.run/

name: Carbone Skill for AI
tagline: Teach your AI to build document templates
tagline_zh: 训练你的AI构建文档模板
description: Carbone is a universal document-generation engine: feed it a template file and JSON file, and it produces pixel-perfect documents at scale. The Carbone Skill teaches AI assistants like Claude or ChatGPT the entire Carbone templating language. Describe what you want in plain language and your AI writes correct Carbone syntax, builds templates in DOCX, XLSX, PPTX, HTML or PDF, and validates tags before you render automatically at scale.
description_zh: Carbone是一款通用的文档生成引擎：只需向其输入模板文件和JSON文件，它就能大规模生成像素级完美的文档。Carbone技能可教会像Claude或ChatGPT这样的人工智能助手掌握完整的Carbone模板语言。用通俗易懂的语言描述您的需求，您的AI助手将编写正确的Carbone语法，以DOCX、XLSX、PPTX、HTML或PDF格式构建模板，并在您自动大规模渲染之前验证标签。

name: Riven
tagline: Your Apple Watch knows when you've truly hit muscle failure
tagline_zh: 你的Apple Watch能知道你何时真正达到肌肉疲劳
description: Riven turns your Apple Watch into a muscle failure tracker. It auto-detects your exercise, counts reps hands-free, and measures rep speed loss — the science-backed signal of true muscle fatigue — to tell you if you actually trained to failure or stopped reps short. Built for hypertrophy and strength training: no camera, no bar sensor, no extra hardware — just the watch you already own. Get a 0–100 failure score after every set, so every workout drives real muscle growth.
description_zh: Riven将您的Apple Watch转变为肌肉疲劳追踪器。它能够自动检测您的运动，无需手动计数重复次数，并测量重复速度下降——这是真实肌肉疲劳的科学信号——以告知您是否真的训练到力竭或提前停止了重复次数。专为增肌和力量训练设计：无需摄像头、无需杠铃传感器、无需额外硬件——只需您已有的手表即可。每组训练后获得0-100的疲劳评分，确保每次锻炼都能促进真正的肌肉增长。

name: QuackScreen
tagline: Capture, drag, share all from the MacBook notch
tagline_zh: 从MacBook的Notch功能区中截屏、拖动、分享，一应俱全
description: QuackScreen is a native macOS notch app for quick screen recordings and screenshots. Drag and drop clips straight from the menu bar into Slack, Mail, Finder, or any app. macOS 26+, Apple silicon.
description_zh: QuackScreen是一款适用于macOS的本地应用程序，用于快速屏幕录制和截图。您可以直接从菜单栏将剪辑拖放到Slack、Mail、Finder或任何应用程序中。适用于macOS 26+版本，支持Apple silicon芯片。

name: FolderPlus
tagline: Peek inside any folder without opening it
tagline_zh: 无需打开任何文件夹即可窥视其内容
description: Preview folders and archives the way Quick Look was meant to work. FolderPlus supercharges your Mac's Quick Look with rich, instant previews for folders and compressed archives. Just press Space on any folder or ZIP file to see exactly what's inside—no clicking, no waiting, no extracting. It's the missing feature Quick Look always should have had, built natively for macOS and designed to disappear into your everyday workflow.
description_zh: 以Quick Look本应有的方式预览文件夹和压缩文件。FolderPlus为Mac的Quick Look增添了强大的功能，可对文件夹和压缩文件进行即时预览。只需在任何文件夹或ZIP文件上按下空格键，即可查看其内容——无需点击、无需等待、无需解压。这是Quick Look一直缺失的功能，它原生构建于macOS之上，旨在融入您的日常工作中。

name: RadianceKit
tagline: Turn photos into 3D Gaussian Splats on your Mac
tagline_zh: 在Mac上将照片转换为3D高斯散点图
description: RadianceKit is the first native macOS app for 3D Gaussian Splatting. Drop in photos or video of any object or scene — it aligns the cameras, trains the model, and renders a photorealistic 3D reconstruction, all locally on your Mac's GPU. No Python, no CUDA, no cloud. Simple Mode for one-click results, Scene-Class Presets (Render/Outdoor/Indoor), and full Expert control. Export to 6 formats, orbit videos, and web viewers. M1+, $7.99 one-time, 3-day trial.
description_zh: RadianceKit是首个原生macOS 3D高斯散点化应用。只需放入任何物体或场景的照片或视频，它即可在Mac的GPU上本地完成相机对齐、模型训练和逼真3D重建的渲染。无需Python、CUDA或云端支持。简单模式一键出结果，提供场景类预设（渲染/户外/室内）和全面的专家控制选项。可导出至6种格式，支持视频轨道和网页查看器。M1+机型，7.99美元一次性购买，3天试用。

name: Forward
tagline: Installs your API into a customer's codebase in one command
tagline_zh: 只需一条命令，即可将您的API安装到客户的代码库中
description: Forward is an AI forward-deployed engineer that integrates your API directly into your customers' codebases. Instead of 50-page docs, users run one command. Forward analyzes their repo, writes the integration on a new branch, runs tests, and opens a PR for review. Built for API and SDK companies to eliminate churn between signup and the first successful call. It learns your house style and ensures safety through build validation—all while saving users hours of manual wiring.
description_zh: Forward 是一名 AI 前端部署工程师，可将您的 API 直接集成到客户的代码库中。用户只需运行一个命令，无需查看 50 页的文档。Forward 会分析他们的代码库，在新分支上编写集成代码，运行测试，并提交一个 PR 以供审核。它专为 API 和 SDK 公司打造，旨在消除从注册到首次成功调用之间的用户流失。它能够学习您的内部风格，并通过构建验证确保安全性——同时为用户节省数小时的手动配置时间。

name: Mic Drop 3.0
tagline: Mute your mic in any app—with your AirPods
tagline_zh: 使用AirPods，在任何应用中静音您的麦克风
description: The ultimate macOS mute manager is back. Toggle your mic across Zoom, Meet, and Slack instantly using a global shortcut, menu bar icon, or a simple squeeze of your AirPods. Now faster, lighter, and packed with AppleScript support.
description_zh: 终极macOS静音管理器强势回归。您可以通过全局快捷键、菜单栏图标或轻捏AirPods，在Zoom、Meet和Slack中即时切换麦克风状态。现在，它更快、更轻便，并支持AppleScript。

name: AlliHat
tagline: Claude AI in your Safari sidebar
tagline_zh: Claude AI 位于您的 Safari 侧边栏
description: Claude had a Chrome extension. Safari didn't. So I built AlliHat. Open the sidebar and it sees the page you're on. Ask anything. Highlight text for instant explanations. Agent Mode clicks, fills forms, and navigates. Workflows run repeated tasks in one click. Memory means you never re-explain yourself. History is saved per domain. Bring your own Claude API key, or use Apple Intelligence on-device. Your key goes straight to Anthropic. No tracking. No analytics. $29.99/year after a free trial.
description_zh: 克劳德（Claude）有一个Chrome扩展程序。Safari没有。所以我开发了AlliHat。打开侧边栏，它就能识别你所在的页面。你可以问任何问题。高亮文本以获得即时解释。代理模式可点击、填写表单并进行导航。工作流程一键运行重复任务。记忆功能意味着你无需重复解释自己。历史记录按域名保存。带上你自己的克劳德（Claude）API密钥，或在设备上使用Apple Intelligence。你的密钥将直接发送给Anthropic。无跟踪。无分析。免费试用后每年29.99美元。

name: MD+HTML Reader
tagline: Review AI-generated Markdown and HTML in a focused workspace
tagline_zh: 在专注的工作区中查看由AI生成的Markdown和HTML
description: AI coding tools produce useful docs, but reviewing them can get messy. One task can leave plans, API notes, QA checklists, handoffs, diagrams, and HTML previews scattered across project folders and buried under source files, builds, logs, and dependencies. MD+HTML Reader gives you a focused macOS workspace to review generated Markdown and HTML in read-only mode before the next prompt, commit, or handoff.
description_zh: AI编码工具能生成有用的文档，但审查这些文档可能会变得混乱。一项任务可能会让计划、API注释、QA检查表、交接文件、图表和HTML预览散落在项目文件夹中，并被埋在源文件、构建文件、日志和依赖项之下。MD+HTML Reader为你提供了一个专注的macOS工作区，以便在下一次提示、提交或交接之前，以只读模式审查生成的Markdown和HTML。

name: OnBrand by SlideSpeak
tagline: Design context for AI agents
tagline_zh: 人工智能代理的设计背景
description: OnBrand gives AI agents design context through MCP. Add your brand guidelines, logos, colors, icons, imagery and slide rules, so tools like Claude, Codex and ChatGPT can create slides, infographics and design assets that actually match your brand. No more generic AI output, random layouts or off-brand visuals. OnBrand can generate your entire brand guidelines as a design.md from your existing website, existing branding guidelines or even PowerPoint templates.
description_zh: OnBrand通过MCP为AI代理提供设计上下文。添加您的品牌指南、徽标、颜色、图标、图像和幻灯片规则，这样像Claude、Codex和ChatGPT这样的工具就可以创建真正符合您品牌的幻灯片、信息图表和设计资源。不再有通用的AI输出、随机的布局或不符合品牌的视觉效果。OnBrand可以从您现有的网站、现有的品牌指南甚至PowerPoint模板中生成您的整个品牌指南，作为design.md文件。

name: Agentic Document Extraction
tagline: Make the world's documents computable
tagline_zh: 让全世界的文档都能被计算机处理
description: LandingAI is on a mission to make the world's documents computable. Agentic Document Extraction helps enterprise developers build document automation pipelines at scale. Accurate, auditable, API-driven document AI.
description_zh: LandingAI的使命是让全世界的文档变得可计算。Agentic Document Extraction助力企业开发者大规模构建文档自动化流程。准确、可审计、API驱动的文档AI。

name: Photoroom API
tagline: Transform product images at scale with one image editing API
tagline_zh: 使用一款图像编辑API，大规模转换产品图片
description: Photoroom API powers product visuals for the world's leading marketplaces and brands, processing billions of images a year — built for the speed, consistency, and scale commerce demands. From raw upload to polished, marketplace-ready hero shots and bundles, generate every catalog asset in one API flow. Integrate in minutes with a clean REST API and clear docs. Enterprise-grade security: your images are never stored or used to train models.
description_zh: Photoroom API为全球领先的市场和品牌提供产品视觉支持，每年处理数十亿张图片——专为满足商业需求的速度、一致性和规模而打造。从原始上传到精修、市场准备好的主图和套餐，所有目录资产均可通过一个API流程生成。只需几分钟即可通过简洁的REST API和清晰的文档完成集成。企业级安全保障：您的图片绝不会被存储或用于训练模型。

name: AlgoFly AI
tagline: The all-in-one place to build and deploy vision AI
tagline_zh: 构建和部署视觉人工智能的一站式平台
description: AlgoFly is an AI consulting company that helps businesses build and deploy AI solutions.
description_zh: AlgoFly是一家人工智能咨询公司，致力于帮助企业构建和部署人工智能解决方案。

name: LeadDelta 5.0: AI Warm Intros + AI Inbox
tagline: AI that finds Warm Intro Paths and fixes your LinkedIn Inbox
tagline_zh: 能够发现“温馨介绍路径”并整理您的LinkedIn收件箱的人工智能
description: LeadDelta 5.0 brings your team's relationships into one workspace, powered by AI agents that: [#1] Understand your network, their past roles, skills, and how everyone connects. [#2] Are trained in your tone of voice to draft and label your messages for you. [#3] Find the warmest intro paths into your top prospects, future hires, or investors. Plus custom feeds that surface posts only from the people who matter. One inbox. One network. Every warm intro your team is sitting on.
description_zh: LeadDelta 5.0将您团队的人际关系整合到一个工作空间中，由人工智能代理提供支持，这些代理能够：[#1]了解您的人际网络、成员过去的角色、技能以及每个人之间的联系方式。[#2]根据您的语气进行训练，为您起草和标记信息。[#3]为您找到与顶级潜在客户、未来员工或投资者建立最热情介绍的最佳途径。此外，还有自定义信息流，仅展示来自重要人士的帖子。一个收件箱。一个网络。您团队掌握的每一个热情介绍。

name: Glossary Extractor
tagline: Turn your content into a ready-to-use glossary in minutes
tagline_zh: 在几分钟内将您的内容转化为即用型术语表
description: Every serious localization project needs a glossary – and pulling the right terms out of your content by hand is slow, repetitive work. This tool does it for you: upload a file, get a structured term base back in minutes, with each term defined, counted, and (if your file is multilingual) translated. It pairs algorithmic term-finding with an AI cleanup pass, so the result is accurate enough to ship with just a quick review. It's free and requires no signup.
description_zh: 每一个严肃的本地化项目都需要一个术语表——而手动从内容中提取正确的术语是一项缓慢且重复的工作。这个工具可以帮你完成：上传一个文件，几分钟内就能得到一个结构化的术语库，其中每个术语都有定义、计数，并且（如果文件是多语言的）还进行了翻译。它将算法术语查找与人工智能清理相结合，因此结果足够准确，只需快速审查即可发布。该工具免费且无需注册。

name: co/core
tagline: An AI cooperative. Local models on spare macs.
tagline_zh: 一个AI合作社。在闲置的Mac电脑上运行本地模型。
description: co/core is a cooperative for AI inference — people pooling the Macs they already own to run open models for each other, instead of renting from the big clouds. An experiment in AI infrastructure we build, share, and own together. Bring your existing OpenAI-compatible code, or share a Mac and help run it.
description_zh: co/core是一个用于人工智能推理的合作组织——人们将自己已有的Mac电脑共享出来，为彼此运行开放模型，而不是从大型云服务提供商那里租用。这是我们共同构建、共享和拥有的一个AI基础设施实验项目。带上你现有的兼容OpenAI的代码，或者分享一台Mac电脑并帮助运行它。

name: radiusHQ link in bio and booking in one
tagline: Let clients book you straight from your bio.
tagline_zh: 让客户直接从你的个人主页上预约你。
description: Stop telling clients to "DM to book." radiusHQ gives service professionals a branded link-in-bio page where clients see their services, pricing, and book in seconds — no website needed. Team plans cover up to 10 pros with fair-load routing, no per-seat pricing. Setup takes 10 minutes. Free tier available.
description_zh: 别再告诉客户“私信预约”了。radiusHQ为服务专业人士提供了一个品牌化的个人主页链接，客户可以在几秒钟内看到他们的服务、定价并进行预约——无需网站。团队计划最多可覆盖10名专业人士，采用公平负载路由，无按座位定价。设置仅需10分钟。提供免费套餐。

name: MonoLisa v3
tagline: A typeface built for you, the developers and creatives.
tagline_zh: 专为你们——开发者与创意人士打造的字体。
description: MonoLisa typeface has been around since 2020. In its latest iteration, version 3, the family grows as it includes a proportional variant called MonoLisa Text that complements MonoLisa Code for UI and design tasks. MonoLisa Code has received distinct design improvements as well and it has been restructured so that you can apply the ligatures you want. There's also a new grade axis for subtle weight tweaks without changing line breaks.
description_zh: MonoLisa字体自2020年问世以来，其最新版本——第3版，字体家族进一步壮大，新增了一款名为MonoLisa Text的比例变体，与用于用户界面（UI）和设计任务的MonoLisa Code相辅相成。MonoLisa Code也获得了显著的设计改进，并进行了重构，以便您可以应用所需的连字。此外，还新增了一个等级轴，用于在不改变换行的情况下进行细微的粗细调整。

name: PrepIt
tagline: Coffee shop operations software
tagline_zh: 咖啡店运营软件
description: PrepIt helps coffee shops manage inventory, scheduling, recipes, batch prep, and daily operations in one system. Stop relying on endless spreadsheets and messy manager workflows.
description_zh: PrepIt帮助咖啡店在一个系统中管理库存、排班、食谱、批量准备和日常运营。无需再依赖无休止的电子表格和混乱的管理工作流程。

name: Treasury AI
tagline: A Personal CFO for your financial life
tagline_zh: 您财务生活的私人首席财务官
description: Treasury AI is your personal CFO agent: it understands your accounts, budgets, subscriptions, and goals, then turns plain-English money questions into specific next steps. Ask “Can I afford this?”, “Where is my money leaking?”, or “What should I do next?” and get answers grounded in your real financial life. It proactively flags subscriptions, cash-flow risks, tax-advantaged moves, and savings opportunities so you can make better decisions without spreadsheets.
description_zh: Treasury AI是您的私人首席财务官助手：它了解您的账户、预算、订阅情况和目标，然后将普通的金钱问题转化为具体的下一步行动。问“我买得起这个吗？”，“我的钱都花在哪里了？”，或者“我接下来应该做什么？”，就能得到基于您真实财务生活的答案。它会主动标记订阅、现金流风险、税收优惠举措和储蓄机会，这样您就可以在不使用电子表格的情况下做出更好的决策。

name: DEADLINE
tagline: Finish your novel. Or we start deleting it.
tagline_zh: 写完你的小说。否则我们就要开始删除了。
description: The writing accountability app that holds your manuscript hostage. Hit your daily word count or face nine escalating tiers of sabotage, ending in a funeral. Mercy starts at $0.99.
description_zh: 这款写作问责应用会监督你的手稿，如果你没有达到每日的字数要求，就会面临九级递增的破坏，最终以葬礼收场。0.99美元即可获得赦免。

name: Lemonvite
tagline: Digital invites and RSVPs. Five bucks per event. No ads.
tagline_zh: 电子邀请函和回复。每场活动五美元。无广告。
description: Lemonvite is digital invitations and RSVP tracking for a flat $5 per event. No ads on the invite, no coins, no subscription, no marketing emails to guests. Evite shows your guests banner ads. Paperless Post charges "coins" that turn a $5 card into a $20 checkout. I wanted neither, so I built this. Build an invite in a minute or upload your own, send by email or SMS, track RSVPs on one dashboard. On Product Hunt: your first event is free for the first 50 to comment.
description_zh: Lemonvite提供数字邀请函和回复追踪服务，每场活动仅需5美元。邀请函上无广告，不收费币，无订阅，不向客人发送营销邮件。Evite会向客人展示横幅广告。Paperless Post则收取“费用”，将5美元的卡片变成20美元的结账费用。我两者都不想要，所以就自己做了这个。您可以在一分钟内创建邀请函，或上传自己的邀请函，通过电子邮件或短信发送，并在一个仪表板上追踪回复情况。在Product Hunt上：您的前50个评论者可以免费参加您的首次活动。

name: LivePlant : Plant Identifier
tagline: Snap a photo to identify plants and cure diseases instantly.
tagline_zh: 拍张照片，即可立即识别植物并治愈疾病。
description: LivePlant is a premium, beautifully minimalistic companion for plant care. What makes it stand out: • Visual AI ID: Snap a photo to identify plant species instantly. • Disease Diagnosis: Take a picture to detect health issues. • Premium UI: A sleek, distraction-free aesthetic built for iOS. • No Bloat: No unnecessary chat interfaces—just fast, accurate visual insights. Keep your plant care simple, elegant, and healthy!
description_zh: LivePlant是一款高端、美观且简约的植物护理伴侣。其独特之处在于：• 视觉AI识别：只需拍张照片，即可立即识别植物种类。• 疾病诊断：拍张照片，即可检测健康问题。• 高端用户界面：专为iOS打造，设计简洁、无干扰。• 无冗余：无不必要的聊天界面，只提供快速、准确的视觉洞察。让您的植物护理变得简单、优雅且健康！

name: Second Hand Tokens
tagline: Buy leftovers tokens at 50% off
tagline_zh: 以50%的折扣购买剩余的代币
description: Developers buy more tokens than they use. You buy the leftovers at 50% off.
description_zh: 开发者购买的代币数量超过他们实际使用的数量。你以50%的折扣购买剩余的代币。

name: Spoth
tagline: Drop photo trails on a map — they vanish after a while
tagline_zh: 在地图上留下照片轨迹——它们过一段时间就会消失
description: Spoth lets you drop "trails" — photos of where you are right now — on a shared map. They expire, so it's always live, never a highlight reel. Explore trails worldwide, find real people, and see who viewed yours.
description_zh: Spoth允许你在共享地图上留下“足迹”——即你当前所在位置的照片。这些足迹会过期，因此它始终是实时更新的，而非只是精彩片段的集合。你可以探索世界各地的足迹，结识真实的人，并查看谁浏览过你的足迹。

name: OpenDream
tagline: Open, local-first memory for AI agents (with dreaming)
tagline_zh: 为人工智能代理（具有梦境功能）提供开放、本地优先的内存
description: OpenDream is an open, local-first memory layer for AI agents. It captures agent activity, turns useful history into reviewable memory, retrieves only relevant context for the next task, and shows what was selected, skipped, or marked stale. Use it across Codex, Claude Code, Cursor, and other agent workflows without handing project memory to a hosted black box.
description_zh: OpenDream是一个面向人工智能代理的开放、本地优先的记忆层。它捕捉代理活动，将有用的历史记录转化为可回顾的记忆，仅检索与下一个任务相关的上下文，并显示已选择、跳过或标记为过时的内容。您可以在Codex、Claude Code、Cursor和其他代理工作流程中使用它，而无需将项目记忆交给托管的黑盒。

name: Voyage Health
tagline: Know more. Worry less.
tagline_zh: 了解更多，减少忧虑。
description: Most AI health tools treat every conversation like it's your first: no memory, no follow-up, just generic responses. Voyage is different. It remembers your health history across sessions, gives you a structured clinical breakdown after every conversation (risk level, severity score, recommendation), and tracks open issues until they're resolved. No paywalls. No subscriptions. Free on iOS and Android. Built for the gap between 'I feel off' and 'I need to see a doctor.'
description_zh: 大多数人工智能健康工具都将每次对话视为首次对话：没有记忆，没有后续跟进，只有通用回复。Voyage则与众不同。它会在不同会话中记住您的健康历史，每次对话后为您提供结构化的临床分析（风险等级、严重程度评分、建议），并跟踪未解决的问题，直至其得到解决。无付费门槛。无订阅费用。iOS和Android系统均可免费使用。专为“我感觉不舒服”和“我需要看医生”之间的空白地带而打造

name: Reskin
tagline: Modern Themes for YouTube
tagline_zh: YouTube的现代主题
description: YouTube ships two looks. Reskin gives it a dozen. Flagship, hand-tuned themes plus fine-grained color control — applied live, synced across devices. No data ever leaves your browser.
description_zh: YouTube提供两种外观。而Reskin则提供了十几种。旗舰版，手工调校的主题加上精细的颜色控制——实时应用，跨设备同步。数据永远不会离开您的浏览器。

name: GitHub
tagline: Local-first memory for your AI coding agent
tagline_zh: 为您的人工智能编码代理提供本地优先的内存
description: Your AI coding agent forgets your project every session. Most memory tools store your context on their servers. PMB keeps it on yours. It captures decisions, lessons and facts as you work and feeds the relevant ones back automatically via MCP hooks, so your agent shows up already knowing the project. Different: 100% local (one SQLite file, no cloud, no API keys), automatic (no "remember" step), cross-agent (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex), hybrid offline retrieval.
description_zh: 你的AI编码助手每次会话都会忘记你的项目。大多数记忆工具将你的上下文存储在它们的服务器上。而PMB则将其保存在你的设备上。它会在你工作时捕捉决策、经验和事实，并通过MCP接口自动反馈相关内容，这样你的助手在出现时就已经知道这个项目了。与众不同之处在于：100%本地化（一个SQLite文件，无需云端，无需API密钥）、自动化（无需“记忆”步骤）、跨助手（Claude Code、Cursor、Codex）、混合式离线检索。

name: Free noise cancellation for your calls
tagline: Krisp alternative — free, no GPU, no account needed
tagline_zh: Krisp替代方案 — 免费、无需GPU、无需账号
description: NoiseClear removes background noise from your mic in real-time — people on your calls hear only your voice, not the dogs, traffic, or aircon hum. 🆓 Free — no subscription, no account 💻 No GPU required — works on budget laptops 🔒 100% private — audio never leaves your PC 🎯 Works with Zoom, Teams, Discord, Meet ⚡ Built on RNNoise, runs on-device via WebAssembly Built for WFH workers who can't justify paying monthly or buying an RTX GPU just for clean calls. Setup takes ~1 minute.
description_zh: NoiseClear能实时消除麦克风中的背景噪音——通话中的人只能听到你的声音，听不到狗叫、车声或空调嗡嗡声。🆓免费——无需订阅，无需账户💻无需GPU——适用于预算有限的笔记本电脑🔒100%私密——音频永远不会离开你的电脑🎯兼容Zoom、Teams、Discord、Meet⚡基于RNNoise构建，通过WebAssembly在设备上运行专为无法为每月付费或购买RTX GPU以获得清晰通话的远程办公人员设计。设置耗时约1分钟。

name: HuntingHydra
tagline: AI skills used in $10k positioning & GTM sprints
tagline_zh: 在10,000美元定位和GTM冲刺中使用的AI技能
description: HuntinHydra's AI agent marketplace is a curated library of AI skills and agentic workflows built for specific business tasks. Positioning (ICP research, competitive matrix), SEO/GEO/AEO (page audits, AI search visibility, brand audits for generative engines), GTM (signal-based prospecting, LinkedIn outreach, pipeline workflows), Copywriting (landing pages, email sequences, product copy), UX Design (conversion audits, onboarding flows, friction mapping). New skills added regularly.
description_zh: HuntinHydra的人工智能代理市场是一个经过精心策划的人工智能技能和代理工作流程库，专为特定的业务任务而构建。定位（ICP研究、竞争矩阵）、SEO/GEO/AEO（页面审核、人工智能搜索可见性、生成引擎的品牌审核）、GTM（基于信号的潜在客户挖掘、LinkedIn推广、渠道工作流程）、文案撰写（落地页、电子邮件序列、产品文案）、用户体验设计（转化审核、入职流程、摩擦点映射）。新技能会定期添加。

name: Maillune — Embeddable Email Builder SDK
tagline: One web component. A full drag-and-drop email editor.
tagline_zh: 一个网页组件。一个完整的拖放式电子邮件编辑器。
description: Add a production-ready drag-and-drop email editor to your SaaS in minutes. One web component, any framework. Free to start. The goal of Maillune is to provide a fullfledged email editor without extreme costs and inhouse management. With a simple to use SDK you can get your first rendered email within minutes.
description_zh: 只需几分钟，即可为您的SaaS平台添加一个可投入生产的拖放式电子邮件编辑器。一个Web组件，适配任何框架。免费开始使用。Maillune的目标是提供一个功能齐全的电子邮件编辑器，无需高昂的成本和内部管理。借助易于使用的SDK，您可以在几分钟内生成第一封电子邮件。

name: Loomrate
tagline: Quote prices against real profit, not gut feeling
tagline_zh: 根据实际利润来报价，而非凭直觉
description: Determine your true freelance hourly rate and profit margins. Calculate project quotes after taxes, platform fees, and unpaid admin hours. Try Loomrate free.
description_zh: 确定您真正的自由职业小时费率和利润率。在计算项目报价时，需扣除税费、平台费用以及未支付的管理时间成本。免费试用Loomrate。

name: Interview Pilot
tagline: Live AI Interview Copilot
tagline_zh: 现场AI访谈副驾驶
description: Interview Pilot is ranked #1 Copilot for Interview on the App Store and Play Store, and by popular demand we are launching our Desktop Apps for Windows and Mac! We are also celebrating over 100,000+ users worldwide! Get real-time interview answers during your interview with AI Copilot. Ace any technical or behavioral questions instantly.
description_zh: Interview Pilot在App Store和Play Store的面试类Copilot应用中排名第一，应广大用户需求，我们即将推出适用于Windows和Mac的桌面应用！同时，我们也在庆祝全球用户数量突破10万大关！在面试过程中，您可以使用AI Copilot获得实时面试答案，瞬间应对任何技术或行为问题。

name: Fupio 2.0
tagline: Social RSS reader
tagline_zh: 社交RSS阅读器
description: I was missing FriendFeed so much, and after seeing multiple times that I'm not alone, built one.
description_zh: 我非常怀念FriendFeed，在多次发现并非只有我一个人怀念后，我创建了一个类似的平台。

name: Charter
tagline: AI-agent readiness, scored.
tagline_zh: AI代理就绪，已评分。
description: Charter is an offline-first CLI that audits any repo against 18 rules and returns a deterministic 0–100 score in under 2 seconds.
description_zh: Charter是一个离线优先的命令行界面（CLI）工具，它可以根据18条规则对任何代码库进行审核，并在2秒内返回一个确定的0-100分数的评分。

name: getebook.ai
tagline: Turn one idea into a finished ebook, cover & PDF in 10 min
tagline_zh: 10分钟内将一个想法转化为一本完整的电子书，包括封面和PDF格式
description: getebook.ai writes your whole ebook, designs the cover, and exports a publish-ready PDF/EPUB from a single topic, in under 10 minutes. No ghostwriter, no separate cover designer, no formatting tool. Built for coaches, creators, and KDP authors who want a finished, sellable book, fast.
description_zh: getebook.ai能在10分钟内为您撰写整本电子书，设计封面，并从单个主题导出可发布的PDF/EPUB格式文件。无需代写，无需单独的封面设计师，也无需格式化工具。专为希望快速获得一本成品、可销售书籍的教练、创作者和KDP作者打造。

name: Nourish - Better News
tagline: Global news re-imagined, with no click-bait headlines.
tagline_zh: 全球新闻，重塑想象，无标题党。
description: Small, regular, balanced slices of global news written just for you. No ads. Not trackers. Just a safe, calm way to stay informed.
description_zh: 为你量身打造的全球新闻，短小精悍，内容均衡。无广告，无追踪器。以一种安全、平静的方式，让你随时了解最新资讯。

name: SparkDry: Car Wash Weather App
tagline: Best Day to Wash your car: Weather, Pollen, Rain
tagline_zh: 洗车的最佳日子：天气、花粉、降雨情况
description: SparkDry tells you the best day to wash your car. Live Wash Score from weather, pollen, and dust data for your exact location. Stop wasting washes — free to use, no account needed.
description_zh: SparkDry会告诉你洗车的最佳日子。根据你所在位置的天气、花粉和灰尘数据，提供实时洗车评分。别再浪费洗车次数了——免费使用，无需注册账号。

name: Obliqo
tagline: Find where your argument bends before it breaks in public.
tagline_zh: 找到你的论点在公开场合中在崩溃之前发生弯曲的地方。
description: Obliqo is a private critique layer for high-stakes drafts: launch posts, landing pages, essays, and arguments. Paste your draft and get four independent, blind AI critiques plus a structured synthesis: STANDS, BENDS, GIVES. No automatic rewriting. No voice-flattening. Just pressure-testing before readers or customers find the flaw.
description_zh: Obliqo是一个针对高风险草稿的私人审阅平台：发布帖子、落地页、论文和论点。将您的草稿粘贴进来，即可获得四条独立的、匿名的AI审阅意见，外加一份结构化的综合分析：优点、缺点、改进点。无自动重写。无语音平抑。只是在读者或客户发现瑕疵之前进行压力测试。

name: Preach
tagline: Agentic Reference Management for Sales Leaders
tagline_zh: 销售领导者的代理参考管理
description: (LOOKING FOR 10 PILOT COMPANIES) Existing tools are Salesforce-only, require manual tagging, and were built before AI. Preach is agentic. It discovers advocates automatically from CRM and usage data, matches them to deals in seconds, monitors fatigue so top customers don't burn out, and proves revenue impact by connecting references to closed deals. It doesn't wait to be asked. It watches your pipeline and acts.
description_zh: （寻找10家试点公司）现有工具仅支持Salesforce，需要手动标记，且是在人工智能出现之前开发的。Preach则具有代理性。它能够从客户关系管理（CRM）和使用数据中自动发现拥护者，在几秒钟内将他们与交易匹配，监控疲劳度以防止顶级客户流失，并通过将推荐人与已完成的交易联系起来来证明其对收入的影响。它无需等待询问，即可监控您的销售渠道并采取行动。

name: Pinhub
tagline: Pin-point feedback on any screenshot or design
tagline_zh: 对任何截图或设计提供精准反馈
description: Upload a screenshot, drop a pin exactly where you mean, and discuss that spot — no more vague "make the header bigger." Share one link and reviewers comment without signing up. Mark every thread resolved so nothing slips through, and let AI turn a noisy discussion into a clean to-do list. Pinhub makes scattered feedback into one clear, resolvable thread.
description_zh: 上传一张截图，精确标出你想要表达的位置，并讨论该地点——不再模糊地要求“把标题放大”。分享一个链接，评论者无需注册即可发表评论。将每个帖子标记为已解决，确保没有任何遗漏，并让AI将嘈杂的讨论转化为清晰的待办事项列表。Pinhub将分散的反馈整合到一个清晰、可解决的帖子中。

name: AIRA
tagline: Fully Autonomous Agentic AI DJ & Music Player
tagline_zh: 完全自主的个性化AI DJ与音乐播放器
description: Most music players play songs. AIRA Mac performs them. It analyzes your local music library for BPM, key, energy, song structure, and vocals, then creates seamless DJ-style transitions using beat-synced, phrase-aware mixing. With 9 intelligent crossfade strategies, vocal clash detection, and heart rate–adaptive Pulse Mode, AIRA acts as an autonomous AI DJ—turning your music collection into a continuously evolving listening experience.
description_zh: 大多数音乐播放器只是播放歌曲。而AIRA Mac则能演绎歌曲。它会分析您本地音乐库中的每分钟节拍数（BPM）、调性、能量、歌曲结构和人声，然后通过节拍同步、乐句感知的混音技术，实现无缝的DJ风格过渡。AIRA拥有9种智能交叉渐变策略、人声冲突检测功能和心率自适应的脉冲模式，它就像一个自主的人工智能DJ，将您的音乐收藏转化为不断演变的听觉体验。

name: Fida
tagline: Let agents read your code, not your secrets.
tagline_zh: 让代理人阅读你的代码，而非你的秘密。
description: Fida is a local-first secret-leak prevention layer for AI coding agents. It stops credentials from ever reaching model context: when an agent reads aenv or runs a command, Fida returns a redacted view, while the real command still executes with the true secret, so the work succeeds. The agent uses a secret without seeing it. Fail-closed by design, nothing leaves your machine. Not a heavy policy firewall — one focused job, done right.
description_zh: Fida是针对人工智能编码代理的本地优先的防泄密层。它阻止凭据进入模型上下文：当代理读取环境变量（aenv）或运行命令时，Fida会返回一个经过编辑的视图，而真正的命令仍然会使用真实的凭据执行，因此工作会成功完成。代理在看不到凭据的情况下使用它。设计上采用故障关闭机制，不会将任何内容留在您的机器上。它不是一个繁重的策略防火墙——专注于一项任务，正确完成。

name: Grove
tagline: Video mail + video chat, instantly
tagline_zh: 视频邮件+视频聊天，即时进行
description: Grove Video — live Chatrooms and private Video Mail on iPhone, Android, Mac, and desktop.
description_zh: Grove Video — 在iPhone、Android、Mac和台式机上提供实时聊天室和私人视频邮件服务。

name: Blazly GEO
tagline: Make LLM Refer your Brand Instantly
tagline_zh: 让LLM立即为您的品牌提供推荐
description: Track your brand visibility across ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity & Grok. Monitor prompts, citations, competitors, sentiment, and AI recommendations while optimizing content and landing pages for AI search.
description_zh: 在ChatGPT、Gemini、Claude、Perplexity和Grok上追踪您的品牌知名度。监控提示、引用、竞争对手、情感和人工智能建议，同时优化人工智能搜索的内容和落地页。

name: TarqaAI for Teams & Enterprise
tagline: One layer for your agents and teams.
tagline_zh: 为您的代理和团队提供一层保护。
description: Most AI gateways stop at access. TarqaAI adds the control layer enterprises and governments actually need. Route 60+ models (Claude Opus 4.6, GPT-4.1, o3, Gemini 2.5 Pro, DeepSeek-R1) plus your own local GPUs through one API key. What's different: - Dual-gate budget limits that hard-block runaway bills (403) - 5-role RBAC + SAML 2.0 SSO, per-seat budgets - Exportable audit trails on every token - GPU tunnels for on-prem inference Start free — no credit card.
description_zh: 大多数人工智能（AI）网关仅限于访问层面。TarqaAI则增加了企业和政府实际所需的控制层。通过一个API密钥，即可连接60多种模型（Claude Opus 4.6、GPT-4.1、o3、Gemini 2.5 Pro、DeepSeek-R1）以及您自己的本地图形处理器（GPU）。与众不同之处在于： - 双网关预算限制，有效阻止账单飙升（403） - 5角色基于角色的访问控制（RBAC）+ SAML 2.0单点登录（SSO），按座位设置预算 - 每个令牌的可导出审计跟踪 - 用于本地推理的GPU隧道 免费试用 — 无需信用卡。

name: Rebbiton - AEO | SEO | Analytics
tagline: Get your brand recommended by ChatGPT, Gemini & Google AI
tagline_zh: 让ChatGPT、Gemini和谷歌AI为您的品牌提供推荐
description: Search is changing. People no longer just Google-they ask ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude, Perplexity, and Google AI for recommendations. Yet most businesses have no idea whether AI platforms mention their brand. Rebbiton solves this. Track AI visibility, monitor citations, discover high-impact prompts, analyze competitors, measure AI-driven traffic, and put AEO, GEO, and SEO on autopilot. Built to help brands get found, cited, and recommended in the age of AI search.
description_zh: 搜索正在发生变化。人们不再仅仅使用谷歌——他们会向ChatGPT、Gemini、Claude、Perplexity和谷歌AI寻求推荐。然而，大多数企业并不清楚AI平台是否提及了他们的品牌。Rebbiton解决了这个问题。它可以追踪AI的可见度，监控引用情况，发现高影响力的提示，分析竞争对手，衡量AI驱动的流量，并自动执行AEO、GEO和SEO。它旨在帮助品牌在AI搜索时代被找到、被引用和被推荐。

name: StoryCrew
tagline: Turn any idea into a finished video, made for your youtube
tagline_zh: 将任何想法转化为完整的视频，专为你的YouTube频道制作
description: StoryCrew turns a single idea into a finished video, personalized to your brand. How it works: 1. Set up your channel. Paste your website link, drop in a brand guide, or just write down your youtube channel idea. 2. Type a topic. Pick landscape or vertical, choose a length, and hit create. 3. Make it yours. Don't like a scene? Rewrite the line, or regenerate the image or animation, then rebuild. Or just ask. StoryCrew has a built in assistant that can run the whole app for you.
description_zh: StoryCrew能够将一个简单的想法转化为一个完整的视频，并使其与您的品牌相契合。具体操作流程如下：1. 设置您的频道。粘贴您的网站链接，添加品牌指南，或者只需写下您的YouTube频道创意。

name: Plexara Hub
tagline: Your AI brain hub for sales, email & growth
tagline_zh: 您销售、电子邮件和增长的人工智能大脑中心
description: Plexara Hub is your AI business OS — 13 skills in one platform. Find leads, run your CRM, draft outreach, track email opens, write blog posts, script videos, create ad copy, and schedule follow-ups. Built for founders. CA$149/mo. 7-day free trial.
description_zh: Plexara Hub是您的人工智能商业操作系统——一个平台集13种技能于一体。您可以寻找潜在客户、管理客户关系管理（CRM）、撰写外联邮件、跟踪电子邮件打开情况、撰写博客文章、编写视频脚本、创建广告文案，以及安排后续跟进。专为创始人打造。每月149加元。7天免费试用。

name: Good Quote
tagline: Price matching that never stores your personal details
tagline_zh: 比价服务，绝不存储您的个人信息
description: Good Quote lets you lock a quote privately and share a link. The other party only sees a price when their quote matches your acceptable range.
description_zh: Good Quote功能允许您私密锁定报价并分享链接。只有当对方的报价与您可接受的范围相匹配时，对方才会看到价格。

name: ComplianceLint
tagline: EU AI Act compliance linter that runs in your IDE
tagline_zh: 在您的集成开发环境中运行的欧盟《人工智能法案》合规性检查工具
description: Scan, attest, and document EU AI Act compliance from your IDE. 247 obligations decomposed from 44 articles, each tied to verbatim EUR-Lex citations. AI scanner handles code-verifiable obligations; Human Gates capture attestations for FRIA, Art. 14 oversight, Art. 26(7) worker notifications. Export audit-ready PDFs (Declaration of Conformity, Technical Documentation) at any time. MCP runs in your IDE — Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf. Free + source-available (BSL 1.1).
description_zh: 从您的集成开发环境（IDE）中扫描、验证并记录欧盟《人工智能法案》（EU AI Act）的合规情况。44项条款分解为247项义务，每项义务均与EUR-Lex的逐字引用相关联。人工智能扫描器处理可代码验证的义务；人工审核环节捕捉《框架条例》（FRIA）第14条监督、第26条第7款工人通知的证明材料。随时导出可供审计的PDF文件（符合性声明、技术文档）。MCP可在您的IDE中运行——Claude Code、Cursor、Windsurf。免费且提供源代码（BSL 1.1）。

name: Good Quote
tagline: Price matching that never stores your personal details
tagline_zh: 比价服务，绝不存储您的个人信息
description: Good Quote lets you lock a quote privately and share a link. The other party only sees a price when their quote matches your acceptable range.
description_zh: Good Quote允许您私下锁定报价并分享链接。只有当对方的报价与您可接受的范围相匹配时，对方才会看到价格。

name: Built For Small Business  2.0
tagline: Free invoicing, expenses and payroll for UK small businesses
tagline_zh: 为英国小企业提供免费开票、费用管理和薪资管理服务
description: Built For Small Business is a free all-in-one platform for UK small businesses, covering invoicing, expenses, payroll, and P&L reporting without a monthly subscription. Since our first launch, we've shipped Stripe invoice payments, expense tracking with accountant sharing, profit and loss reports, UK payroll, HMRC Making Tax Digital integration, and a free invoice creator that requires no account. Free forever. No catches.
description_zh: “专为小型企业打造”是一款面向英国小型企业的免费一体化平台，无需每月订阅，即可涵盖开票、费用管理、薪资管理和损益表报告等功能。自首次发布以来，我们已推出了Stripe发票支付、带会计共享的费用跟踪、损益表报告、英国薪资管理、英国税务海关总署（HMRC）的税务数字化整合服务，以及一款无需账户的免费发票生成器。永久免费。无任何附加条件。

name: IntentOne
tagline: AI that handles all of your text communication
tagline_zh: 处理你所有文本交流的人工智能
description: Copilot for communication that lives in any text field. Talk to it through text or voice. Dictate your message, it writes or polishes it. Includes context about you, who you're talking to, and where you're writing. Ask it to draft messages. "Help me follow up on that call with Alex." It pulls context from your call and shows a draft. Tracks commitments from messages and calls. Records calls. Finds the right person. Everything stored locally. Try for free at intentone.ai
description_zh: Copilot是一款适用于任何文本字段的通讯工具。您可以通过文本或语音与它交流。只需口述您的信息，它就能自动编写或润色。Copilot会记录您的个人信息、对话对象以及当前写作的上下文。您还可以要求它起草信息。“帮我跟进一下与亚历克斯的通话。”它会从您的通话中提取上下文，并显示草稿。Copilot还能追踪来自信息和通话的承诺事项，并记录通话内容。它还能帮您找到合适的人选。所有内容均本地存储。您可以在intentone.ai免费试用

name: Yapper
tagline: AI Phone Receptionist for Small Business
tagline_zh: 面向小型企业的AI电话接待员
description: Yapper is an AI phone receptionist for small service businesses. It answers calls 24/7, captures job details, flags urgent calls, and sends the owner a clean summary. Built for trades that lose jobs when calls go to voicemail. a lead.
description_zh: Yapper是一款面向小型服务企业的AI电话接待员。它全天候接听电话，记录工作详情，标记紧急电话，并向用户发送清晰的摘要。专为那些因电话转接至语音信箱而失去业务机会的行业打造。

name: MCP Context Budget
tagline: Measure and cap MCP context bloat before agents run
tagline_zh: 在代理运行之前，测量并限制MCP上下文膨胀
description: MCP Context Budget is a local-first, MIT-licensed CLI that measures how much context MCP servers and tools consume, selects a lean task-relevant tool set, writes a lockfile, and fails CI when schema or response-token budgets regress.
description_zh: MCP上下文预算是一个本地优先、采用MIT许可的命令行界面（CLI）工具，用于测量MCP服务器和工具消耗的上下文数量，选择与任务相关的精简工具集，写入锁定文件，并在模式或响应令牌预算减少时使持续集成（CI）失败。

name: Shotly - Pre-Production Software
tagline: Pre-production software with AI built in
tagline_zh: 内置人工智能的预生产软件
description: Shotly is the all-in-one pre-production platform for filmmakers. Script, shot list, scheduling, call sheets, budgeting and more - seamlessly synced in one place. Fully integrated with AI. We built Shotly because pre-production deserves proper tools - not a mess of spreadsheets and disconnected apps. Everything stays in sync, so you spend less time managing documents and more time making something worth watching.
description_zh: Shotly是电影制作人的全能前期制作平台。剧本、拍摄清单、日程安排、通告单、预算等，一切都能在一个地方无缝同步。与人工智能完全集成。我们打造Shotly，是因为前期制作值得拥有合适的工具，而不是一堆杂乱的电子表格和互不关联的应用程序。所有内容保持同步，这样你就能花更少的时间管理文档，把更多时间用在制作值得观看的作品上。

name: Edos Solutions
tagline: 9 free email, DNS, security, SEO and AI-search scanners
tagline_zh: 9款免费的电子邮件、DNS、安全、SEO和AI搜索扫描工具
description: Nine free, no-signup web tools for the things your domain and email depend on: SPF/DKIM/DMARC check, MX and DNS lookups, HTTP security-headers scan, blacklist and DNSSEC/CAA/MTA-STS checks, a 40+ check website security scan, plus on-page SEO and AI-search (GEO/AEO) scanners. All client-side, nothing logged, no account needed. The GEO/AEO scanner - grading how ready a page is for AI search - is still rare to find free. By Edos Solutions, Sydney IT specialists since 2005.
description_zh: 九款免费、无需注册的网络工具，满足您的域名和电子邮件所需：SPF/DKIM/DMARC检查、MX和DNS查找、HTTP安全头扫描、黑名单和DNSSEC/CAA/MTA-STS检查、40多项网站安全扫描，以及页面SEO和AI搜索（GEO/AEO）扫描器。全部为客户端工具，无记录，无需账户。GEO/AEO扫描器——评估页面对AI搜索的准备程度——目前免费版还不多见。由Edos Solutions提供，悉尼IT专家，始于2005年。

name: Super Session Manager
tagline: Power tools for browser tabs, sessions, URLs and tab groups
tagline_zh: 用于管理浏览器标签页、会话、网址和标签页组的强大工具
description: Super Session Manager v6 helps you save, organize, search, restore and share browser sessions with ease. Save entire windows, preserve tab groups, clean and deduplicate URLs, suspend tabs, extract domains, analyze sessions and restore your workflow instantly. Built for researchers, developers, students and power users who live with dozens (or hundreds) of tabs every day.
description_zh: Super Session Manager v6助您轻松保存、整理、搜索、恢复和分享浏览器会话。保存整个窗口、保留标签页组、清理和去重网址、挂起标签页、提取域名、分析会话并即时恢复您的工作流程。专为研究人员、开发人员、学生和每天使用数十个（甚至数百个）标签页的高级用户打造。

name: Thinkr
tagline: Run 11 named passes on the PRD you thought was done
tagline_zh: 在你认为已经完成的PRD上运行11次命名遍历
description: The AI that reviews your PRD, not just writes it. Take a spec you already shipped and thought was finished. Thinkr reads it like a senior reviewer: 11 named passes, the full rubric published so you can audit every check. Findings come back classified blocker, major, or minor and land as comments on the exact line they concern, each with a suggested rewrite you can accept inline. It ends on a deterministic score, per dimension, computed from the findings rather than a model's gut feel.
description_zh: 这个人工智能（AI）会审阅你的产品需求文档（PRD），而不仅仅是编写它。拿一个你已经提交并认为已经完成的规范来。Thinkr会像资深审阅者一样阅读它：11次有标记的通过，完整的评分标准已发布，这样你就可以审核每一项检查。反馈结果分为分类阻碍、主要或次要，并以评论的形式出现在它们所关注的行上，每条评论都附有一个你可以直接接受的修改建议。最终，它会根据每个维度的反馈结果计算出一个确定性的分数，而不是凭模型的主观感觉。

name: Tab Hibernator Pro
tagline: Sleep inactive tabs. Free RAM. Zero data sent.
tagline_zh: 休眠非活动标签页。释放内存。不发送任何数据。
description: Tab Hibernator Pro is an open-source, privacy-first Chrome extension that automatically suspends inactive tabs to free up to 80MB of RAM per tab. What makes it unique: • 🛡️ Smart Exclusions: Never suspends playing audio/video, pinned tabs, or active forms. • ⚙️ Per-Domain Rules: Set custom timeout overrides and whitelists. • 🔄 State Recovery: Restores tab URL, title, and exact scroll position on click. • 🔒 100% Local: Zero tracking, telemetry, or servers.
description_zh: Tab Hibernator Pro是一款开源的、以隐私保护为优先的Chrome扩展程序，它能自动挂起不活动的标签页，从而为每个标签页释放高达80MB的内存。其独特之处在于：• 🛡️智能排除：永远不会挂起正在播放的音频/视频、固定标签页或活动表单。• ⚙️按域规则：设置自定义超时覆盖和白名单。• 🔄状态恢复：点击时恢复标签页的URL、标题和确切滚动位置。• 🔒100%本地化：零跟踪、零遥测、无服务器。

name: Reck Connect
tagline: AI coding that never stops
tagline_zh: 永不停止的AI编码
description: Reck Connect moves your CLI coding agents off your fragile laptop. An always-on Desktop runs every Claude Code / Codex pane; your laptop is just a thin viewport over Tailscale. Close your laptop, and your agents keep running. A stoplight per pane shows which one needs you without overloading information, and you keep control over your workspace by organizing it neatly.
description_zh: Reck Connect 让您的命令行界面（CLI）编码代理脱离脆弱的笔记本电脑。一个始终在线的桌面运行每个 Claude Code / Codex 面板；您的笔记本电脑只是 Tailscale 上方的薄薄视口。关闭笔记本电脑，您的代理仍在运行。每个面板都有一个指示灯，显示哪个面板需要您的关注，同时不会信息过载，您可以通过整洁地整理工作区来保持对工作区的控制。

name: Trace
tagline: Your AI Analytics bundled up.
tagline_zh: 您的AI分析已打包完成。
description: Trace is a local-first AI observability dashboard — like Grafana for your AI CLI usage. Monitor token consumption, estimated costs, and usage trends across Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, OpenCode, Gemini CLI, Copilot CLI, and Ollama from a single unified interface.
description_zh: Trace是一个本地优先的AI可观察性仪表板，类似于用于AI命令行界面（CLI）使用的Grafana。您可以通过一个统一的界面监控Claude Code、Cursor、Codex、OpenCode、Gemini CLI、Copilot CLI和Ollama的令牌消耗、预估成本和使用趋势。

name: Gmail Username Checker
tagline: Check Gmail username availability in bulk
tagline_zh: 批量检查Gmail用户名是否可用
description: Check Gmail username availability before you choose a brand, product, or personal handle. Paste usernames or @gmail.com addresses, run the Actor, and export clean available, taken, or invalid results from the dataset.
description_zh: 在选择品牌、产品或个人账号前，请先检查Gmail用户名的可用性。粘贴用户名或@gmail.com地址，运行Actor，并从数据集中导出清晰的可用、已占用或无效结果。

name: A11y Navigation Auditor
tagline: All your structural a11y checks, in one Chrome side panel
tagline_zh: 所有结构化辅助功能检查，尽在一个Chrome侧面板中
description: Visualize your page's structure, accessible names, and live ARIA states—all in one Chrome side panel. See the information assistive tech relies on at a glance, with issues flagged automatically (error / warning / info). No overlay clutter, no DevTools digging. On-device AI guidance powered by Gemini Nano—100% local, zero data leaving your browser.
description_zh: 在Chrome侧面板中，你可以直观地看到页面的结构、可访问名称和实时ARIA状态。辅助技术所依赖的信息一目了然，问题会自动标记（错误/警告/信息）。没有叠加的混乱，无需深入开发者工具。由Gemini Nano提供设备端AI指导——100%本地化，零数据离开你的浏览器。

name: PromptStruct
tagline: Turn messy AI prompts into Structured JSON
tagline_zh: 将杂乱的AI提示转换为结构化的JSON格式
description: PromptStruct helps designers create more consistent AI-generated visuals. Paste a natural prompt, convert it into a structured schema, edit individual elements like scene, style, lighting, composition, and mood, then generate an optimized prompt for your preferred AI image tool. Instead of rewriting prompts repeatedly and wasting credits, PromptStruct gives you a structured workflow for visual iteration.
description_zh: PromptStruct助力设计师打造更为一致的人工智能生成视觉效果。只需粘贴一个自然语言提示，将其转换为结构化模式，编辑场景、风格、光线、构图和氛围等各个元素，即可为首选的人工智能图像工具生成一个优化的提示。PromptStruct为你提供了一个结构化的视觉迭代工作流程，无需反复重写提示，也无需浪费积分。

name: Applysync
tagline: Your AI-powered copilot to automate job applications.
tagline_zh: 您的人工智能副驾驶，助您自动化求职申请流程。
description: Applysync is your AI-powered job application copilot. Upload your resume once and instantly autofill complex application portals with perfectly tailored answers in one click. No more repetitive typing, no more formatting nightmares. Track every application automatically from a clean browser extension dashboard. Built for job seekers who want to out-pace the tedious manual grind and focus on landing the interview.
description_zh: Applysync是一款由人工智能驱动的求职助手。只需上传一次简历，即可一键自动填充复杂申请门户网站，并生成量身定制的完美答案。无需重复输入，也无需担心格式问题。通过简洁的浏览器扩展程序仪表板，自动跟踪每一份申请。专为那些希望摆脱繁琐手动工作、专注于获得面试机会的求职者打造。

name: DockDineFuel
tagline: Reserve your dock slip before you get on the boat
tagline_zh: 上船前，先预订好船位
description: Reserve dock space at waterfront restaurants and marinas before you turn the engine on. Real-time availability on the Intracoastal Waterway. Waterfront restaurants — manage dock reservations, availability, and bookings all in one place.
description_zh: 在启动引擎之前，请先预订海滨餐厅和码头泊位。内陆航道实时泊位可用情况一览。海滨餐厅——一站式管理码头预订、泊位可用情况和预约。

name: Dendedo - Achieve Your Goals
tagline: AI breaks your goals into daily tasks you'll actually do
tagline_zh: 人工智能将你的目标分解成你真正会去完成的日常任务
description: Dendedo is an AI anti procrastination app. You tell it a goal, and it breaks it into daily tasks - rebuilt every day based on what you actually got done. A full gamification layer (XP, streaks, mystery boxes, a cosmetic wardrobe) makes showing up feel addictive instead of like a chore. Built solo, in public, for people who set big goals but stall on day two.
description_zh: Dededo是一款人工智能防拖延应用。你只需告诉它一个目标，它就会将其分解为每日任务——并根据你实际完成的情况每天进行更新。全面的游戏化设计（经验值、连胜、神秘宝箱、装扮衣橱）让完成任务变得令人上瘾，而不再是一项苦差事。这款应用是专为那些设定了宏伟目标但在第二天就拖延的人而设计的，它既适合个人使用，也适合公共场合使用。

name: Traqcker
tagline: Know if a stock is worth it. In seconds.
tagline_zh: 几秒钟内即可了解某只股票是否值得投资。
description: Traqcker gives you a quality score, fair value estimate, and community Buy/Hold/Sell votes for 8,000+ US stocks — no spreadsheet, no finance degree. Search a ticker, get the answer in seconds. Free forever.
description_zh: Traqcker为您提供8000多只美国股票的质量评分、公允价值估算以及社区买入/持有/卖出投票结果——无需电子表格，也无需金融学位。只需搜索股票代码，几秒钟内即可获得答案。永久免费。

name: BarkodSis
tagline: Reliable POS & Barcode Software, trusted since 2007
tagline_zh: 可靠的POS和条形码软件，自2007年以来备受信赖
description: BarkodSis is a powerful POS and barcode sales software trusted by 4,300+ retail businesses since 2007. It provides seamless inventory tracking, retail management, and fast checkout solutions. BarkodSis; mağaza ve esnaflar için barkodlu satış programı, hızlı satış ve stok takip yazılımları sunar. 2007'den beri 4.300+ işletmeye güvenilir perakende satış programı ve POS çözümleri sağlıyoruz. Try our free demo!
description_zh: BarkodSis是一款强大的POS和条码销售软件，自2007年以来，已获得4,300多家零售企业的信赖。它提供无缝的库存跟踪、零售管理以及快速结账解决方案。BarkodSis是专为商店和店铺设计的条码销售程序，提供快速销售和库存跟踪软件。自2007年以来，我们一直为4,300多家企业提供可靠的零售销售程序和POS解决方案。快来试试我们的免费演示吧！

name: Hairstyle View
tagline: AI-powered hairstyle visualizer for salons
tagline_zh: 面向沙龙的AI发型可视化工具
description: Transform the salon consultation experience with hyper-realistic AI hairstyle previews. Let your clients see their transformation before the first cut.
description_zh: 通过超逼真的AI发型预览，革新沙龙咨询体验。让你的客户在第一次剪发前就能看到自己的变化。

name: 5sdesign
tagline: Curated AI design prompts for building sites with AI
tagline_zh: 为使用人工智能构建网站而精心策划的人工智能设计提示
description: 5sdesign is a curated library of AI design prompts. Paste one into Claude, Cursor, v0 or Lovable and get a polished, production-ready website — not a generic template. Every showcase ships with a matching DESIGN.md so your next pages stay on-brand. 50 prompts, 29 free.
description_zh: 5sdesign是一个经过精心策划的人工智能设计提示库。将其中一个提示粘贴到Claude、Cursor v0或Lovable中，即可获得一个经过打磨、可直接投入生产的网站——而非通用模板。每个展示页面都附带一个匹配的DESIGN.md文件，确保您的后续页面保持品牌一致。50个提示，29个免费。

name: BeamDrop
tagline: Direct iPhone to PC transfer. No cloud, no cable.
tagline_zh: 直接从iPhone传输到PC。无需云服务，无需数据线。
description: BeamDrop turns your iPhone into a local file server so any PC or Mac browser can download photos and videos instantly. No cable, no cloud, no account, and no desktop app. Pick files in BeamDrop, open the local URL on your computer, then download one by one or all at once. Works on Wi-Fi or Personal Hotspot. Transfers stay on your local network for privacy.
description_zh: BeamDrop将您的iPhone变成一个本地文件服务器，这样任何PC或Mac浏览器都可以立即下载照片和视频。无需线缆、无需云服务、无需账户，也无需桌面应用程序。在BeamDrop中选择文件，在您的计算机上打开本地URL，然后逐一下载或一次性全部下载。支持Wi-Fi或个人热点。传输过程始终在您的本地网络上进行，以确保隐私。

name: Comperge
tagline: The infinite-scaling, 100% client-side code diffing engine.
tagline_zh: 无限扩展、100% 客户端代码差异检测引擎。
description: An ultra-performant, 100% client-side code comparison tool. Compare a reference file against infinite targets with zero server lag, real-time consensus mapping, and syntax highlighting.
description_zh: 一款超高性能的100%客户端代码比较工具。可将参考文件与无数目标文件进行对比，无服务器延迟，支持实时共识映射和语法高亮显示。

name: Lexacore
tagline: AI-powered legal intelligence for Indian businesses.
tagline_zh: 为印度企业提供基于人工智能的法律智能服务。
description: Lexacore delivers law-firm grade intelligence — contract analysis, compliance monitoring, and litigation strategy — in one AI-powered platform built for Indian businesses.
description_zh: Lexacore通过一个专为印度企业打造的人工智能平台，提供律师事务所级别的智能服务——合同分析、合规监控和诉讼策略。

name: Bye bye world
tagline: The all-in-one workspace that actually knows your company
tagline_zh: 真正了解你公司的多功能一体化工作空间
description: Bye-bye World replaces Slack, Jira, Zoom, your calendar, docs, and HR tool with one connected workspace — built for fast teams. What's different: an AI that actually knows your company. Ask it anything, get answers sourced from your own chats, tasks, and docs. Meetings become action items automatically. New hires ramp by reading history, not chasing people. One workspace. One bill. Live in under 30 Sec — not 12 weeks.
description_zh: Bye-bye World用一个专为高效团队打造的互联工作空间取代了Slack、Jira、Zoom、你的日历、文档和人力资源工具。与众不同之处在于：它搭载了一个真正了解你公司的AI。你可以向它提问任何问题，它会从你自己的聊天、任务和文档中获取答案。会议内容会自动转化为待办事项。新员工可以通过阅读历史记录快速上手，而无需四处询问。一个工作空间，一张账单。30秒内即可上手，无需12周。

name: Islamic Journal - Muhasaba
tagline: Quran-guided journaling for the modern Muslim.
tagline_zh: 为现代穆斯林提供的以《古兰经》为指导的日记。
description: Muhasaba is the classical Islamic practice of daily self-accounting — reviewing your deeds and intentions before sleep. This app guides you through it in five minutes. After Isha prayer: write or speak your reflection → receive a verse from the Quran chosen for what you shared → an insight into your day → one small action for tomorrow → a dhikr to close. Your entries are encrypted and private. They are never used to train AI — not ours, not anyone else’s.
description_zh: 穆哈萨巴（Muhasaba）是伊斯兰教传统的每日自我反省仪式——在睡前回顾自己的行为和意图。这款应用可在五分钟内引导你完成这一过程。晚祷后：写下或说出你的反思→收到《古兰经》中为你所分享内容所选的一节经文→回顾你的一天→为明天制定一个小行动→以念诵一段祈祷词作为结束。你的记录是加密且私密的。它们绝不会被用来训练人工智能——无论是我们的还是其他任何人的。

name: Planify AI
tagline: The AI planner for overwhelmed minds
tagline_zh: 为疲惫不堪的大脑打造的AI规划师
description: Planify AI untangles your chaotic thoughts and gives you 3 calm, actionable steps for today. Built specifically for burnout prevention, it includes a free-flowing Brain Dump, an emergency Panic Mode, and gamified habit tracking to keep your mind clear.
description_zh: Planify AI能整理你混乱的思绪，为你提供3个平静且可执行的今日步骤。它专为预防职业倦怠而设计，包括自由流畅的头脑风暴、紧急恐慌模式和游戏化的习惯追踪，以保持你的思维清晰。

name: HyperChrono
tagline: Create Free Timelapse Videos with a Built-in Stopwatch
tagline_zh: 使用内置秒表创建免费的延时摄影视频
description: Create time-lapse videos that show exactly how long something took, with a real stopwatch built into every frame. Videos save straight to your camera roll. You choose how long the timelapse will be, so it's perfect for sharing on social medial. Free, no ads. Available in the Apple App Store.
description_zh: 制作时间延时视频，每一帧都内置一个真正的秒表，精确显示某件事花费的时间。视频直接保存到您的手机相册。您可以选择时间延时的长度，非常适合在社交媒体上分享。免费、无广告。可在苹果应用商店下载。

name: handa
tagline: The easiest and fastest way to find your unclaimed royalties
tagline_zh: 找到您未领取的版税的最简单、最快捷的方法
description: handa is made to serve songwriters and producers, putting them first. This is built by the creators, for the creators. With just your name and IPI, handa will tell you the money the industry owes you, and then we recover it. Low friction. Just type your details into the platform and in seconds, we audit the actual ground-truth rights data the industry itself uses to decide who gets paid, and show you exactly what's unclaimed with your name on it.
description_zh: Handa旨在为词曲作者和制作人服务，将他们置于首位。这是由创作者打造，为创作者服务的平台。只需提供您的姓名和国际出版商识别码（IPI），Handa就会告诉您该行业欠您的钱款，然后我们会帮您追回。流程顺畅。只需在平台上输入您的详细信息，几秒钟内，我们就会审核该行业自身用来决定谁应获得报酬的实际版权数据，并准确展示您名下未领取的款项。

name: Mimo - Your Personal AI Assistant
tagline: Stop switching tabs. Ask Mimo instead.
tagline_zh: 别再切换标签页了。去问问米莫吧。
description: Meet Mimo, your open-source Google Workspace teammate. Most AI tools make you open another tab. Mimo lives directly in your browser sidebar, deeply connected to your Gmail, Drive, Calendar, and Tasks. Instantly summarize emails, search docs, check your next meeting, or add to-dos via natural language. Stop breaking your flow. Ask Mimo instead.
description_zh: 来认识一下Mimo吧，它是你的开源Google Workspace团队伙伴。大多数人工智能工具都需要你打开另一个标签页。而Mimo则直接存在于你的浏览器侧边栏中，与你的Gmail、云端硬盘、日历和任务深度连接。你可以通过自然语言立即总结电子邮件、搜索文档、查看下一个会议或添加待办事项。别再打断你的工作流程了。问问Mimo吧。

name: infuseOS
tagline: Track AI visibility. Fix what matters.
tagline_zh: 追踪人工智能的可见性。修复重要问题。
description: Show up in AI answers, not just search results. InfuseOS tracks AI visibility, creates growth actions, and automates the work.
description_zh: 在人工智能答案中展现，而不仅仅是搜索结果中。InfuseOS追踪人工智能的可见性，制定增长策略，并自动化相关工作。

name: RoadFolio
tagline: Run your whole business from one app
tagline_zh: 通过一个应用管理您的全部业务
description: RoadFolio is the all in one business app for contractors and freelancers. GPS mileage tracking, invoicing, expense management, and the RoadBuddy AI voice assistant. Free on iOS and Android.
description_zh: RoadFolio是一款专为承包商和自由职业者打造的一站式商务应用。它集GPS里程追踪、发票开具、费用管理以及RoadBuddy AI语音助手于一体。iOS和Android用户均可免费使用。

name: PlanLIFT
tagline: AI visualisation for the built environment.
tagline_zh: 建筑环境的AI可视化。
description: Upload a floorplan, masterplan or layout drawing and Planlift returns a shareable AI-generated 3D visual in seconds. Built for architects, planners and developers.
description_zh: 上传平面图、总体规划图或布局图，Planlift可在几秒钟内生成可分享的AI生成3D视觉效果图。专为建筑师、规划师和开发商打造。

name: PauseSweep
tagline: Automatically remove pauses from videos on macOS
tagline_zh: 在macOS上自动去除视频中的停顿
description: PauseSweep automatically finds and cuts the pauses, silence and dead air out of your videos and podcasts. Hours of editing down to a minute. Works offline on your Mac.
description_zh: PauseSweep能自动找出并剪掉视频和播客中的停顿、静音和空白时段。数小时的编辑工作，只需一分钟即可完成。在Mac上可离线使用。

name: Scan Pro Receipts
tagline: Offline receipt scanner — lifetime pricing, easy reporting
tagline_zh: 离线收据扫描仪——终身定价，轻松报告
description: Scan Pro Receipts: offline Android receipt scanner with on-device OCR, fiscal periods, and PDF/CSV/ZIP exports. Review every field before saving. Works without mobile data. Back up to folders you control. 60-day full trial, then USD 29.99 lifetime—no subscription or cloud AI. Built for freelancers, small business, and field sales who email reports to the office plus much more!
description_zh: Scan Pro收据：离线安卓收据扫描仪，配备设备内OCR、会计期间和PDF/CSV/ZIP导出功能。保存前请检查每个字段。无需移动数据即可工作。备份到您控制的文件夹。60天完整试用，之后终身29.99美元——无需订阅或云端AI。专为自由职业者、小型企业和现场销售人员打造，他们通过电子邮件向办公室发送报告，还有更多功能！

name: Xreply
tagline: Grow on X (Twitter) with smart, context aware AI replies.
tagline_zh: 借助智能、情境感知的AI回复，在X（Twitter）上实现增长。
description: Xreply is an AI powered assistant for X that monitors target accounts, generates natural replies in real time, and schedules them safely to grow your engagement.
description_zh: Xreply是一款由AI驱动的X助手，它能监控目标账户，实时生成自然回复，并安全地安排回复，以提升您的互动度。

name: QueckBiz
tagline: Free invoice & receipt generator. No signup.
tagline_zh: 免费发票和收据生成器。无需注册。
description: Create professional invoices, receipts, estimates, quotes, proposals & delivery notes for free. No signup, no data storage — 100% private browser-based tools.
description_zh: 免费创建专业发票、收据、估价单、报价单、提案和送货单。无需注册，无数据存储——100%基于浏览器的私密工具。

name: Mock Data Generator
tagline: Paste real JSON, get 1,000 coherent rows that match it
tagline_zh: 粘贴真实的JSON数据，获取与之匹配的1000行连贯数据
description: A free, privacy-first mock data generator for developers that creates coherent, reproducible datasets. Generate data using a field picker, a pasted JSON sample, or JSON Schema. Emails, locations, and timestamps stay logically consistent. Use a seed for identical output every time. Export unlimited JSON, NDJSON, or CSV. Runs entirely client-side, works offline, and requires no signup.
description_zh: 一款面向开发者的免费、隐私优先的模拟数据生成器，可创建连贯、可复现的数据集。用户可通过字段选择器、粘贴的JSON示例或JSON模式来生成数据。电子邮件、位置和时间戳在逻辑上保持一致。每次使用种子可获得相同的输出。可导出无限量的JSON、NDJSON或CSV格式数据。该工具完全在客户端运行，支持离线使用，且无需注册。

name: Free QR Code Generator
tagline: Free QR codes for URLs, WiFi & more
tagline_zh: 免费为网址、WiFi等生成二维码
description: Create QR codes online for free! No signup, no watermarks, no limits. Generate codes for URLs, text, email, phone numbers, and WiFi, then customize colors, size, and error correction. Download as PNG or SVG, or copy to the clipboard. Everything runs 100% in your browser, so your data (even WiFi passwords) never leaves your device. A simple, private alternative to QR Monkey and Adobe's QR generator.
description_zh: 免费在线生成二维码！无需注册，无水印，无限制。为网址、文本、电子邮件、电话号码和WiFi生成二维码，然后自定义颜色、大小和纠错级别。下载为PNG或SVG格式，或复制到剪贴板。所有操作均在浏览器中100%完成，因此您的数据（甚至是WiFi密码）永远不会离开您的设备。这是QR Monkey和Adobe二维码生成器的简单、私密的替代品。

name: RowSink
tagline: Send Data Straight to Your Spreadsheet
tagline_zh: 将数据直接发送到您的电子表格
description: Connect a Google Sheets spreadsheet, get a URL, and send form submissions, webhook payloads, signups, and app events straight into rows. No backend to build or maintain.
description_zh: 连接Google Sheets电子表格，获取URL，并将表单提交、网络钩子有效负载、注册信息和应用程序事件直接发送到行中。无需构建或维护后端。

name: MyCalculators.app
tagline: 200+ free, ad-free calculators for finance, health & math
tagline_zh: 200+款免费、无广告的金融、健康和数学计算器
description: MyCalculators.app offers 200+ free online calculators across finance, health, and math — mortgage, loan, BMI, tax, retirement, percentage, and more. What makes it different: completely ad-free, no signup, no tracking, and no personal data collected. Fast, mobile-friendly, and built on precise, up-to-date formulas. Just open and calculate.
description_zh: MyCalculators.app提供200多种免费在线计算器，涵盖金融、健康和数学领域——包括房贷、贷款、BMI、税务、退休、百分比等。其与众不同之处在于：完全无广告、无需注册、无追踪、不收集个人数据。该应用快速、适合移动设备使用，且基于精确且最新的公式构建。只需打开即可计算。

name: Waivly Refer - 25% Recurring Commission
tagline: Earn recurring commission by introducing people to Waivly
tagline_zh: 通过向他人介绍Waivly，赚取持续的佣金
description: 25% Recurring Commission On All Future Referrals Unlock access to our Affiliate Program to earn passive income from new members you bring in.
description_zh: 所有未来推荐人将获得25%的持续佣金。加入我们的联盟计划，即可通过您带来的新会员获得被动收入。

tagline_zh: 用人工智能将创意转化为歌曲

description_zh: Song Flow是一款由人工智能驱动的应用程序，用户可以在几秒钟内创作原创歌曲、生成音乐视频、混音曲目，并将创意转化为音乐。

It includes calculators and guides for house cleaning, move-in and move-out cleaning, carpet cleaning, rug cleaning, upholstery cleaning, lawn care, pressure washing, gutter cleaning, junk removal, dog grooming, and auto detailing. It also includes business pricing tools for service owners to review pricing, profit, hourly rates, and packages.
description_zh: 服务定价工具是一个免费的计算器库，用于在预订前估算本地服务费用。它包括房屋清洁、入住和退房清洁、地毯清洁、小地毯清洁、室内装饰清洁、草坪护理、高压清洗、排水沟清洁、垃圾清理、狗狗美容和汽车美容的计算器和指南。此外，它还为服务业主提供了业务定价工具，用于审查定价、利润、小时费率和套餐。

name: TrainedTeam
tagline: The AI-native LMS for SOPs, training & proof of work.
tagline_zh: 面向标准操作流程（SOPs）、培训和工作量证明的人工智能原生学习管理系统（LMS）。
description: TrainedTeam is the single home for every SOP, every shift run, and every signed completion. Most tools do half the job - an LMS trains but can't prove work happened; doc tools store SOPs but never test anyone. TrainedTeam closes the loop. Turn a video into a step-by-step SOP with AI, add a knowledge check, then schedule and assign it. Your team runs each step on the job, capturing photo proof and e-signatures for an audit-ready trail and live analytics. Free for up to 5 users.
description_zh: TrainedTeam是每个标准操作流程（SOP）、每次轮班运行和每次签名完成的唯一归宿。大多数工具只能完成一半的工作——学习管理系统（LMS）可以进行培训，但无法证明工作已经完成；文档工具可以存储标准操作流程，但从不测试任何人。TrainedTeam则实现了闭环。利用人工智能将视频转化为详细的步骤式标准操作流程，添加知识检查，然后安排并分配任务。您的团队可以执行工作中的每个步骤，同时捕捉照片证据和电子签名，以备审计和实时分析。最多可供5名用户免费使用。

description: Margin turns your browser's side panel into a swipeable stack of news cards — pick your topics, read a headline + short summary, tap through to the source. No feed to scroll, no tracking, no account. Free for 3 topics; Plus unlocks the rest.
description_zh: Margin将浏览器的侧边栏变成了一堆可滑动的新闻卡片——选择你的话题，阅读标题和简短摘要，点击即可跳转到来源。无需滚动浏览信息流，无需追踪，无需账号。前三个话题免费；Plus可解锁其余内容。

name: better-paas v1.8.4
tagline: Deploy like Vercel but full-stack applications + databases
tagline_zh: 像Vercel一样部署，但针对的是全栈应用程序和数据库
description: Why this ? There are already Vercel, Railways, Coolify, Dokploy and 100 more. Glad you asked. Those are great. But Some feels too many features, outdated and other just suck your bank balance when your project get more and more users. I tried to balance those. No surprise bills, No Vendor lock. You own your VPS, data and everything. You are responsible when things goes wrong. 😅
description_zh: 为什么选择这个？市面上已经有Vercel、Railways、Coolify、Dokploy等100多种工具了。很高兴你问到。那些工具都很棒。但有些功能太多，有些已经过时，还有一些会在你的项目用户越来越多时吸干你的银行余额。我试图在这些之间找到平衡。没有意外的账单，没有供应商锁定。你拥有自己的VPS、数据和一切。如果出了问题，你要自己负责。

name: Valkence Connect - Your Unfair Advantage
tagline: Connecting talent, brands, and attention in one place
tagline_zh: 将人才、品牌和关注度汇聚一处
description: We just launched Valkence Connect, and we are building it to be your absolute unfair advantage for scaling influence, growing your brand, and locking down much bigger opportunities. The whole idea here is to completely rethink how talent, brands, and attention intersect by bringing everyone into one centralized ecosystem.
description_zh: 我们刚刚推出了Valkence Connect，我们致力于将其打造成为您扩大影响力、提升品牌知名度以及锁定更多重大机遇的绝对优势。此举的核心思想在于，通过将各方汇聚于一个中心化的生态系统，彻底重塑人才、品牌和注意力之间的相互交织方式。

name: Listora
tagline: Optimize Etsy listings with AI in seconds
tagline_zh: 几秒钟内即可利用人工智能优化Etsy商品列表
description: Optimize your Etsy listings with AI in seconds — generate SEO-optimized titles, descriptions, and tags that actually rank. Get real keyword data, audit existing listings with a score and fix list, analyze competitors to find gaps, and bulk-optimize up to 20 listings at once. All free to try, no sign-up required. Most Etsy tools give you generic suggestions. Listora combines real Google search data with AI to show you exactly what buyers search — so your listings get found, not just written.
description_zh: 几秒钟内即可使用人工智能优化您的Etsy商品列表——生成真正能排名的SEO优化标题、描述和标签。获取真实的关键字数据，通过评分和修复列表来审核现有商品列表，分析竞争对手以发现差距，并一次批量优化多达20个商品列表。全部免费试用，无需注册。大多数Etsy工具只能为您提供通用建议。Listora将真实的谷歌搜索数据与人工智能相结合，向您展示买家实际搜索的内容——这样您的商品列表不仅能被写出来，还能被找到。
