tagline: Interactive arcade flashcards with global leaderboards.
tagline_zh: 带有全球排行榜的互动街机抽认卡。
description: Flash 'n' Dash is a dynamic learning game that turns flashcards into an arcade experience. Master topics in discovery mode, then test your reflexes in a timed arcade mode. What sets us apart? You can compete on global leaderboards for every deck to earn Gold, Silver, and Bronze medals! With daily streaks and a playful, vibrant design, learning finally feels like a game instead of homework.
description_zh: 《Flash 'n' Dash》是一款动态学习游戏，它将闪卡学习转化为街机体验。在探索模式中掌握主题，然后在限时街机模式中测试你的反应速度。我们的独特之处在于，你可以在每副牌的全球排行榜上竞争，获得金、银、铜牌！凭借每日连胜和俏皮、充满活力的设计，学习终于像游戏一样有趣，而不是像作业那么枯燥。

name: CentSight
tagline: Your AI CFO
tagline_zh: 您的人工智能首席财务官
description: CentSight is the AI CFO for businesses doing $1M–$50M in revenue. Connect QuickBooks and your bank via Plaid in minutes, then ask your finances anything in plain English and get real-time, CFO-grade answers. Track runway and burn rate automatically, get proactive alerts when something needs attention, and catch hidden costs like duplicate charges and vendor spend creep before they hurt. No spreadsheets, no month-old reports - just financial clarity, at a fraction of the cost of a fractional CFO.
description_zh: CentSight是专为营收在100万至5000万美元之间的企业打造的AI首席财务官（CFO）助手。只需几分钟，即可通过Plaid连接QuickBooks和您的银行账户，然后以通俗易懂的语言向您的财务系统提问，即可获得实时、CFO级别的专业解答。系统会自动跟踪现金流和烧钱速度，在需要关注时主动发出警报，并在重复收费和供应商支出悄然增加等隐性成本造成损害之前及时发现。无需电子表格，也无需等待一个月的报告——只需花费零碎CFO成本的一小部分，即可获得财务上的清晰度。

name: Landra
tagline: Weirdly Good AI Advertorial & Listicle LPs for DTC Brands
tagline_zh: 面向DTC品牌的奇特好用的AI软文和列表式文章
description: Landra writes the advertorials and listicle landing pages that convert cold paid traffic: the editorial-style pages that warm a visitor up instead of hard-selling them. It takes 3 minutes and you just have to give us your product URL. It will and structure a full page, with all the context of your brand and product, and with imagery in minutes. Built on one rule: educate, build trust, then convert. Made for DTC founders, media buyers, and agencies. getlandra.com
description_zh: Landra撰写能够转化冷付费流量的社论式软文和列表式落地页：这些编辑风格的页面能够为访客营造温馨氛围，而非直接推销。只需3分钟，您只需提供您的产品网址。它将在几分钟内为您构建一个完整的页面，其中包含您品牌和产品的所有背景信息，并配以相关图片。其构建原则只有一个：教育受众，建立信任，然后实现转化。专为DTC创始人、媒体买家和代理商打造。getlandra.com

name: Ugh, What Should I Eat?
tagline: Fun way to decide what to cook or order in
tagline_zh: 决定做什么菜或点什么菜的一种有趣方式
description: Swipe your way out of "what should I eat?" Snap your ingredients for instant recipes, or find a tasty dish to order nearby. COOK IN: make something with what you already have ORDER IN: find the perfect thing to order WHY YOU'LL LOVE IT - Instant recipes from the ingredients you already have - Discover dishes to order from nearby restaurants - Save your favorites to My Food - Smarter suggestions the more you swipe - Built around your diet, allergies, and cuisines
description_zh: 滑动屏幕，轻松解决“我该吃什么？”的问题。快速获取食材，制作即刻食谱，或查找附近可点的美味佳肴。烹饪：用现有食材制作美食；点餐：找到最完美的菜品。为何你会爱上它？——根据已有食材生成即刻食谱；发现附近餐厅的可点菜品；将最爱菜品保存至“我的美食”；滑动越多，智能建议越精准。根据您的饮食偏好、过敏信息和口味偏好量身定制

name: Tinswin Dev Toolkit — Apitron + CacheBin
tagline: Two macOS dev tools, built to fix small daily friction.
tagline_zh: 两个macOS开发工具，旨在解决日常使用中的小困扰。
description: Apitron v1.1.3 — a leaner Postman for macOS. Imports no longer wipe your local edits; conflicts are visible and controllable. CacheBin 1.0.0 — dev cache cleaner that actually knows DerivedData, SPM, Docker, npm. Preview everything before anything goes.
description_zh: Apitron v1.1.3 — 一款适用于macOS的精简版Postman。导入操作不再会清除本地编辑内容；冲突情况一目了然且可控。CacheBin 1.0.0 — 一款开发缓存清理工具，真正了解DerivedData、SPM、Docker、npm。在执行任何操作前，均可预览所有内容。

name: Veloxa
tagline: AI chatbot that books, answers & manages customers 24/7
tagline_zh: 24/7预订、解答和管理客户的AI聊天机器人
description: Veloxa AI is a smart chat widget any business can add to their website with one line of code. It handles customer queries, appointment bookings, rescheduling and cancellations — automatically, 24/7. No extra staff needed. ✅ Works in English, & other Languages ✅ Live dashboard — see all bookings & conversations ✅ Supports any business type — clinic, salon, restaurant, ecommerce ✅ 7-day free trial, no card required Setup in 60 seconds. Your AI receptionist, always online.
description_zh: Veloxa AI是一款智能聊天小部件，任何企业只需一行代码即可将其添加到自己的网站上。它能够自动处理客户咨询、预约、重新安排和取消预约，全天候服务。无需额外员工。✅支持英语和其他语言✅实时控制面板——查看所有预约和对话✅支持任何业务类型——诊所、沙龙、餐厅、电商✅7天免费试用，无需信用卡60秒完成设置。你的AI接待员，始终在线。

name: Peek
tagline: A quiet macOS menu bar switcher for keyboard-heavy work.
tagline_zh: 一个适用于键盘密集型工作的macOS菜单栏切换器，操作安静。
description: Peek helps Mac users switch between apps and windows without opening a heavy workspace tool. The core switcher is free, with Pro for unlimited favorites, hidden apps, layout control, and direct license activation.
description_zh: Peek可帮助Mac用户在不打开繁重的工作区工具的情况下，在应用程序和窗口之间进行切换。核心切换器是免费的，而Pro版则提供无限制收藏夹、隐藏应用程序、布局控制以及直接许可证激活功能。

name: Tinswin Dev Toolkit — Apitron + CacheBin
tagline: Two macOS dev tools, built to fix small daily friction.
tagline_zh: 两个macOS开发工具，旨在解决日常使用中的小问题。
description: Apitron v1.1.3 — a leaner Postman for macOS. Imports no longer wipe your local edits; conflicts are visible and controllable. CacheBin 1.0.0 — dev cache cleaner that actually knows DerivedData, SPM, Docker, npm. Preview everything before anything goes.
description_zh: Apitron v1.1.3 — macOS 上的精简版 Postman。导入操作不再清除本地编辑内容；冲突情况一目了然且可控。CacheBin 1.0.0 — 开发缓存清理工具，真正了解 DerivedData、SPM、Docker、npm。在执行任何操作前预览所有内容。

name: QuantX
tagline: Learn financial markets, the smart way
tagline_zh: 以聪明的方式学习金融市场
description: QuantX is the first gamified app to master financial markets. Black-Scholes, Greeks, VaR, CAPM and derivatives, turned into bite-sized, interactive lessons. Built for Master's students at top business schools and professionals preparing the AMF certification. No direct competitor combines advanced market finance, gamification and mobile format. Content reviewed by leading finance professors in France.
description_zh: QuantX是首款掌握金融市场的游戏化应用。它将布莱克-斯科尔斯模型、希腊值、风险值、资本资产定价模型和衍生品等知识，转化为易于理解的互动课程。该应用专为顶尖商学院的研究生和准备AMF认证的专业人士打造。目前尚无直接竞争对手能将高级市场金融、游戏化和移动格式完美结合。内容经过法国顶尖金融学教授的审核。

name: SuperAI
tagline: Control remote AI workstations from one workspace
tagline_zh: 从一个工作区控制远程人工智能工作站
description: SuperAI is a remote AI workstation control center that brings OpenClaw, Codex, Claude Code, and R-Desktop into one workspace. Connect your own computers as AI workstations, manage multiple accounts or projects, run long research and coding tasks, monitor node status, and access remote desktops when manual control is needed. Available on Web, Windows EXE, and Android APK, SuperAI helps teams turn scattered AI tools and remote machines into one manageable system.
description_zh: SuperAI是一个远程人工智能工作站控制中心，它将OpenClaw、Codex、Claude Code和R-Desktop整合到一个工作空间中。您可以将自己的计算机作为人工智能工作站进行连接，管理多个账户或项目，执行长时间的研究和编码任务，监控节点状态，并在需要手动控制时访问远程桌面。SuperAI支持Web、Windows EXE和Android APK三种形式，可帮助团队将分散的AI工具和远程机器整合成一个易于管理的系统。

name: AIVory Smart Inference
tagline: Cheaper inference. One URL. No code changes.
tagline_zh: 推理成本更低。只需一个URL，无需更改代码。
description: Providers cut prices all the time — your bill pays like they don't. Smart Inference reroutes every LLM call to the cheapest provider serving the same model, in real time. Drop-in OpenAI-compatible: swap one URL, keep your SDK, prompts, and streaming. 50+ models, pay-as-you-go from $10, credits never expire, no subscription. Median ~30% savings, up to 89% on open-weight models. Or self-host — spin up spot GPUs in one click and route to them through the same endpoint.
description_zh: 提供商一直在降价——而你的账单却像没降价一样。Smart Inference会实时将每个大型语言模型（LLM）调用重新路由到提供相同模型且价格最便宜的提供商。即插即用，兼容OpenAI：只需更换一个URL，即可保留你的软件开发工具包（SDK）、提示和流媒体。50多个模型，按需付费，最低10美元起，信用额度永不过期，无需订阅。平均节省约30%，对于开放权重模型可节省高达89%。或者选择自托管——一键启动Spot GPU，并通过同一端点将流量路由到它们。

name: RestockAlerts
tagline: Catch Hermes bag restocks before they vanish
tagline_zh: 抢在爱马仕包包售罄前补货
description: Hermes drops move fast. RestockAlerts watches selected bag families like Picotin, Evelyne, Bolide, and Herbag, then emails you when they appear online — so you can stop refreshing and act before they disappear.
description_zh: 爱马仕新品上架速度很快。RestockAlerts会监控选定的包款系列，如Picotin、Evelyne、Bolide和Herbag，并在这些包款上线时向您发送电子邮件——这样您就不必频繁刷新页面，可以在包款售罄前及时下单。

name: Tambola Host
tagline: Play Together, Not on Screens
tagline_zh: 一起玩，不要盯着屏幕
description: Tambola Host is a free browser-based toolkit for hosting Tambola (Housie/Bingo) games at family gatherings, office events, schools, and community celebrations. 🎤 Smart voice caller 🎟️ Instant ticket generator 🏆 Prize planning tools 📊 Leaderboards & rewards 📱 Works directly in your browser No downloads. No sign-ups. Just open and start hosting memorable Tambola games in minutes. Play together. Not on screens.
description_zh: Tambola Host是一款基于浏览器的免费工具包，用于在家庭聚会、办公室活动、学校和社区庆典中主持Tambola（Housie/宾果）游戏。🎤智能语音呼叫器🎟️即时门票生成器🏆奖品规划工具📊排行榜与奖励📱直接在浏览器中运行无需下载。无需注册。只需打开即可在几分钟内主持令人难忘的Tambola游戏。一起游戏。无需屏幕。

name: theoinvest
tagline: Turn your idea, codebase or website into a financial model
tagline_zh: 将你的想法、代码库或网站转化为财务模型
description: Describe your startup and Theo builds a bottoms up financial model investors actually trust, a formula driven Excel workbook and a branded PDF, ready to send. It's free. Bring your own AI key, plug into our MCP server, and watch your financials materialize in seconds. Share it with an investor straight from the platform and unlock a hyper tuned AI tool like Theo, powered by hitheo.ai, as your Assistant CFO ready to field every question they throw at you
description_zh: 描述您的初创公司，Theo会构建一个投资者真正信赖的自下而上的财务模型，一个由公式驱动的Excel工作簿和一个带有品牌的PDF，随时可以发送。这是免费的。带上您自己的AI密钥，接入我们的MCP服务器，几秒钟内就能看到您的财务数据。直接从平台与投资者分享，并解锁一个由hitheo.ai驱动的超调优AI工具，如Theo，作为您的助理首席财务官，随时准备回答他们抛给您的每一个问题

name: TradeChains
tagline: Trace every player moved in a trade and see who actually won
tagline_zh: 追踪每位参与者在交易中的一举一动，看看谁真正赢了
description: Sports trades are never just two teams swapping players. Every deal kicks off a chain of players being swapped, picks getting moved and prospects switching teams get moved again. The true winner or value isn't shown or obvious until years later. TradeChains lets you follow those chains all the way down. Pick any trade, map every downstream move it triggered, and compare the career value generated on each side.
description_zh: 体育交易从来不仅仅是两支球队交换球员那么简单。每一笔交易都会引发一系列的球员交换、选秀权变动以及前景球员再次转队。真正的赢家或价值在多年后才会显现或变得明显。TradeChains让你能够全程追踪这些交易链。选择任何一笔交易，映射它所触发的每一个下游动作，并比较双方所创造的职业生涯价值。

name: Snapmarks
tagline: Turn every new tab into a launchpad
tagline_zh: 将每个新标签页都变成一个启动板
description: Snapmarks replaces your blank new tab with a fast, visual speed dial for the sites you use most. Organize bookmarks into color-coded categories and tags, search instantly as you type, and launch anything in one click. Private by design — everything stays on your device, no account required. Free tier includes the full speed dial, search, and organization; Pro adds auto-sync across devices, auto-backup, and nested categories.
description_zh: Snapmarks用快速、直观的快速拨号功能替换您空白的新标签页，方便您快速访问最常用的网站。您可以将书签按颜色分类和标记，边输入边搜索，一键启动任何内容。设计注重隐私——所有内容都保存在您的设备上，无需注册账户。免费版包含完整的快速拨号、搜索和组织功能；专业版增加了跨设备自动同步、自动备份和嵌套分类功能。

name: AAC Without Expensive Hardware
tagline: Voxetu – Smart AAC for ALS, Stroke, Autism, and CP
tagline_zh: Voxetu——面向肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）、中风、自闭症和脑瘫（CP）的智能AAC（辅助沟通）设备
description: Voxetu is a free AAC communication toolkit for people with ALS, Cerebral Palsy, Stroke, Parkinson's and Autism. World-first breath detection and gaze keyboard. Sign language recognition. Smart predictions, emotion board, voice banking, carer dashboard. Free forever plan. By PISRO Consultancy Pvt. Ltd.
description_zh: Voxetu是一款专为肌萎缩侧索硬化症（ALS）、脑瘫、中风、帕金森氏症和自闭症患者设计的免费AAC（辅助沟通）工具包。该工具包具备全球首创的呼吸检测和视线键盘功能，支持手语识别，提供智能预测、情绪板、语音银行和护理者仪表板等功能。该工具包提供永久免费方案。由PISRO Consultancy Pvt. Ltd.开发。

name: Caspi AI
tagline: Your AI calisthenics coach
tagline_zh: 你的AI健身教练
description: Caspi AI is an AI-powered calisthenics coach that analyzes your skills from video and gives instant feedback. Upload a clip of your handstand, planche, front lever, muscle-up, and more to receive scores for form, control, stability, and execution, along with personalized coaching tips. Unlike generic fitness apps, Caspi is built specifically to help athletes improve calisthenics skills through video analysis and progress tracking.
description_zh: Caspi AI是一款基于人工智能的健身操教练应用，它能通过视频分析你的技能，并即时给出反馈。上传你的倒立、平板支撑、前杠杆、肌肉上拉等动作的视频片段，你将获得关于姿势、控制力、稳定性和执行力的评分，以及个性化的训练建议。与普通的健身应用不同，Caspi是专门为运动员设计的，旨在通过视频分析和进度追踪来帮助他们提高健身操技能。

name: Smart Post Studio —  AI powered Desktop
tagline: Post with confidence - Backed by AI
tagline_zh: 自信发帖——AI保驾护航
description: Smart Post Studio — the desktop-native social media scheduler for creators on Instagram, Threads, TikTok, X, Facebook, YouTube Shorts, Fanvue. Built-in AI Writing and marketing Studio. AI Writing Studio — caption generation, hashtag research, brand voice memory Visual calendar with drag-and-drop scheduling 7 platforms — Instagram, TikTok, X, Threads, Facebook, YouTube Shorts, Fanvue Local-first** — your posts and credentials live on your machine, not ours Mac + Windows** with native installers
description_zh: Smart Post Studio——专为Instagram、Threads、TikTok、X、Facebook、YouTube Shorts、Fanvue上的创作者打造的桌面原生社交媒体排程工具。内置AI写作与营销工作室。AI写作工作室——生成标题、研究标签、记忆品牌声音。可视化日历，支持拖放排程。7大平台——Instagram、TikTok、X、Threads、Facebook、YouTube Shorts、Fanvue。本地优先**——您的帖子和凭证保存在您的设备上，而非我们的设备。Mac + Windows**，提供原生安装程序

name: SaaS Farm
tagline: 36 free online tools for productivity, health & daily life.
tagline_zh: 36款免费在线工具，助力提升生产力、健康与日常生活。
description: SaaS Farm is a collection of 36 free online tools organized into 8 categories: Timer, Tracker, Calculator, Converter, Pregnancy, Generator, Random, Image tools.
description_zh: SaaS Farm是一个包含36个免费在线工具的集合，这些工具被分为8大类：计时器、跟踪器、计算器、转换器、孕期工具、生成器、随机数生成器、图像工具。

name: InvoiceAnt
tagline: 100% Free & No Sign-up - Forever.
tagline_zh: 永久100%免费，无需注册。
description: Create professional, watermark-free invoices instantly with InvoiceAnt. A fast, free billing tool that keeps your data completely secure on your device.
description_zh: 使用InvoiceAnt，即刻生成专业且无水印的发票。这是一款快速且免费的开票工具，能确保您的数据在设备上完全安全。

name: Smart CRO Agent - AI Audits for Shopify
tagline: Your AI CRO consultant for Shopify — instant & affordable
tagline_zh: 您在Shopify上的AI CRO顾问——即时且实惠
description: Smart CRO Agent is your AI conversion consultant for Shopify. Point it at any page — home, collections, products, or CMS — and in ~30 seconds it returns a prioritized, developer-ready action plan ranked by revenue impact, using 5 proven CRO frameworks. Every audit also scores mobile UX, SEO, and your AI search visibility (AEO, GEO & LLMs.txt) so you show up in ChatGPT Search and Google AI Overviews. Share reports via link or PDF. Start free — no consultant fees, no waiting weeks.
description_zh: Smart CRO Agent是您在Shopify上的AI转化顾问。将其指向任何页面——主页、系列、产品或CMS——大约30秒后，它就会使用5个经过验证的CRO框架，根据收入影响，返回一个按优先级排序、适合开发人员的行动计划。每次审核还会对移动端用户体验、搜索引擎优化以及您的AI搜索可见性（AEO、GEO和LLMs.txt）进行评分，以便您在ChatGPT搜索和Google AI概览中脱颖而出。您可以通过链接或PDF分享报告。免费开始——无顾问费，无需等待数周。

name: ChartKit
tagline: ThinkCell alternative for Google Slides
tagline_zh: Google幻灯片的ThinkCell替代方案
description: ChartKit helps teams build charts directly inside Google Slides, Docs, and Sheets.
description_zh: ChartKit 可帮助团队直接在 Google 幻灯片、文档和表格中构建图表。

name: calculatrice mauricette
tagline: Calcul gratuit des heures de travail en ligne
tagline_zh: 在线免费工时计算
description: Outil gratuit pour calculer les heures de travail, les heures supplémentaires et convertir les heures en format décimal en quelques secondes.
description_zh: 这是一个免费工具，用于计算工作时间、加班时间，并将小时数转换为十进制格式，单位为秒。

name: TextShape
tagline: Word art that fills any shape - free, exact, private
tagline_zh: 可填充任何形状的文字艺术——自由、精确、个性化
description: Turn your words into art that fills any shape - a heart, an animal, a logo or your own uploaded photo. TextShape places every word precisely to trace the silhouette, and because it's deterministic (not AI), you stay in control: same input, same result. It runs entirely in your browser, so nothing's uploaded. Free, no signup, no watermarks. Gradients, palettes, word-cloud packing, custom fonts. Export PNG, vector SVG with a Cricut/Silhouette cut mode, or an animated reveal - then put it on merch.
description_zh: 将你的文字转化为艺术，填充任何形状——一颗心、一只动物、一个标志或你上传的自己的照片。TextShape能精确地放置每个单词以勾勒出轮廓，而且由于它是确定性的（非人工智能），你可以保持控制：相同的输入，相同的结果。它完全在你的浏览器中运行，因此无需上传任何内容。免费、无需注册、无水印。渐变、调色板、词云打包、自定义字体。导出PNG、带有Cricut/Silhouette切割模式的矢量SVG，或导出动画展示——然后将其应用于商品上。

name: DealLock AI
tagline: Smart Marketplace Meetup Booking
tagline_zh: 智能市场见面会预约
description: DealLock AI helps Facebook Marketplace and local sellers turn photos into ready-to-post listings, share a pickup booking link, and reduce back-and-forth with buyers. Sellers set available pickup times, buyers book a slot, and firm-price protection helps keep “firm” prices firm.
description_zh: DealLock AI助力Facebook Marketplace和本地卖家将照片转化为即刻可发布的商品列表，分享取货预约链接，并减少与买家的反复沟通。卖家设定可用的取货时间，买家预约取货时段，而固定价格保护则有助于保持“固定”价格的稳定性。

name: Rapha Protocol
tagline: Compute moves. Patient data stays
tagline_zh: 计算移动。患者数据保持不变
description: Rapha Protocol is a zero-trust, compute-to-data edge network for clinical AI. Instead of exporting raw patient records and risking massive GDPR/HIPAA liabilities, Rapha routes AI models into air-gapped hardware enclaves directly inside hospital server rooms. Models train locally, and only anonymized weights leave. Key features include Intel SGX/TDX isolation, Policy-as-Code compliance enforcement, and immutable Zero-Knowledge (ZK-SNARK) audit receipts anchored on Polygon Mainnet.
description_zh: Rapha协议是一个面向临床人工智能的零信任、计算到数据边缘网络。Rapha不会导出原始患者记录，从而避免承担巨大的GDPR/HIPAA责任，而是将人工智能模型直接引入医院服务器机房内的气隙硬件隔离区。模型在本地进行训练，只有经过匿名处理的权重才会离开。其主要特点包括Intel SGX/TDX隔离、策略即代码合规性执行，以及锚定在Polygon主网上的不可篡改的零知识（ZK-SNARK）审计收据。

name: Stylus
tagline: Rich, on-brand HTML emails built with Claude
tagline_zh: 用Claude构建的丰富且符合品牌调性的HTML电子邮件
description: Most email tools give you a template editor. Stylus is a skill file you upload to a Claude Project. Claude reads it once and knows your entire design system — components, brand tokens, gradients, copy rules. Describe any email you need, get ready-to-send HTML back. Three themes at launch: Pitch, Grove, Axiom (SaaS). Works with most ESP.
description_zh: 大多数电子邮件工具都提供模板编辑器。而Stylus是一个技能文件，你需要将其上传到Claude项目中。Claude读取一次后，就能了解你的整个设计系统——组件、品牌标识、渐变、复制规则。描述你需要的任何电子邮件，就能得到准备发送的HTML格式。发布时包含三个主题：Pitch、Grove、Axiom（SaaS）。适用于大多数电子邮件服务提供商（ESP）。

name: Wire Chord Studio
tagline: FREE MIDI jam rooms for musicians
tagline_zh: 为音乐家提供免费的MIDI即兴演奏室
description: WireChord is a service with serzero-config MIDI jam rooms. Instead of heavy audio, we stream lightweight MIDI data. No downloads or external sound cards. Plug in your MIDI instrument and play in your browser. Join our closed beta waitlist!
description_zh: WireChord是一项提供零配置MIDI即兴演奏室的服务。我们传输的是轻量级的MIDI数据，而非繁重的音频。无需下载或外接声卡。只需插入你的MIDI乐器，即可在浏览器中演奏。快来加入我们的内测等待名单吧！

name: Money Clarity — Notion Finance Tracker
tagline: Track every rupee. Know your net worth. In Notion.
tagline_zh: 追踪每一卢比。了解你的净资产。尽在Notion。
description: Money Clarity is a complete personal finance systembuilt inside Notion — designed for Indians who've tred budgeting apps and quit. 6 modules ready on day 1 Income Tracker, Expense Tracker, 50/30/20 Budget Dahboard, Subscriptions Audit, Net Worth Tracker, and ebt Payoff Tracker. Built specifically for Indian spnding patterns — UPI categories, EMI tracking, INR. ay what you want (min $2).
description_zh: Money Clarity是Notion内置的一个完整的个人理财系统，专为那些尝试过预算应用程序但最终放弃的印度人设计。6个模块从第一天起即可使用：收入跟踪器、支出跟踪器、50/30/20预算仪表板、订阅审计、净资产跟踪器和债务偿还跟踪器。专为印度人的消费模式量身打造——包括UPI类别、EMI跟踪和INR。随心所欲（最低2美元）。

name: Smart CRO Agent - AI Audits for Shopify
tagline: Your AI CRO consultant for Shopify — instant & affordable
tagline_zh: 您在Shopify上的AI CRO顾问——即时且实惠
description: Smart CRO Agent is your AI conversion consultant for Shopify. Point it at any page — home, collections, products, or CMS — and in ~30 seconds it returns a prioritized, developer-ready action plan ranked by revenue impact, using 5 proven CRO frameworks. Every audit also scores mobile UX, SEO, and your AI search visibility (AEO, GEO & LLMs.txt) so you show up in ChatGPT Search and Google AI Overviews. Share reports via link or PDF. Start free — no consultant fees, no waiting weeks.
description_zh: Smart CRO Agent是您在Shopify上的AI转化顾问。只需将其指向任何页面——主页、产品系列、产品或CMS——大约30秒内，它就会使用5个经过验证的CRO框架，根据收入影响，返回一个按优先级排序、适合开发人员的行动计划。每次审核还会对移动端用户体验、搜索引擎优化以及您的AI搜索可见性（AEO、GEO和LLMs.txt）进行评分，以便您在ChatGPT搜索和Google AI概览中脱颖而出。您可以通过链接或PDF分享报告。免费开始——无顾问费，无需等待数周。

name: Ship Space
tagline: Agent Developing Ecosystem
tagline_zh: 代理开发生态系统
description: ShipSpace is the agent development environment for builders shipping with AI. Run Claude, Codex, Gemini, and Cursor side by side in one workspace with up to 16 agents in parallel. Ship Agent orchestrates your swarm, while a built-in browser, IDE, GitHub integration, and drag-and-drop terminals keep everything in one window. Spin up multi-agent workspaces in under a second. Built by MSH.Tech. Built by agents. Built for builders. Ship faster. 🚀
description_zh: ShipSpace是面向使用人工智能进行构建的构建者的代理开发环境。您可以在一个工作区中并行运行Claude、Codex、Gemini和Cursor，最多可并行运行16个代理。Ship Agent负责编排您的集群，而内置的浏览器、集成开发环境、GitHub集成和拖放式终端则将所有内容集中在一个窗口中。不到一秒即可启动多代理工作区。由MSH.Tech打造。由代理构建。为构建者而生。更快地构建。

name: CartAI Upsell
tagline: AI post-purchase upsells with combined shipping
tagline_zh: AI结合运费进行购后促销
description: CartAI Upsell helps Shopify merchants turn completed orders into a second sale. It matches each purchase with a relevant accessory, writes a personalized follow-up email, and gives the customer a one-click draft order link so the add-on can ship with the original order. Merchants control the accessory catalog and AI tone, while the dashboard tracks sends, conversions, revenue, and the full email audit trail.
description_zh: CartAI Upsell助力Shopify商家将已完成的订单转化为二次销售。它为每笔购买匹配相关配件，撰写个性化的跟进邮件，并为客户提供一键生成订单草稿的链接，以便附加商品能与原始订单一起发货。商家可控制配件目录和AI语气，而控制面板则可追踪发送次数、转化率、收入以及完整的邮件审核记录。

name: WhenAvailable
tagline: Effortless, ad-free group scheduling
tagline_zh: 轻松无广告的群组日程安排
description: Simplifying group coordination without the clutter, tracking, or paywalls. We’ve all been there: you just want to find a time for a group event, but existing tools drown your participants in invasive ads, force everyone to create accounts, or lock basic features behind a subscription. WhenAvailable is built to be the clean, modern, and frictionless alternative. Create a beautiful availability poll in seconds, send the link, and let your group vote.
description_zh: 简化群组协调，摆脱杂乱、追踪或付费门槛。我们都曾有过这样的经历：你只是想为群组活动找个时间，但现有的工具却让参与者淹没在侵入式广告中，迫使每个人创建账户，或将基本功能锁定在订阅之后。WhenAvailable旨在成为干净、现代、无障碍的替代方案。只需几秒钟即可创建一个美观的可用性投票，发送链接，让你的群组进行投票。

name: Warning Lab
tagline: Compliance tools for high-risk, high-liability industries
tagline_zh: 高风险、高责任行业的合规工具
description: WarningLab's SaaS (SPONCI) helps high-liability organizations document support, intervention, and compliance efforts. With SPONCI, every outreach attempt is logged and retained, creating evidence that help was offered before legal action. Regulators and state attorneys general increasingly expect organizations to demonstrate meaningful efforts to support and protect users. SPONCI provides engagement and intervention—not just an 800 number, website link, or after-hours counseling referral.
description_zh: WarningLab的SaaS（SPONCI）可帮助高风险组织记录支持、干预和合规工作。借助SPONCI，每一次外联尝试都会被记录并保留，从而创建证据，证明在采取法律行动之前已提供过帮助。监管机构和各州总检察长越来越期望组织能展现出在支持和保护用户方面所做的切实努力。SPONCI提供的是参与和干预，而不仅仅是一个800电话号码、网站链接或下班后的咨询转介。

name: Atlas
tagline: Trading built for the everyday investor
tagline_zh: 专为普通投资者打造的交易平台
description: Atlas is a unified trading platform with a built-in smart AI layer called Glob. Glob analyzes tokens and stocks, constructs and executes trading strategies, and supports backtesting before deployment. Glob can trade on your behalf with different strategies such as following breaking news, SMA, and The platform covers all major asset classes: 20,000+ tokens across 90+ networks, 260+ stocks, perpetuals, and 5,000+ prediction markets.
description_zh: Atlas是一个统一的交易平台，内置了一个名为Glob的智能AI层。Glob能够分析代币和股票，构建并执行交易策略，并在部署前支持回测。Glob能够以不同的策略代表您进行交易，例如追踪突发新闻、采用移动平均线（SMA）策略等。该平台涵盖所有主要资产类别：来自90多个网络的20,000多种代币、260多种股票、永续合约以及5,000多个预测市场。

name: RootNous
tagline: Foundational Intelligence
tagline_zh: 基础智能
description: Research and Development in Artificial Intelligence and related fields, Leading research organization advancing AI technology through cutting-edge research, publications, patents and innovative software solutions.
description_zh: 人工智能及相关领域的研究与开发，一家领先的研究机构，通过前沿研究、出版物、专利和创新软件解决方案推动人工智能技术的发展。

name: TheTools.World
tagline: Free online tools for images, files, text, and everyday task
tagline_zh: 免费的在线图像、文件、文本处理工具，以及日常任务处理工具
description: TheTools.World starts with free browser-side image tools for compression, resizing, conversion, and upload preparation, with more utilities planned.
description_zh: TheTools.World网站最初提供免费的浏览器端图像工具，用于压缩、调整大小、转换和上传准备，并计划推出更多实用工具。

name: Remote Prop View
tagline: Dallas Fort-Worth property intelligence platform
tagline_zh: 达拉斯-沃斯堡房地产情报平台
description: Competitors show you a price. We show you what it is actually like to live there. Remote Prop View is an AI property intelligence platform that compiles 45+ hyperlocal signals per Dallas-Fort Worth address, fusing listing data, public records, crime, school, commute, environmental and fraud intelligence into a single verified profile. The kind of depth no national portal will build, because they are not built to win one metro. We are. 200 DFW cities. One verified intelligence layer.
description_zh: 竞争对手只给你看价格。而我们则让你亲身体验那里的生活。Remote Prop View是一个人工智能房产智能平台，它为达拉斯-沃斯堡地区的每个地址汇编了45个以上的超本地化信号，将房源数据、公共记录、犯罪情况、学校、通勤、环境和欺诈情报融合成一个经过验证的档案。这种深度是任何全国性门户网站都无法构建的，因为它们并不是为了赢得一个都会区而构建的。而我们则不同。200个达拉斯-沃斯堡城市。一个经过验证的情报层。

tagline: Trading built for the everyday investor

name: Tesseract: AI Math Solver
tagline: Snap & Get Video Explanation
tagline_zh: 抓拍并获取视频说明
description: When students get stuck, they're stuck choosing between text-step apps (Photomath, ChatGPT) that build no intuition, or generic YouTube lectures made for everyone — not their exact question. Tesseract turns any question into a personalized, animated video explanation — narrated and drawn out step by step, the way the best 1-on-1 tutor would explain it. Generated for your problem, in seconds. Live worldwide on the App Store. We're shipping, not pitching.
description_zh: 当学生遇到难题时，他们要么选择无法培养直觉的文本步骤应用（如Photomath、ChatGPT），要么选择面向所有人的通用YouTube讲座——这些讲座并不能针对他们具体的问题。Tesseract则能将任何问题转化为个性化的动画视频讲解——一步步叙述和演示，就像最好的一对一辅导老师讲解一样。针对你的问题，几秒钟内即可生成。该应用已在App Store全球上线。我们提供的是产品，而非推销。

name: Stylus
tagline: Rich, on-brand HTML emails built with Claude

description_zh: WireChord是一项提供零配置MIDI即兴创作室的服务。我们不传输繁重的音频数据，而是传输轻量级的MIDI数据。无需下载或外接声卡。只需插入你的MIDI乐器，即可在浏览器中演奏。快来加入我们的内测等待名单吧！

name: TextShape
tagline: Word art that fills any shape - free, exact, private
tagline_zh: 可填充任意形状的文字艺术——自由、精确、个性
description: Turn your words into art that fills any shape - a heart, an animal, a logo or your own uploaded photo. TextShape places every word precisely to trace the silhouette, and because it's deterministic (not AI), you stay in control: same input, same result. It runs entirely in your browser, so nothing's uploaded. Free, no signup, no watermarks. Gradients, palettes, word-cloud packing, custom fonts. Export PNG, vector SVG with a Cricut/Silhouette cut mode, or an animated reveal - then put it on merch.
description_zh: 将你的文字转化为艺术，填充任何形状——一颗心、一只动物、一个标志或你上传的自己的照片。TextShape能精确地放置每个单词以勾勒出轮廓，而且由于它是确定性的（非人工智能），你始终掌握着控制权：相同的输入，相同的结果。它完全在你的浏览器中运行，因此无需上传任何内容。免费、无需注册、无水印。渐变、调色板、词云打包、自定义字体。导出PNG、带Cricut/Silhouette切割模式的矢量SVG，或动画展示——然后将其应用于商品上。

name: DealLock AI
tagline: Smart Marketplace Meetup Booking
tagline_zh: 智能市场见面会预约
description: DealLock AI helps Facebook Marketplace and local sellers turn photos into ready-to-post listings, share a pickup booking link, and reduce back-and-forth with buyers. Sellers set available pickup times, buyers book a slot, and firm-price protection helps keep “firm” prices firm.
description_zh: DealLock AI助力Facebook Marketplace和本地卖家将照片转化为即刻可发布的商品清单，分享取货预约链接，并减少与买家的反复沟通。卖家设定可用的取货时间，买家预约取货时段，而固定价格保护则有助于保持“固定”价格的稳定性。

name: ChartKit
tagline: ThinkCell alternative for Google Slides
tagline_zh: Google幻灯片的ThinkCell替代方案
description: ChartKit helps teams build charts directly inside Google Slides, Docs, and Sheets.
description_zh: ChartKit 可帮助团队直接在 Google 幻灯片、文档和表格中构建图表。

tagline: Compute moves. Patient data stays
tagline_zh: 计算动作。患者数据保持不变
description: Rapha Protocol is a zero-trust, compute-to-data edge network for clinical AI. Instead of exporting raw patient records and risking massive GDPR/HIPAA liabilities, Rapha routes AI models into air-gapped hardware enclaves directly inside hospital server rooms. Models train locally, and only anonymized weights leave. Key features include Intel SGX/TDX isolation, Policy-as-Code compliance enforcement, and immutable Zero-Knowledge (ZK-SNARK) audit receipts anchored on Polygon Mainnet.
description_zh: Rapha协议是一个面向临床人工智能的零信任、计算到数据的边缘网络。Rapha不会导出原始患者记录，从而避免承担GDPR/HIPAA的巨额责任，而是将人工智能模型直接引入医院服务器机房内的气隙硬件隔离区。模型在本地进行训练，只有经过匿名处理的权重才会离开。其主要特点包括Intel SGX/TDX隔离、策略即代码合规性执行，以及锚定在Polygon主网上的不可篡改的零知识（ZK-SNARK）审计收据。

name: certpracticelab
tagline: Free CompTIA practice tests with every answer explained
tagline_zh: 免费CompTIA模拟测试，每道题都有详细解答
description: Free CompTIA practice tests for A+, Network+, Security+, CySA+, and PenTest+. What makes it different: every answer is explained and cited to a primarysource (NIST, MITRE, CISA, OWASP, RFCs, or the official exam objectives) so you learn the concept, not just the letter. Original questions, never dumps. No signup, no paywall. Start in one click.
description_zh: CompTIA A+、Network+、Security+、CySA+和PenTest+的免费模拟测试。与众不同之处在于：每个答案都配有解释，并引用主要来源（NIST、MITRE、CISA、OWASP、RFC或官方考试大纲），以便您学习概念，而不仅仅是文字。题目原创，绝非题库真题。无需注册，无付费门槛。一键开始测试。

name: Smart CRO Agent - AI Audits for Shopify
tagline: Your AI CRO consultant for Shopify — instant & affordable
tagline_zh: 您在Shopify上的AI CRO顾问——即时且实惠
description: Smart CRO Agent is your AI conversion consultant for Shopify. Point it at any page — home, collections, products, or CMS — and in ~30 seconds it returns a prioritized, developer-ready action plan ranked by revenue impact, using 5 proven CRO frameworks. Every audit also scores mobile UX, SEO, and your AI search visibility (AEO, GEO & LLMs.txt) so you show up in ChatGPT Search and Google AI Overviews. Share reports via link or PDF. Start free — no consultant fees, no waiting weeks.
description_zh: Smart CRO Agent是您在Shopify上的AI转化顾问。只需将其指向任何页面——主页、产品系列、产品或CMS——大约30秒内，它就会使用5个经过验证的CRO框架，根据收入影响，为您返回一个按优先级排序、适合开发人员的行动计划。每次审核还会对移动端用户体验、搜索引擎优化以及您的AI搜索可见性（AEO、GEO和LLMs.txt）进行评分，以便您在ChatGPT搜索和Google AI概览中脱颖而出。您可以通过链接或PDF分享报告。免费开始——无需咨询费，无需等待数周。

name: Tesseract: AI Math Solver
tagline: Snap & Get Video Explanation
tagline_zh: 拍摄并获取视频说明
description: When students get stuck, they're stuck choosing between text-step apps (Photomath, ChatGPT) that build no intuition, or generic YouTube lectures made for everyone — not their exact question. Tesseract turns any question into a personalized, animated video explanation — narrated and drawn out step by step, the way the best 1-on-1 tutor would explain it. Generated for your problem, in seconds. Live worldwide on the App Store. We're shipping, not pitching.
description_zh: 当学生遇到难题时，他们要么选择无法培养直觉的文本步骤应用程序（如Photomath、ChatGPT），要么选择面向所有人、却无法针对他们具体问题的通用YouTube讲座。Tesseract则能将任何问题转化为个性化的动画视频讲解——一步步叙述和演示，就像最好的一对一辅导老师所做的那样。针对你的问题，几秒钟内即可生成。该应用已在App Store全球上线。我们提供的是产品，而非推销。

name: WhenAvailable
tagline: Effortless, ad-free group scheduling
tagline_zh: 轻松无广告的群组日程安排
description: Simplifying group coordination without the clutter, tracking, or paywalls. We’ve all been there: you just want to find a time for a group event, but existing tools drown your participants in invasive ads, force everyone to create accounts, or lock basic features behind a subscription. WhenAvailable is built to be the clean, modern, and frictionless alternative. Create a beautiful availability poll in seconds, send the link, and let your group vote.
description_zh: 简化群组协调，免受杂乱信息、追踪或付费门槛的困扰。我们都曾有过这样的经历：你只是想为群组活动找个时间，但现有的工具却让参与者淹没在侵入式广告中，迫使每个人创建账户，或将基本功能锁定在订阅之后。WhenAvailable旨在成为简洁、现代、无障碍的替代方案。只需几秒钟即可创建一个美观的可用性投票，发送链接，让你的群组进行投票。

name: Atlas
tagline: Trading built for the everyday investor
tagline_zh: 专为普通投资者打造的交易平台
description: Atlas is a unified trading platform with a built-in smart AI layer called Glob. Glob analyzes tokens and stocks, constructs and executes trading strategies, and supports backtesting before deployment. Glob can trade on your behalf with different strategies such as following breaking news, SMA, and The platform covers all major asset classes: 20,000+ tokens across 90+ networks, 260+ stocks, perpetuals, and 5,000+ prediction markets.
description_zh: Atlas是一个统一的交易平台，内置了一个名为Glob的智能AI层。Glob能够分析代币和股票，构建并执行交易策略，并在部署前支持回测。Glob能够以不同的策略代表您进行交易，例如追踪突发新闻、采用移动平均线（SMA）策略等。该平台涵盖所有主要资产类别：来自90多个网络的20,000多种代币、260多种股票、永续合约以及5,000多个预测市场。

name: BidCopy
tagline: Win more freelance jobs with humanized AI proposals.
tagline_zh: 凭借人性化的AI提案，赢得更多自由职业工作。
description: BidCopy generates highly converting, personalized proposals for Upwork and other platforms. We automatically strip away generic AI jargon to make your cover letters sound 100% human, helping you stand out from the crowd and win more contracts.
description_zh: BidCopy为Upwork和其他平台生成高转化率的个性化提案。我们会自动剔除通用的人工智能术语，让您的求职信听起来100%像人类所写，帮助您脱颖而出，赢得更多合同。

name: Remote Prop View
tagline: Dallas Fort-Worth property intelligence platform
tagline_zh: 达拉斯-沃斯堡房地产情报平台
description: Competitors show you a price. We show you what it is actually like to live there. Remote Prop View is an AI property intelligence platform that compiles 45+ hyperlocal signals per Dallas-Fort Worth address, fusing listing data, public records, crime, school, commute, environmental and fraud intelligence into a single verified profile. The kind of depth no national portal will build, because they are not built to win one metro. We are. 200 DFW cities. One verified intelligence layer.
description_zh: 竞争对手只展示价格。而我们则向您展示实际居住体验。Remote Prop View是一个人工智能房产智能平台，它为达拉斯-沃斯堡地区的每个地址整合了45个以上的超本地化信号，将房源数据、公共记录、犯罪情况、学校信息、通勤情况、环境信息和欺诈情报融合成一个经过验证的档案。这种深度是任何全国性门户网站都无法构建的，因为它们并非旨在赢得一个都会区。而我们则致力于此。200个达拉斯-沃斯堡城市。一个经过验证的情报层。

name: Vibebattle
tagline: Prove you are the best vibecoders among your friends
tagline_zh: 证明你是朋友圈中最棒的vibecoder
description: Vibebattle is a 2-8 players vibecoding game. 2 modes: creative -> text subject reproduction -> website target You have X minutes and Y prompts then there is a voting round.
description_zh: Vibebattle是一款2至8人参与的vibecoding游戏。游戏设有两种模式：创意模式 -> 文本主题再现模式 -> 网站目标模式。您有X分钟的时间和Y个提示，之后将进入投票环节。

name: Lite Agent
tagline: Your Browser's new AI intern
tagline_zh: 你的浏览器新AI助手
description: Lite Agent is a privacy-first AI browser extension that clicks, types, remembers, and talks — all inside your browser.
description_zh: Lite Agent是一款以隐私保护为先的人工智能浏览器扩展程序，它能在您的浏览器内完成点击、输入、记忆和对话等操作。

name: RankLLM
tagline: Rank Higher in ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude & Perplexity
tagline_zh: 在ChatGPT、Gemini、Claude和困惑度方面排名更高
description: RankLLM helps brands monitor AI visibility, track citations, and get cited in ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude and Perplexity answers.
description_zh: RankLLM帮助品牌监控人工智能的可见度，追踪引用情况，并在ChatGPT、Gemini、Claude和Perplexity的回答中获得引用。

name: n8n Freelance Autopilot
tagline: AI job hunter that finds freelance work 24/7 while you sleep
tagline_zh: AI求职助手，在你睡觉时全天候为你寻找自由职业工作
description: Tired of checking Upwork daily? n8n Autopilot finds jobs 24/7, scores with AI, generates proposals in 3 languages, sends to Telegram. • Scans Upwork, Malt, Freelancer every 30 min • AI scores jobs 0-100 by your skills • Generates proposals in 3 languages • Sends alerts to Telegram • A/B tests proposals • Weekly reports 💰 €15 one-time • €5/month APIs • No SaaS Self-hosted on Raspberry Pi or VPS 📦 7 workflows • Setup guide • Lifetime updates Built by 17-year-old from Luxembourg 🇱🇺
description_zh: 厌倦了每天查看Upwork？n8n Autopilot全天候自动查找工作，通过人工智能进行评分，生成3种语言的提案，并发送到Telegram。• 每30分钟扫描Upwork、Malt、Freelancer一次 • 人工智能根据你的技能对工作进行0-100评分 • 生成3种语言的提案 • 向Telegram发送提醒 • 对提案进行A/B测试 • 每周报告 💰 一次性15欧元 • API每月5欧元 • 非软件即服务（SaaS），可在树莓派（Raspberry Pi）或虚拟专用服务器（VPS）上自行托管 📦 7种工作流程 • 设置指南 • 终身更新 由卢森堡17岁少年打造 🇱🇺

name: mypage.cc
tagline: Show your work, not just your links
tagline_zh: 展示你的作品，而不仅仅是你的链接
description: Most link in bio tools hand your audience a stack of buttons to tap. mypage.cc gives you an actual page instead. Add your work, your links, your story, and ship something that looks like you made it on purpose, not something you filled out. Built for freelancers and small studios who care how they show up online. Your page, live in minutes, on your own domain.
description_zh: 大多数个人资料链接工具只是给用户一堆按钮供其点击。而mypage.cc则为你提供一个真正的页面。你可以添加你的作品、链接、故事，并发布一个看起来像是特意制作而非随意填写的页面。该工具专为自由职业者和小型工作室打造，他们关心自己在网上的形象。你的页面几分钟内即可上线，且域名归你所有。

name: PitchLab
tagline: The fastest way from pre-med to published.
tagline_zh: 从医学预科到发表的最快途径。
description: Cold emailing research professors takes hours. Reading papers, personalizing, sending, repeating — most pre-meds spend entire afternoons on this. PitchLab does it in minutes. Pick a university and specialty. We find the professors, read their work, write every email, and send from your Gmail automatically. Starter: 50 emails — $19 Pro: 125 emails — $29 Premium: 200 emails — $39 One-time. Same day.
description_zh: 给研究教授发陌生邮件需要花费数小时。阅读论文、个性化定制、发送、重复——大多数医学预科生会为此花费整个下午。而PitchLab只需几分钟即可完成。选择一所大学和一个专业。我们会找到教授，阅读他们的作品，撰写每一封邮件，并自动从您的Gmail发送。入门版：50封邮件——19美元；专业版：125封邮件——29美元；高级版：200封邮件——39美元。一次性购买。当天送达。

name: My Next Body
tagline: All-in-one fitness coaching: sport, nutrition & mindset
tagline_zh: 全能健身教练：运动、营养与心态
description: Most fitness apps make you choose: train or eat well. My Next Body brings it all together. It's a French all-in-one coaching app where 4 AI coaches guide you across everything that actually matters: 🏋️ Martin — training, at home or in the gym, any level 🥗 Solène — nutrition & recipes, without restrictive diets 🧠 JB — mindset & motivation, so you actually stick with it ❤️ Gabriela — health, recovery & injury prevention
description_zh: 大多数健身应用程序都会让你做出选择：训练或健康饮食。而My Next Body则将这两者完美结合。这是一款法国的一站式健身指导应用程序，由四位人工智能教练指导你完成所有真正重要的事项：🏋️ Martin——训练，无论是在家还是在健身房，适合任何水平的人 🥗 Solène——营养与食谱，无限制饮食 🧠 JB——心态与动力，让你真正坚持下去 ❤️ Gabriela——健康、恢复与损伤预防

name: Pollix
tagline: Simple polls & meeting scheduling with zero friction
tagline_zh: 零障碍的简易投票与会议安排
description: Simple polls for better decisions. Pollix helps you create polls and schedule meetings in minutes with zero friction. Why you'll love it: 🚫 No Registration: Participants vote instantly without an account. 📊 Total Flexibility: Support for Single Choice, Multiple Choice, and Calendar Polls. ⏱️ Save Time: Find the best time for meetings based on real-time results. 📲 Easy Sharing: Send a quick link or a QR code. Stop the endless back-and-forth chat. Create your first poll in seconds!
description_zh: 简易投票，助力更优决策。Pollix助您在几分钟内轻松创建投票并安排会议。您为何会爱上它：🚫 无需注册：参与者无需账户即可即时投票。📊 完全灵活：支持单选、多选和日历投票。⏱️ 节省时间：根据实时结果找到最佳会议时间。📲 轻松分享：发送快速链接或二维码。无需无休止的来回聊天。几秒钟内即可创建您的首个投票！

name: Gaplyze
tagline: Stop guessing. Start building what the market wants
tagline_zh: 别再瞎猜了。开始打造市场需要的产品吧
description: Gaplyze stands out by turning startup validation into a complete workflow, not just an idea generator. Start with a niche, idea, or competitor URL and receive demand signals, competitor gaps, pricing insights, underserved audiences, idea scoring, strategy maps, business blueprints, execution roadmaps, domain ratings, prompt packs, and investor-ready exports. All of this is designed to help founders validate faster and build smarter.
description_zh: Gaplyze的独特之处在于，它将初创企业验证转变为一个完整的工作流程，而不仅仅是一个创意生成器。从利基市场、创意或竞争对手的网址开始，您将收到需求信号、竞争对手缺口、定价洞察、未被充分服务的受众、创意评分、战略地图、商业蓝图、执行路线图、域名评级、提示包以及投资者准备就绪的导出文件。所有这些设计都是为了帮助创始人更快地进行验证，并更明智地进行构建。

name: MailShot
tagline: #newsletter #emails #builder
tagline_zh: #新闻通讯 #电子邮件 #构建器
description: Newsletters Builder by drag and drop blocks, modify content and style with multiple canvas and pages each with its own design
description_zh: 通过拖放模块构建新闻稿，使用多个画布和页面来修改内容和样式，每个画布和页面都有其独特的设计

name: TruStar Connect
tagline: All-in-one safety software, built for COR readiness.
tagline_zh: 一体化安全软件，专为COR就绪而打造。
description: TruStar Connect is an all-in-one safety and field operations platform that helps companies get and stay COR ready. It replaces paper and spreadsheets with one connected system for inspections and forms, field observations, incident investigations with AI assistance, hazard registers, corrective actions, training tracking, and equipment maintenance. Everything is backed by audit-grade records, role-based access, and analytics. Built by Canadian safety professionals. Free trial available.
description_zh: TruStar Connect是一个集安全与现场运营于一体的平台，可帮助企业做好并持续保持COR（合规、合规性、合规性）准备。该平台用一个互联系统取代了纸质文件和电子表格，涵盖检查与表格、现场观察、人工智能辅助的事故调查、危险登记、纠正措施、培训跟踪以及设备维护。所有内容均以审计级记录、基于角色的访问权限和分析功能为支撑。该平台由加拿大安全专业人士打造，并提供免费试用。

name: Haystack
tagline: Get your brand recommended by ChatGPT, Perplexity & Gemini.
tagline_zh: 让你的品牌获得ChatGPT、Perplexity和Gemini的推荐。
description: Ask ChatGPT for the best tool in your category. It names three companies. You're probably not one of them. Those names aren't random. The model is pulling from a handful of articles it trusts, and your competitors are in them. You're not. Haystack finds the exact prompts buyers use, the exact sources behind every answer, and the journalists who can get you into them. You send the pitch, we watch the engines until your name shows up. Run it free on your own domain.
description_zh: 向ChatGPT询问你所在领域的最佳工具。它会列出三家公司。你可能并不在其中。这些名字并非随机选择。该模型是从它信赖的几篇文章中提取出来的，而你的竞争对手就在其中。但你不在。Haystack能找到买家使用的确切提示、每个答案背后的确切来源，以及能帮你获取这些信息的记者。你发送宣传稿，我们监控引擎，直到你的名字出现。在你的域名上免费运行它。

name: OpenMed Labs
tagline: The Infrastructure Layer for Healthcare AI
tagline_zh: 医疗人工智能的基础设施层
description: OpenMed Labs helps healthcare researchers and AI teams build medical AI without moving raw patient data. It combines secure medical datasets with no-code model training and clinical simulation in one platform. Contributors also get transparent ownership and attribution for how their data is used.
description_zh: OpenMed Labs助力医疗研究人员和人工智能团队在不转移原始患者数据的情况下构建医疗人工智能。该平台将安全的医疗数据集、无代码模型训练和临床模拟功能集于一体。同时，数据贡献者对其数据的使用情况享有透明的所有权和归属权。

name: HealthBridge AI
tagline: A calm place to keep everyone's health, together.
tagline_zh: 一个能让大家共同保持健康、宁静的地方。
description: A beautiful, AI-powered healtHealthBridge AI is a calm, simple health companion for your phone. Add your medicines once and it keeps track of timing and dosage. Keep your family's blood groups, allergies, and emergency contacts in one place. Snap a photo of a prescription and it reads it for you. And when you have a health question at 2am, ask the built-in AI — it only talks health, nothing else. No clutter, no sign-up forms. Open it, and it remembers you.
description_zh: 一款美观、由人工智能驱动的健康助手——HealthBridge AI，是您手机上的贴心健康伴侣。只需添加一次您的药物信息，它就能记录服药时间和剂量。您还可以将家人的血型、过敏史和紧急联系人信息集中管理。只需拍下处方照片，它就能为您解读。如果您在凌晨2点有健康问题，只需询问内置的人工智能——它只谈健康，不谈其他。没有繁琐的操作，也没有注册表格。打开它，它就会记住您。

name: RankLLM
tagline: Rank Higher in ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude & Perplexity
tagline_zh: 在ChatGPT、Gemini、Claude和困惑度方面排名更高
description: RankLLM helps brands monitor AI visibility, track citations, and get cited in ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude and Perplexity answers.
description_zh: RankLLM帮助品牌监控人工智能的可见度，追踪引用情况，并在ChatGPT、Gemini、Claude和Perplexity的回答中获得引用。

name: ChinaValidate
tagline: Screen Chinese suppliers before you pay
tagline_zh: 在付款前筛选中国供应商
description: ChinaValidate helps overseas buyers screen Chinese suppliers before payments, contracts, onboarding, or shipment decisions. Search by company name, keyword, or USCC, compare possible matches, open an English company profile, and unlock a structured report with registration details, risk signals, public-record modules, and PDF export.
description_zh: ChinaValidate帮助海外买家在付款、签订合同、供应商入职或做出发货决定之前，对中国供应商进行筛选。用户可以通过公司名称、关键字或USCC进行搜索，比较可能的匹配项，打开英文公司简介，并获取一份包含注册详情、风险信号、公开记录模块和PDF导出功能的结构化报告。

name: reAItro
tagline: Remote sprint retros your team shows up for
tagline_zh: 远程冲刺回顾会上，你的团队成员都到场了
description: reAItro is a free AI retrospective tool built for remote & distributed agile teams. Run real-time boards, let AI cluster the feedback and write the summary. action items, and warm up quiet rooms with 5 built-in team games. No credit card, no signup to join.
description_zh: reAItro是一款专为远程和分布式敏捷团队打造的免费人工智能回顾工具。运行实时板，让AI对反馈进行聚类并撰写总结、行动项，并通过5款内置团队游戏打破沉默。无需信用卡，无需注册即可加入。

name: Lite Agent
tagline: Your Browser's new AI intern
tagline_zh: 你的浏览器新添的AI助手
description: Lite Agent is a privacy-first AI browser extension that clicks, types, remembers, and talks — all inside your browser.
description_zh: Lite Agent是一款以隐私保护为先的人工智能浏览器扩展程序，它能在您的浏览器内执行点击、输入、记忆和对话等操作。

name: FreeByDate
tagline: Debt shouldn’t be a mystery. We show the path to freedom.
tagline_zh: 债务不应成为谜团。我们为您指明通往自由的道路。
description: FreeByDate is a free debt payoff sequencer that shows you the fastest path to debt freedom using a disciplined sequencing strategy. Not minimum payments. A real plan.
description_zh: FreeByDate是一款免费的债务清偿排序工具，它采用严格的排序策略，为你展示实现债务自由的最快途径。不是最低还款额，而是一个真正的计划。

name: CalculaFinanzas
tagline: Free, no-signup financial calculators for Chile
tagline_zh: 智利免费、无需注册的金融计算器
description: CalculaFinanzas is a free toolbox of 40+ financial calculators built for Chile (in CLP): net salary, severance, mortgage dividend, compound interest, UF/UTM converters and more. Live UF/UTM/IPC data, no signup, no clutter — clear answers in seconds, plus plain-language guides.
description_zh: CalculaFinanzas是一个免费工具箱，包含40多种为智利（以比索计价）设计的金融计算器：净工资、遣散费、抵押贷款分红、复利、UF/UTM转换器等。提供实时UF/UTM/IPC数据，无需注册，界面简洁——几秒钟内即可获得清晰答案，并提供通俗易懂的指南。

name: Redvibe Multibrowser
tagline: multibrowser, saas, workspace, browser
tagline_zh: 多浏览器、SaaS、工作空间、浏览器
description: Multi-accounting browser with unlimited profiles and zero complex setup. Redvibe is designed to manage dozens of accounts on a single computer without complex setups and technical hassles. Manage clients, scale advertising campaigns, import accounts in bulk — the AI will automatically sort them into ready-made profiles. No limits or restrictions. Launch work accounts quickly, without a cluttered interface or long preparation.
description_zh: 多账户浏览器，无限账户配置，零复杂设置。Redvibe旨在管理单台计算机上的数十个账户，无需复杂设置和技术难题。管理客户、扩展广告活动、批量导入账户——人工智能会自动将它们分类到现成的账户配置中。无限制或约束。快速启动工作账户，无需杂乱的界面或漫长的准备。

name: Pollix
tagline: Simple polls & meeting scheduling with zero friction
tagline_zh: 零摩擦的简单投票和会议安排
description: Simple polls for better decisions. Pollix helps you create polls and schedule meetings in minutes with zero friction. Why you'll love it: 🚫 No Registration: Participants vote instantly without an account. 📊 Total Flexibility: Support for Single Choice, Multiple Choice, and Calendar Polls. ⏱️ Save Time: Find the best time for meetings based on real-time results. 📲 Easy Sharing: Send a quick link or a QR code. Stop the endless back-and-forth chat. Create your first poll in seconds!
description_zh: 简易投票，助您做出更佳决策。Pollix助您在几分钟内轻松创建投票并安排会议。您为何会爱上它：🚫 无需注册：参与者无需注册账户即可立即投票。📊 完全灵活：支持单选、多选和日历投票。⏱️ 节省时间：根据实时结果找到最佳会议时间。📲 轻松分享：发送快速链接或二维码。无需无休止的来回聊天。几秒钟内即可创建您的首个投票！

name: My Next Body
tagline: All-in-one fitness coaching: sport, nutrition & mindset
tagline_zh: 全能健身指导：运动、营养与心态
description: Most fitness apps make you choose: train or eat well. My Next Body brings it all together. It's a French all-in-one coaching app where 4 AI coaches guide you across everything that actually matters: 🏋️ Martin — training, at home or in the gym, any level 🥗 Solène — nutrition & recipes, without restrictive diets 🧠 JB — mindset & motivation, so you actually stick with it ❤️ Gabriela — health, recovery & injury prevention
description_zh: 大多数健身应用程序都会让你做出选择：训练或健康饮食。而“我的下一个身体”则将这两者结合在一起。这是一款法国的一站式教练应用程序，由四位人工智能教练指导你完成所有真正重要的事情：🏋️ 马丁——训练，无论是在家还是在健身房，任何水平都可以 🥗 索莱娜——营养与食谱，没有限制性饮食 🧠 JB——心态与动力，让你真正坚持下去 ❤️ 加布里埃拉——健康、恢复与损伤预防

name: RankLLM
tagline: Rank Higher in ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude & Perplexity
tagline_zh: 在ChatGPT、Gemini、Claude和困惑度方面排名更高
description: RankLLM helps brands monitor AI visibility, track citations, and get cited in ChatGPT, Gemini, Claude and Perplexity answers.
description_zh: RankLLM帮助品牌监控人工智能的可见度，跟踪引用情况，并在ChatGPT、Gemini、Claude和Perplexity的回答中被引用。

name: Remote Prop View
tagline: Dallas Fort-Worth property intelligence platform
tagline_zh: 达拉斯-沃斯堡房地产情报平台
description: Competitors show you a price. We show you what it is actually like to live there. Remote Prop View is an AI property intelligence platform that compiles 45+ hyperlocal signals per Dallas-Fort Worth address, fusing listing data, public records, crime, school, commute, environmental and fraud intelligence into a single verified profile. The kind of depth no national portal will build, because they are not built to win one metro. We are. 200 DFW cities. One verified intelligence layer.
description_zh: 竞争对手只给你看价格。而我们则让你亲身体验居住在那里的真实感受。Remote Prop View是一个人工智能房产智能平台，它为达拉斯-沃斯堡地区的每个地址汇集了45个以上的超本地化信号，将房源数据、公共记录、犯罪情况、学校、通勤、环境和欺诈情报融合成一个经过验证的档案。这种深度是任何全国性门户网站都无法构建的，因为它们并不是为了赢得一个都会区而建立的。而我们，则致力于此。200个达拉斯-沃斯堡城市。一个经过验证的情报层。

name: MakerMetrics
tagline: An open-source analytics dashboard built for Etsy shops.
tagline_zh: 专为Etsy店铺打造的开源分析仪表板。
description: MakerMetrics is an analytics dashboard for Etsy sellers, without API access needed! Import the CSV exports Etsy already gives you and get what Etsy fails to give its sellers: a useful, mobile-friendly dashboard with insights, forecasting, and an ability to connect your own AI API key.
description_zh: MakerMetrics是Etsy卖家的分析仪表板，无需API访问权限！导入Etsy已经为您提供的CSV导出文件，即可获得Etsy未能为其卖家提供的东西：一个实用、适合移动设备的仪表板，其中包含洞察、预测功能，以及连接您自己的AI API密钥的能力。

name: Ruki
tagline: A Windows AI assistant you can teach and that does the work
tagline_zh: 一个你可以教导的Windows AI助手，它能帮你完成工作
description: A minimal Windows desktop AI assistant you can teach and that then does the work for you, under your supervision.
description_zh: 一个最小的Windows桌面人工智能助手，你可以对其进行训练，然后它会在你的监督下为你完成工作。

name: TruStar Connect
tagline: All-in-one safety software, built for COR readiness.
tagline_zh: 一体化安全软件，专为COR（Corporate Risk Management，企业风险管理）准备就绪而打造。
description: TruStar Connect is an all-in-one safety and field operations platform that helps companies get and stay COR ready. It replaces paper and spreadsheets with one connected system for inspections and forms, field observations, incident investigations with AI assistance, hazard registers, corrective actions, training tracking, and equipment maintenance. Everything is backed by audit-grade records, role-based access, and analytics. Built by Canadian safety professionals. Free trial available.
description_zh: TruStar Connect是一个集安全与现场运营于一体的平台，可帮助企业做好并持续保持COR（合规、合规性、合规性）准备。该平台用一个互联系统取代了纸质文件和电子表格，涵盖了检查与表格、现场观察、人工智能辅助的事故调查、危险登记、纠正措施、培训跟踪以及设备维护等功能。所有内容均以审计级记录、基于角色的访问权限和分析功能为支撑。该平台由加拿大安全专业人士打造，并提供免费试用。

tagline: #newsletter #emails #builder
tagline_zh: #通讯 #电子邮件 #构建器
description: Newsletters Builder by drag and drop blocks, modify content and style with multiple canvas and pages each with its own design
description_zh: 通过拖放模块构建新闻稿，使用多个画布和页面（每个都有其独特的设计）来修改内容和样式

name: Redvibe Multibrowser
tagline: multibrowser, saas, workspace, browser
tagline_zh: 多浏览器、软件即服务（SaaS）、工作空间、浏览器

Redvibe is designed to manage dozens of accounts on a single computer without complex setups and technical hassles. Manage clients, scale advertising campaigns, import accounts in bulk — the AI will automatically sort them into ready-made profiles. No limits or restrictions. Launch work accounts quickly, without a cluttered interface or long preparation.

name: CartWatch
tagline: Detect and remove spam abandoned checkouts from Shopify
tagline_zh: 检测并移除Shopify中的垃圾邮件和被遗弃的结账信息
description: CartWatch detects bots and fake sessions in your Shopify abandoned checkout flows. Suppress fake and spam profiles in Klaviyo and Omnisend so you're not paying for fake contacts — and your recovery emails reach real buyers.
description_zh: CartWatch能在您的Shopify放弃结账流程中检测到机器人和虚假会话。在Klaviyo和Omnisend中抑制虚假和垃圾邮件账户，这样您就不会为虚假联系人付费，并且您的恢复邮件能够送达真正的买家。

name: LearnPilot AI
tagline: The AI university that enforces mastery before you advance
tagline_zh: 在你进步之前，这所人工智能大学会先要求你掌握知识
description: LearnPilot AI is an AI university that enforces mastery. Type any skill → AI builds your personalized curriculum → study structured lessons with YouTube videos → pass quizzes to unlock next modules → fail → AI generates targeted revision → retry → pass all modules → take a final exam → graduate. No skipping. No passive watching. Actual mastery enforced. Built with Nuxt 4, Node.js, Groq AI, and YouTube API.
description_zh: LearnPilot AI是一所致力于掌握学习的AI大学。输入任何技能→AI为您构建个性化课程→通过YouTube视频学习结构化课程→通过测验解锁下一模块→失败→AI生成针对性复习材料→重试→通过所有模块→参加期末考试→毕业。不可跳过。不可被动观看。真正掌握学习。基于Nuxt 4、Node.js、Groq AI和YouTube API构建。

name: Scuter
tagline: Ad & product intelligence for e-commerce winners
tagline_zh: 电商赢家的广告与产品智能
description: Scruter is an all-in-one e-commerce intelligence platform. Search and analyze millions of live ads across Meta, TikTok and Pinterest, spy on competitors' shops, and uncover winning products before they go viral. Unlike single-platform ad spy tools, Scruter unifies ad research, shop intelligence and product discovery in one place with a shop tracking, email-flow capture, and a full public API + MCP + Chrome extension to research from anywhere.
description_zh: Scruter是一个一体化电子商务智能平台。它能够搜索并分析Meta、TikTok和Pinterest上数以百万计的实时广告，窥探竞争对手的店铺，并在爆红之前发现畅销产品。与单平台广告窥探工具不同，Scruter将广告研究、店铺情报和产品发现功能集于一体，并提供店铺跟踪、电子邮件流捕获以及完整的公共API + MCP + Chrome扩展程序，以便随时随地进行研究。

name: Haystack
tagline: Get your brand recommended by ChatGPT, Perplexity & Gemini.
tagline_zh: 让你的品牌获得ChatGPT、Perplexity和Gemini的推荐。
description: Ask ChatGPT for the best tool in your category. It names three companies. You're probably not one of them. Those names aren't random. The model is pulling from a handful of articles it trusts, and your competitors are in them. You're not. Haystack finds the exact prompts buyers use, the exact sources behind every answer, and the journalists who can get you into them. You send the pitch, we watch the engines until your name shows up. Run it free on your own domain.
description_zh: 向ChatGPT询问你所在领域的最佳工具。它会列出三家公司。你可能并不在其中。这些名字并非随机。该模型是从它信任的几篇文章中提取出来的，而你的竞争对手就在其中。但你不在。Haystack能找出买家使用的确切提示、每个答案背后的确切来源，以及能帮你获取这些信息的记者。你发送推销文案，我们监控引擎，直到你的名字出现。在你的域名上免费运行它。

name: Atlas
tagline: Trading built for the everyday investor
tagline_zh: 专为普通投资者打造的交易平台
description: Atlas is a unified trading platform with a built-in smart AI layer called Glob. Glob analyzes tokens and stocks, constructs and executes trading strategies, and supports backtesting before deployment. Glob can trade on your behalf with different strategies such as following breaking news, SMA, and The platform covers all major asset classes: 20,000+ tokens across 90+ networks, 260+ stocks, perpetuals, and 5,000+ prediction markets.
description_zh: Atlas是一个统一的交易平台，内置了一个名为Glob的智能AI层。Glob能够分析代币和股票，构建并执行交易策略，并在部署前支持回测。Glob能够以不同的策略代表您进行交易，例如追踪突发新闻、使用移动平均线（SMA）策略等。该平台涵盖所有主要资产类别：来自90多个网络的20,000多种代币、260多种股票、永续合约以及5,000多个预测市场。

name: JEEA2Z - Structured JEE Problem Tracker
tagline: Stop solving randomly. Start tracking systematically.
tagline_zh: 别再随意解决了。开始系统地追踪吧。
description: JEE Sheet - Striver A2Z equivalent for JEE Physics, Chemistry, and Mathematics aspirants with detailed progress tracking and statistics.
description_zh: JEE学习表 - 专为JEE物理、化学和数学备考者设计的Striver A2Z等效工具，提供详细的进度跟踪和统计数据。

name: RootedLife
tagline: Turn quitting bad habits into growing real forests. 🌳
tagline_zh: 把戒除坏习惯变成培育真正的森林。
description: RootedLife is a gamified habit tracker that helps you quit smoking and build better routines. Instead of boring streaks, your willpower grows a virtual forest. When a craving hits, use the unique 'Crisis Radar' to distract yourself. Built natively for Android, it transforms the painful process of quitting into a visually rewarding journey.
description_zh: RootedLife是一款游戏化的习惯追踪应用，旨在帮助你戒烟并培养更健康的日常生活习惯。你的意志力将不再只是枯燥的连续天数，而是会生长出一片虚拟的森林。当烟瘾来袭时，你可以使用独特的“危机雷达”来分散自己的注意力。这款应用专为安卓系统打造，它将痛苦的戒烟过程转化为一段视觉上富有成就感的旅程。

name: Zenhook
tagline: Webhook debugging and AI summaries for humans
tagline_zh: Webhook调试和面向人类的AI摘要
description: Stop reading raw JSON. ZenHook lets you create webhook endpoints, capture requests in real time, and instantly understand incoming events with AI-powered summaries. Search, filter, and organize webhook traffic to debug integrations faster and spend less time digging through payloads. Built for developers, automation engineers, and API integrators.
description_zh: 停止读取原始JSON。ZenHook可让您创建Webhook端点，实时捕获请求，并通过人工智能摘要即时了解传入事件。搜索、过滤和组织Webhook流量，以更快地调试集成，并减少挖掘有效负载的时间。专为开发人员、自动化工程师和API集成人员打造。
